motivation: 现有盲方法在估计TDOA时仅使用两个麦克风（N=2），可能未充分利用多麦克风的潜力，因此探索增加N是否能直接提升性能。
method: 通过增加麦克风数量N，直接应用多个CCI计算TDOA，保持原有计算流程不变，并提出两个结合优化策略与多麦克风的联合方法示例。
result: 实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基于CCI的盲通道识别方法，且无需修改计算流程。
conclusion: 增加麦克风数量能有效提升TDOA估计性能，未来应结合优化算法与多麦克风配置进一步改进。
search_text: Are Multiple Cross-Correlation Identities better than just Two? Improving the Estimate of Time Differences-of-Arrivals from Blind Audio Signals 多个互相关恒等式比两个互相关恒等式更好吗？改进盲音频信号到达时间差的估计 Given an unknown audio source, the estimation of time differences-of-arrivals (TDOAs) can be efficiently and robustly solved using blind channel identification and exploiting the cross-correlation identity (CCI). Prior "blind" works have improved the estimate of TDOAs by means of different algorithmic solutions and optimization strategies, while always sticking to the case N = 2 microphones. But what if we can obtain a direct improvement in performance by just increasing N? In this paper we try to investigate this direction, showing that, despite the arguable simplicity, this is capable of (sharply) improving upon state-of-the-art blind channel identification methods based on CCI, without modifying the computational pipeline. Inspired by our results, we seek to warm up the community and the practitioners by paving the way (with two concrete, yet preliminary, examples) towards joint approaches in which advances in the optimization are combined with an increased number of microphones, in order to achieve further improvements. 给定未知的音频源，可以使用盲通道识别和利用互相关恒等式 (CCI) 有效且鲁棒地解决到达时间差 (TDOA) 的估计。之前的“盲”工作通过不同的算法解决方案和优化策略改进了 TDOA 的估计，同时始终坚持 N = 2 个麦克风的情况。但如果我们只需要增加 N 就能获得性能的直接提升呢？在本文中，我们尝试研究这个方向，表明尽管其简单性值得商榷，但它能够（显着）改进基于 CCI 的最先进的盲通道识别方法，而无需修改计算管道。受我们结果的启发，我们寻求通过为联合方法铺平道路（通过两个具体但初步的例子）来温暖社区和从业者，在联合方法中，优化的进步与增加的麦克风数量相结合，以实现进一步的改进。 本文研究通过增加麦克风数量（N>2）利用多个互相关恒等式（CCI）来改进盲音频信号中时间差估计（TDOA）的方法。 Danilo Greco,Jacopo Cavazza,Alessio Del Bue cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Suhas Thejaswi,Juho Lauri,Aristides Gionis
title: Restless reachability problems in temporal graphs
title_zh: 时间图中的不稳定可达性问题
abstract: We study a family of reachability problems under waiting-time restrictions in temporal and vertex-colored temporal graphs. Given a temporal graph and a set of source vertices, we find the set of vertices that are reachable from a source via a time-respecting path, where the difference in timestamps between consecutive edges is at most a resting time. Given a vertex-colored temporal graph and a multiset query of colors, we find the set of vertices reachable from a source via a time-respecting path such that the vertex colors of the path agree with the multiset query and the difference in timestamps between consecutive edges is at most a resting time. These kind of problems have applications in understanding the spread of a disease in a network, tracing contacts in epidemic outbreaks, finding signaling pathways in the brain network, and recommending tours for tourists, among other. We present an algebraic algorithmic framework based on constrained multi\-linear sieving for solving the restless reachability problems we propose. In particular, parameterized by the length $k$ of a path sought, we show that the proposed problems can be solved in $O(2^k k m Δ)$ time and $O(n Δ)$ space, where $n$ is the number of vertices, $m$ the number of edges, and $Δ$ the maximum resting time of an input temporal graph. In addition, we prove that our algorithms for the restless reachability problems in vertex-colored temporal graphs are optimal under plausible complexity-theoretic assumptions. Finally, with an open-source implementation, we demonstrate that our algorithm scales to large graphs with up to one billion temporal edges, despite the problems being NP-hard. Specifically, we present extensive experiments to evaluate our scalability claims both on synthetic and real-world graphs. Our implementation is efficiently engineered and highly optimized.

Given a temporal graph and a set of source vertices, we find the set of vertices that are reachable from a source via a time-respecting path, where the difference in timestamps between consecutive edges is at most a resting time. Given a vertex-colored temporal graph and a multiset query of colors, we find the set of vertices reachable from a source via a time-respecting path such that the vertex colors of the path agree with the multiset query and the difference in timestamps between consecutive edges is at most a resting time. These kind of problems have applications in understanding the spread of a disease in a network, tracing contacts in epidemic outbreaks, finding signaling pathways in the brain network, and recommending tours for tourists, among other. We present an algebraic algorithmic framework based on constrained multi\-linear sieving for solving the restless reachability problems we propose. In particular, parameterized by the length $k$ of a path sought, we show that the proposed problems can be solved in $O(2^k k m Δ)$ time and $O(n Δ)$ space, where $n$ is the number of vertices, $m$ the number of edges, and $Δ$ the maximum resting time of an input temporal graph. In addition, we prove that our algorithms for the restless reachability problems in vertex-colored temporal graphs are optimal under plausible complexity-theoretic assumptions. Finally, with an open-source implementation, we demonstrate that our algorithm scales to large graphs with up to one billion temporal edges, despite the problems being NP-hard. Specifically, we present extensive experiments to evaluate our scalability claims both on synthetic and real-world graphs. Our implementation is efficiently engineered and highly optimized.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了时间和顶点颜色时间图中等待时间限制下的一系列可达性问题。给定一个时间图和一组源顶点，我们找到可以通过尊重时间的路径从源到达的顶点集，其中连续边之间的时间戳差异至多是静止时间。给定一个顶点颜色的时间图和一个颜色的多集查询，我们找到可以通过一条尊重时间的路径从源到达的顶点集，使得该路径的顶点颜色与多集查询一致，并且连续边之间的时间戳差异至多是一个休息时间。此类问题可应用于了解疾病在网络中的传播、追踪流行病爆发中的接触者、寻找大脑网络中的信号通路以及为游客推荐旅游等。我们提出了一种基于约束多线性筛选的代数算法框架，用于解决我们提出的不安定可达性问题。特别是，通过所寻求路径的长度 $k$ 进行参数化，我们表明所提出的问题可以在 $O(2^k k m Δ)$ 时间和 $O(n Δ)$ 空间中解决，其中 $n$ 是顶点数，$m$ 是边数，$Δ$ 是输入时间图的最大静止时间。此外，我们证明，在合理的复杂性理论假设下，我们针对顶点彩色时间图中的不安可达性问题的算法是最优的。最后，通过开源实现，我们证明了我们的算法可以扩展到具有多达 10 亿个时间边的大型图，尽管问题是 NP 困难的。具体来说，我们提出了广泛的实验来评估我们在合成图和真实世界图上的可扩展性声明。我们的实施经过高效设计和高度优化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在时间图和顶点着色时间图中，考虑等待时间限制的可达性问题，提出了基于约束多线性筛的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 此类问题在疾病传播、接触追踪、脑网络信号路径分析及旅游推荐等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 提出一种基于约束多线性筛的代数算法框架，参数化路径长度k，时间复杂度为O(2^k k m Δ)，空间复杂度为O(n Δ)。
AI.result: 算法在顶点着色时间图中达到理论最优，并通过开源实现验证了其在包含十亿条边的大型图上的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证理论最优性的同时，通过高效工程实现克服了NP难问题的计算挑战，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xiao Liu,Jiajie Zhang,Siting Li,Zuotong Wu,Yang Yu
title: Difference-in-Differences: Bridging Normalization and Disentanglement in PG-GAN
title_zh: 双重差分：PG-GAN 中的桥接标准化和解缠结
abstract: What mechanisms causes GAN's entanglement? Although developing disentangled GAN has attracted sufficient attention, it is unclear how entanglement is originated by GAN transformation. We in this research propose a difference-in-difference (DID) counterfactual framework to design experiments for analyzing the entanglement mechanism in on of the Progressive-growing GAN (PG-GAN). Our experiment clarify the mechanisms how pixel normalization causes PG-GAN entanglement during a input-unit-ablation transformation. We discover that pixel normalization causes object entanglement by in-painting the area occupied by ablated objects. We also discover the unit-object relation determines whether and how pixel normalization causes objects entanglement. Our DID framework theoretically guarantees that the mechanisms that we discover is solid, explainable and comprehensively.
summary: What mechanisms causes GAN's entanglement? Although developing disentangled GAN has attracted sufficient attention, it is unclear how entanglement is originated by GAN transformation. We in this research propose a difference-in-difference (DID) counterfactual framework to design experiments for analyzing the entanglement mechanism in on of the Progressive-growing GAN (PG-GAN). Our experiment clarify the mechanisms how pixel normalization causes PG-GAN entanglement during a input-unit-ablation transformation. We discover that pixel normalization causes object entanglement by in-painting the area occupied by ablated objects. We also discover the unit-object relation determines whether and how pixel normalization causes objects entanglement. Our DID framework theoretically guarantees that the mechanisms that we discover is solid, explainable and comprehensively.
abstract_zh: 哪些机制导致了GAN的纠缠？尽管开发解纠缠的 GAN 已经引起了足够的关注，但目前尚不清楚纠缠是如何通过 GAN 变换产生的。我们在这项研究中提出了一种双重差分（DID）反事实框架来设计实验来分析渐进式增长 GAN（PG-GAN）中的纠缠机制。我们的实验阐明了像素归一化在输入单元消融变换期间如何导致 PG-GAN 纠缠的机制。我们发现像素归一化通过修复被烧蚀对象占据的区域而导致对象纠缠。我们还发现单位-对象关系决定了像素归一化是否以及如何导致对象纠缠。我们的DID框架从理论上保证了我们发现的机制是可靠的、可解释的和全面的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于差异-in-差异（DID）的反事实框架，用于分析PG-GAN中像素归一化导致的物体纠缠机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管解耦GAN已受关注，但GAN变换中纠缠的起源尚不明确，需探索其机制以改进模型。
AI.method: 采用差异-in-差异（DID）框架设计实验，通过输入单元消融变换分析像素归一化对物体纠缠的影响。
AI.result: 发现像素归一化通过修复消融区域导致物体纠缠，且单元-物体关系影响纠缠的发生与程度。
AI.conclusion: DID框架理论保证了发现的机制稳固、可解释且全面，为改进GAN解耦提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Karol Arndt,Ali Ghadirzadeh,Murtaza Hazara,Ville Kyrki
title: Few-shot model-based adaptation in noisy conditions
title_zh: 噪声条件下基于少样本模型的自适应
abstract: Few-shot adaptation is a challenging problem in the context of simulation-to-real transfer in robotics, requiring safe and informative data collection. In physical systems, additional challenge may be posed by domain noise, which is present in virtually all real-world applications. In this paper, we propose to perform few-shot adaptation of dynamics models in noisy conditions using an uncertainty-aware Kalman filter-based neural network architecture. We show that the proposed method, which explicitly addresses domain noise, improves few-shot adaptation error over a blackbox adaptation LSTM baseline, and over a model-free on-policy reinforcement learning approach, which tries to learn an adaptable and informative policy at the same time. The proposed method also allows for system analysis by analyzing hidden states of the model during and after adaptation.

The proposed method also allows for system analysis by analyzing hidden states of the model during and after adaptation.
abstract_zh: 在机器人技术的模拟到真实转换的背景下，少镜头适应是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要安全且信息丰富的数据收集。在物理系统中，域噪声可能会带来额外的挑战，几乎所有现实应用中都存在域噪声。在本文中，我们建议使用基于不确定性的卡尔曼滤波器神经网络架构在噪声条件下对动力学模型进行几次适应。我们表明，所提出的方法明确地解决了域噪声，在黑盒适应 LSTM 基线和无模型的策略强化学习方法（试图同时学习适应性和信息丰富的策略）上改善了少样本适应误差。所提出的方法还允许通过分析适应期间和之后模型的隐藏状态来进行系统分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在噪声条件下基于模型的少样本适应方法，通过不确定性感知的卡尔曼滤波神经网络提升机器人系统的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 仿真到现实的迁移中，物理系统的领域噪声普遍存在，传统方法难以兼顾安全性和数据效率，亟需应对噪声干扰的适应方案。
AI.method: 设计融合不确定性感知机制的卡尔曼滤波神经网络架构，显式建模领域噪声并优化动态模型适应过程。
AI.result: 在少样本适应任务中，该方法较LSTM基线和无模型强化学习方法显著降低适应误差，并支持通过分析隐藏状态进行系统诊断。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过显式处理噪声提升了少样本适应性能，为复杂现实场景下的模型适应提供了可解释的分析框架。

authors_text: Cuican Yu,Zihui Zhang,Huibin Li
title: Reconstructing A Large Scale 3D Face Dataset for Deep 3D Face Identification
title_zh: 重建大规模 3D 人脸数据集以进行深度 3D 人脸识别
comment: we want to re-organize this paper
comments: we want to re-organize this paper
abstract: Deep learning methods have brought many breakthroughs to computer vision, especially in 2D face recognition. However, the bottleneck of deep learning based 3D face recognition is that it is difficult to collect millions of 3D faces, whether for industry or academia. In view of this situation, there are many methods to generate more 3D faces from existing 3D faces through 3D face data augmentation, which are used to train deep 3D face recognition models. However, to the best of our knowledge, there is no method to generate 3D faces from 2D face images for training deep 3D face recognition models. This letter focuses on the role of reconstructed 3D facial surfaces in 3D face identification and proposes a framework of 2D-aided deep 3D face identification. In particular, we propose to reconstruct millions of 3D face scans from a large scale 2D face database (i.e.VGGFace2), using a deep learning based 3D face reconstruction method (i.e.ExpNet). Then, we adopt a two-phase training approach: In the first phase, we use millions of face images to pre-train the deep convolutional neural network (DCNN), and in the second phase, we use normal component images (NCI) of reconstructed 3D face scans to train the DCNN. Extensive experimental results illustrate that the proposed approach can greatly improve the rank-1 score of 3D face identification on the FRGC v2.0, the Bosphorus, and the BU-3DFE 3D face databases, compared to the model trained by 2D face images. Finally, our proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art rank-1 scores on the FRGC v2.0 (97.6%), Bosphorus (98.4%), and BU-3DFE (98.8%) databases. The experimental results show that the reconstructed 3D facial surfaces are useful and our 2D-aided deep 3D face identification framework is meaningful, facing the scarcity of 3D faces.

This letter focuses on the role of reconstructed 3D facial surfaces in 3D face identification and proposes a framework of 2D-aided deep 3D face identification. In particular, we propose to reconstruct millions of 3D face scans from a large scale 2D face database (i.e.VGGFace2), using a deep learning based 3D face reconstruction method (i.e.ExpNet). Then, we adopt a two-phase training approach: In the first phase, we use millions of face images to pre-train the deep convolutional neural network (DCNN), and in the second phase, we use normal component images (NCI) of reconstructed 3D face scans to train the DCNN. Extensive experimental results illustrate that the proposed approach can greatly improve the rank-1 score of 3D face identification on the FRGC v2.0, the Bosphorus, and the BU-3DFE 3D face databases, compared to the model trained by 2D face images. abstract_zh: 深度学习方法给计算机视觉带来了许多突破，特别是在2D人脸识别方面。然而，基于深度学习的3D人脸识别的瓶颈在于，无论是工业界还是学术界，都很难收集到数百万张3D人脸。鉴于这种情况，有很多方法可以通过3D人脸数据增强从现有3D人脸生成更多3D人脸，用于训练深度3D人脸识别模型。然而，据我们所知，尚无方法从 2D 人脸图像生成 3D 人脸来训练深度 3D 人脸识别模型。这封信重点讨论了重建 3D 面部表面在 3D 人脸识别中的作用，并提出了 2D 辅助深度 3D 人脸识别的框架。特别是，我们建议使用基于深度学习的 3D 人脸重建方法（即 ExpNet）从大型 2D 人脸数据库（即 VGGFace2）重建数百万个 3D 人脸扫描。然后，我们采用两阶段训练方法：在第一阶段，我们使用数百万张人脸图像来预训练深度卷积神经网络（DCNN），在第二阶段，我们使用重建的3D人脸扫描的法向分量图像（NCI）来训练DCNN。大量的实验结果表明，与2D人脸图像训练的模型相比，所提出的方法可以极大地提高FRGC v2.0、Bosphorus和BU-3DFE 3D人脸数据库上3D人脸识别的Rank-1分数。最后，我们提出的方法在 FRGC v2.0 (97.6%)、博斯普鲁斯海峡 (98.4%) 和 BU-3DFE (98.8%) 数据库上实现了最先进的 1 级分数。实验结果表明，面对 3D 人脸的稀缺性，重建的 3D 人脸表面是有用的，我们的 2D 辅助深度 3D 人脸识别框架是有意义的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于2D图像辅助的深度3D人脸识别框架，通过重建大规模3D人脸数据集以解决3D人脸识别中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在2D人脸识别中取得显著进展，但3D人脸识别因3D数据采集困难而进展缓慢，现有方法无法从2D图像生成3D人脸用于训练。
AI.method: 利用ExpNet模型从大规模2D人脸数据库VGGFace2重建数百万张3D人脸扫描数据，并采用两阶段训练方法：第一阶段用2D图像预训练DCNN，第二阶段用重建的3D人脸法线图训练模型。
AI.result: 在FRGC v2.0、Bosphorus和BU-3DFE数据库上分别达到97.6%、98.4%和98.8%的rank-1识别率，优于传统2D图像训练模型，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 重建的3D人脸表面信息对提升3D人脸识别性能具有重要意义，提出的2D辅助框架有效缓解了3D数据稀缺问题。

authors_text: Eleni Bohacek,Andrew J. Coates,David R. Selviah
title: Volumetric Calculation of Quantization Error in 3-D Vision Systems
title_zh: 3D 视觉系统中量化误差的体积计算
comment: As submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence on 4th September 2020
comments: As submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence on 4th September 2020
abstract: This paper investigates how the inherent quantization of camera sensors introduces uncertainty in the calculated position of an observed feature during 3-D mapping. It is typically assumed that pixels and scene features are points, however, a pixel is a two-dimensional area that maps onto multiple points in the scene. This uncertainty region is a bound for quantization error in the calculated point positions. Earlier studies calculated the volume of two intersecting pixel views, approximated as a cuboid, by projecting pyramids and cones from the pixels into the scene. In this paper, we reverse this approach by generating an array of scene points and calculating which scene points are detected by which pixel in each camera. This enables us to map the uncertainty regions for every pixel correspondence for a given camera system in one calculation, without approximating the complex shapes. The dependence of the volumes of the uncertainty regions on camera baseline length, focal length, pixel size, and distance to object, shows that earlier studies overestimated the quantization error by at least a factor of two. For static camera systems the method can also be used to determine volumetric scene geometry without the need to calculate disparity maps.
summary: This paper investigates how the inherent quantization of camera sensors introduces uncertainty in the calculated position of an observed feature during 3-D mapping. It is typically assumed that pixels and scene features are points, however, a pixel is a two-dimensional area that maps onto multiple points in the scene. This uncertainty region is a bound for quantization error in the calculated point positions. Earlier studies calculated the volume of two intersecting pixel views, approximated as a cuboid, by projecting pyramids and cones from the pixels into the scene. In this paper, we reverse this approach by generating an array of scene points and calculating which scene points are detected by which pixel in each camera. This enables us to map the uncertainty regions for every pixel correspondence for a given camera system in one calculation, without approximating the complex shapes. The dependence of the volumes of the uncertainty regions on camera baseline length, focal length, pixel size, and distance to object, shows that earlier studies overestimated the quantization error by at least a factor of two. For static camera systems the method can also be used to determine volumetric scene geometry without the need to calculate disparity maps.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了相机传感器的固有量化如何在 3D 映射过程中给观察到的特征的计算位置带来不确定性。通常假设像素和场景特征是点，然而，像素是映射到场景中的多个点的二维区域。该不确定性区域是计算点位置中量化误差的界限。早期的研究通过将金字塔和圆锥体从像素投影到场景中来计算两个相交像素视图（近似为长方体）的体积。在本文中，我们通过生成场景点数组并计算每个相机中的哪个像素检测到哪些场景点来反转这种方法。这使我们能够在一次计算中映射给定相机系统的每个像素对应的不确定区域，而无需近似复杂的形状。不确定区域的体积对相机基线长度、焦距、像素大小和到物体的距离的依赖性表明，早期的研究高估了量化误差至少两倍。对于静态相机系统，该方法还可用于确定体积场景几何形状，而无需计算视差图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了3D视觉系统中相机传感器量化误差对特征位置计算不确定性的影响，并提出了一种更精确的体积计算方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过投影锥体或棱柱近似计算量化误差体积，但存在至少两倍的高估问题，需更精确的不确定性区域计算方法。
AI.method: 通过生成场景点数组并计算每个像素检测到的场景点，直接映射像素对应关系的不确定性区域，避免复杂形状近似。
AI.result: 发现不确定性区域体积与相机基线、焦距、像素尺寸及物体距离相关，证明传统方法高估误差至少两倍；静态系统可无需视差图直接计算场景几何。
AI.conclusion: 新方法提高了量化误差计算精度，为3D建图和静态场景几何分析提供了更可靠的理论基础。

search_text: Volumetric Calculation of Quantization Error in 3-D Vision Systems 3D 视觉系统中量化误差的体积计算 This paper investigates how the inherent quantization of camera sensors introduces uncertainty in the calculated position of an observed feature during 3-D mapping. It is typically assumed that pixels and scene features are points, however, a pixel is a two-dimensional area that maps onto multiple points in the scene. This uncertainty region is a bound for quantization error in the calculated point positions. Earlier studies calculated the volume of two intersecting pixel views, approximated as a cuboid, by projecting pyramids and cones from the pixels into the scene. In this paper, we reverse this approach by generating an array of scene points and calculating which scene points are detected by which pixel in each camera. This enables us to map the uncertainty regions for every pixel correspondence for a given camera system in one calculation, without approximating the complex shapes. The dependence of the volumes of the uncertainty regions on camera baseline length, focal length, pixel size, and distance to object, shows that earlier studies overestimated the quantization error by at least a factor of two. For static camera systems the method can also be used to determine volumetric scene geometry without the need to calculate disparity maps. 本文研究了相机传感器的固有量化如何在 3D 映射过程中给观察到的特征的计算位置带来不确定性。通常假设像素和场景特征是点，然而，像素是映射到场景中的多个点的二维区域。该不确定性区域是计算点位置中量化误差的界限。早期的研究通过将金字塔和圆锥体从像素投影到场景中来计算两个相交像素视图（近似为长方体）的体积。在本文中，我们通过生成场景点数组并计算每个相机中的哪个像素检测到哪些场景点来反转这种方法。这使我们能够在一次计算中映射给定相机系统的每个像素对应的不确定区域，而无需近似复杂的形状。不确定区域的体积对相机基线长度、焦距、像素大小和到物体的距离的依赖性表明，早期的研究高估了量化误差至少两倍。对于静态相机系统，该方法还可用于确定体积场景几何形状，而无需计算视差图。 本文研究了3D视觉系统中相机传感器量化误差对特征位置计算不确定性的影响，并提出了一种更精确的体积计算方法。 Eleni Bohacek,Andrew J. Coates,David R. Selviah cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Juan Luis Gonzalo,Camilla Colombo,Pierluigi Di Lizia
title: Introducing MISS, a new tool for collision avoidance analysis and design
title_zh: 介绍 MISS，一种用于防撞分析和设计的新工具
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. Preprint of article published in Journal of Space Safety Engineering
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures. Preprint of article published in Journal of Space Safety Engineering
abstract: The core aspects and latest developments of Manoeuvre Intelligence for Space Safety (MISS), a new software tool for collision avoidance analysis and design, are presented. The tool leverages analytical and semi-analytical methods for the efficient modelling of the orbit modifications due to different control strategies, such as impulsive or low-thrust manoeuvres, and maps them into displacements at the nominal close approach using relative motion equations. B-plane representations are then used to separate the phasing-related and geometry-related components of the displacement. Both maximum miss distance and minimum collision probability collision avoidance manoeuvres are considered. The tool also allows for the computation of state transition matrices and propagation of uncertainties. Several test cases are provided to assess the capabilities and performance of the tool.
summary: The core aspects and latest developments of Manoeuvre Intelligence for Space Safety (MISS), a new software tool for collision avoidance analysis and design, are presented. The tool leverages analytical and semi-analytical methods for the efficient modelling of the orbit modifications due to different control strategies, such as impulsive or low-thrust manoeuvres, and maps them into displacements at the nominal close approach using relative motion equations. B-plane representations are then used to separate the phasing-related and geometry-related components of the displacement. Both maximum miss distance and minimum collision probability collision avoidance manoeuvres are considered. The tool also allows for the computation of state transition matrices and propagation of uncertainties. Several test cases are provided to assess the capabilities and performance of the tool.
abstract_zh: 介绍了用于防撞分析和设计的新型软件工具——空间安全机动智能（MISS）的核心方面和最新进展。该工具利用解析和半解析方法对由于不同控制策略（例如脉冲或低推力操纵）引起的轨道修改进行有效建模，并使用相对运动方程将它们映射到标称近距离接近时的位移。然后使用 B 平面表示来分离位移的相位相关分量和几何相关分量。最大脱靶距离和最小碰撞概率避碰机动均被考虑。该工具还允许计算状态转换矩阵和不确定性的传播。提供了几个测试用例来评估该工具的功能和性能。

AI.tldr: 介绍用于碰撞避免分析和设计的新工具MISS
AI.motivation: 现有碰撞避免分析工具存在效率或全面性不足，需更高效建模方法及多策略支持
AI.method: 结合解析/半解析方法与B平面分析，建模轨道修改并分离相位/几何因素，计算状态转移矩阵及不确定性传播
AI.result: 通过测试案例验证了MISS在碰撞避免分析中的有效性与性能
AI.conclusion: MISS工具有效支持碰撞避免分析与设计，提升轨道安全评估效率

authors_text: Robert Geirhos,Kantharaju Narayanappa,Benjamin Mitzkus,Matthias Bethge,Felix A. Wichmann,Wieland Brendel
title: On the surprising similarities between supervised and self-supervised models
title_zh: 关于监督模型和自监督模型之间惊人的相似之处
abstract: How do humans learn to acquire a powerful, flexible and robust representation of objects? While much of this process remains unknown, it is clear that humans do not require millions of object labels. Excitingly, recent algorithmic advancements in self-supervised learning now enable convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn useful visual object representations without supervised labels, too. In the light of this recent breakthrough, we here compare self-supervised networks to supervised models and human behaviour. We tested models on 15 generalisation datasets for which large-scale human behavioural data is available (130K highly controlled psychophysical trials). Surprisingly, current self-supervised CNNs share four key characteristics of their supervised counterparts: (1.) relatively poor noise robustness (with the notable exception of SimCLR), (2.) non-human category-level error patterns, (3.) non-human image-level error patterns (yet high similarity to supervised model errors) and (4.) a bias towards texture. Taken together, these results suggest that the strategies learned through today's supervised and self-supervised training objectives end up being surprisingly similar, but distant from human-like behaviour. That being said, we are clearly just at the beginning of what could be called a self-supervised revolution of machine vision, and we are hopeful that future self-supervised models behave differently from supervised ones, and---perhaps---more similar to robust human object recognition.
summary: How do humans learn to acquire a powerful, flexible and robust representation of objects? While much of this process remains unknown, it is clear that humans do not require millions of object labels. Excitingly, recent algorithmic advancements in self-supervised learning now enable convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn useful visual object representations without supervised labels, too. In the light of this recent breakthrough, we here compare self-supervised networks to supervised models and human behaviour. We tested models on 15 generalisation datasets for which large-scale human behavioural data is available (130K highly controlled psychophysical trials). Surprisingly, current self-supervised CNNs share four key characteristics of their supervised counterparts: (1.) relatively poor noise robustness (with the notable exception of SimCLR), (2.) non-human category-level error patterns, (3.) non-human image-level error patterns (yet high similarity to supervised model errors) and (4.) a bias towards texture. Taken together, these results suggest that the strategies learned through today's supervised and self-supervised training objectives end up being surprisingly similar, but distant from human-like behaviour. That being said, we are clearly just at the beginning of what could be called a self-supervised revolution of machine vision, and we are hopeful that future self-supervised models behave differently from supervised ones, and---perhaps---more similar to robust human object recognition.
abstract_zh: 人类如何学习获得强大、灵活且鲁棒的对象表示？虽然这个过程的大部分内容仍然未知，但很明显人类不需要数百万个物体标签。令人兴奋的是，最近自监督学习算法的进步现在使得卷积神经网络（CNN）也能够在没有监督标签的情况下学习有用的视觉对象表示。鉴于最近的这一突破，我们在这里将自我监督网络与监督模型和人类行为进行比较。我们在 15 个可获取大规模人类行为数据的泛化数据集（13 万个高度受控的心理物理学试验）上测试了模型。令人惊讶的是，当前的自监督 CNN 与受监督的 CNN 具有四个关键特征：(1.) 相对较差的噪声鲁棒性（SimCLR 除外）、(2.) 非人类类别级错误模式、(3.) 非人类图像级错误模式（但与监督模型错误高度相似）和 (4.) 对纹理的偏见。总而言之，这些结果表明，通过当今的监督和自我监督训练目标学到的策略最终惊人地相似，但与人类行为相去甚远。话虽这么说，我们显然正处于所谓的机器视觉自监督革命的开始，我们希望未来的自监督模型的行为与监督模型不同，并且可能更类似于强大的人体识别。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了监督学习模型与自监督模型在视觉对象识别中的表现，并与人类行为数据进行对比，探讨其相似性与差异性。
AI.motivation: 人类无需大量标签即可学习到强大且鲁棒的对象表示，而自监督学习的最新进展使CNN也能在无监督标签下学习有效表示。作者旨在探究自监督模型是否能更接近人类的识别能力。
AI.method: 在包含13万次受控心理物理实验的15个泛化数据集上，对比自监督模型（如SimCLR）与监督模型的噪声鲁棒性、错误模式及纹理偏好等特性。
AI.result: 当前自监督模型与监督模型在噪声鲁棒性（SimCLR例外）、非人类类别级错误模式、非人类图像级错误模式（但与监督模型相似）及纹理偏好四方面高度相似，但均与人类行为存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前监督与自监督模型的训练目标导致策略相似但偏离人类认知；自监督学习可能引发机器视觉革命，未来模型或更接近人类对象识别能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文比较了监督学习模型与自监督模型在视觉对象识别中的表现，并与人类行为数据进行对比，探讨其相似性与差异性。

tldr: 本文比较了监督学习模型与自监督模型在视觉对象识别中的表现，并与人类行为数据进行对比，探讨其相似性与差异性。
motivation: 人类无需大量标签即可学习到强大且鲁棒的对象表示，而自监督学习的最新进展使CNN也能在无监督标签下学习有效表示。作者旨在探究自监督模型是否能更接近人类的识别能力。
method: 在包含13万次受控心理物理实验的15个泛化数据集上，对比自监督模型（如SimCLR）与监督模型的噪声鲁棒性、错误模式及纹理偏好等特性。
result: 当前自监督模型与监督模型在噪声鲁棒性（SimCLR例外）、非人类类别级错误模式、非人类图像级错误模式（但与监督模型相似）及纹理偏好四方面高度相似，但均与人类行为存在显著差异。
conclusion: 当前监督与自监督模型的训练目标导致策略相似但偏离人类认知；自监督学习可能引发机器视觉革命，未来模型或更接近人类对象识别能力。
search_text: On the surprising similarities between supervised and self-supervised models 关于监督模型和自监督模型之间惊人的相似之处 How do humans learn to acquire a powerful, flexible and robust representation of objects? While much of this process remains unknown, it is clear that humans do not require millions of object labels. Excitingly, recent algorithmic advancements in self-supervised learning now enable convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn useful visual object representations without supervised labels, too. In the light of this recent breakthrough, we here compare self-supervised networks to supervised models and human behaviour. We tested models on 15 generalisation datasets for which large-scale human behavioural data is available (130K highly controlled psychophysical trials). Surprisingly, current self-supervised CNNs share four key characteristics of their supervised counterparts: (1.) relatively poor noise robustness (with the notable exception of SimCLR), (2.) non-human category-level error patterns, (3.) non-human image-level error patterns (yet high similarity to supervised model errors) and (4.) a bias towards texture. Taken together, these results suggest that the strategies learned through today's supervised and self-supervised training objectives end up being surprisingly similar, but distant from human-like behaviour. That being said, we are clearly just at the beginning of what could be called a self-supervised revolution of machine vision, and we are hopeful that future self-supervised models behave differently from supervised ones, and---perhaps---more similar to robust human object recognition. 人类如何学习获得强大、灵活且鲁棒的对象表示？虽然这个过程的大部分内容仍然未知，但很明显人类不需要数百万个物体标签。令人兴奋的是，最近自监督学习算法的进步现在使得卷积神经网络（CNN）也能够在没有监督标签的情况下学习有用的视觉对象表示。鉴于最近的这一突破，我们在这里将自我监督网络与监督模型和人类行为进行比较。我们在 15 个可获取大规模人类行为数据的泛化数据集（13 万个高度受控的心理物理学试验）上测试了模型。令人惊讶的是，当前的自监督 CNN 与受监督的 CNN 具有四个关键特征：(1.) 相对较差的噪声鲁棒性（SimCLR 除外）、(2.) 非人类类别级错误模式、(3.) 非人类图像级错误模式（但与监督模型错误高度相似）和 (4.) 对纹理的偏见。总而言之，这些结果表明，通过当今的监督和自我监督训练目标学到的策略最终惊人地相似，但与人类行为相去甚远。话虽这么说，我们显然正处于所谓的机器视觉自监督革命的开始，我们希望未来的自监督模型的行为与监督模型不同，并且可能更类似于强大的人体识别。 本文比较了监督学习模型与自监督模型在视觉对象识别中的表现，并与人类行为数据进行对比，探讨其相似性与差异性。 Robert Geirhos,Kantharaju Narayanappa,Benjamin Mitzkus,Matthias Bethge,Felix A. Wichmann,Wieland Brendel cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Li Yuan,Yichen Zhou,Shuning Chang,Ziyuan Huang,Yunpeng Chen,Xuecheng Nie,Tao Wang,Jiashi Feng,Shuicheng Yan
title: Toward Accurate Person-level Action Recognition in Videos of Crowded Scenes
title_zh: 实现拥挤场景视频中准确的人物级动作识别
comment: 1'st Place in ACM Multimedia Grand Challenge: Human in Events, Track4: Person-level Action Recognition in Complex Events
comments: 1'st Place in ACM Multimedia Grand Challenge: Human in Events, Track4: Person-level Action Recognition in Complex Events
abstract: Detecting and recognizing human action in videos with crowded scenes is a challenging problem due to the complex environment and diversity events. Prior works always fail to deal with this problem in two aspects: (1) lacking utilizing information of the scenes; (2) lacking training data in the crowd and complex scenes. In this paper, we focus on improving spatio-temporal action recognition by fully-utilizing the information of scenes and collecting new data. A top-down strategy is used to overcome the limitations. Specifically, we adopt a strong human detector to detect the spatial location of each frame. We then apply action recognition models to learn the spatio-temporal information from video frames on both the HIE dataset and new data with diverse scenes from the internet, which can improve the generalization ability of our model. Besides, the scenes information is extracted by the semantic segmentation model to assistant the process. As a result, our method achieved an average 26.05 wf\_mAP (ranking 1st place in the ACM MM grand challenge 2020: Human in Events).
summary: Detecting and recognizing human action in videos with crowded scenes is a challenging problem due to the complex environment and diversity events. Prior works always fail to deal with this problem in two aspects: (1) lacking utilizing information of the scenes; (2) lacking training data in the crowd and complex scenes. In this paper, we focus on improving spatio-temporal action recognition by fully-utilizing the information of scenes and collecting new data. A top-down strategy is used to overcome the limitations. Specifically, we adopt a strong human detector to detect the spatial location of each frame. We then apply action recognition models to learn the spatio-temporal information from video frames on both the HIE dataset and new data with diverse scenes from the internet, which can improve the generalization ability of our model. Besides, the scenes information is extracted by the semantic segmentation model to assistant the process. As a result, our method achieved an average 26.05 wf\_mAP (ranking 1st place in the ACM MM grand challenge 2020: Human in Events).
abstract_zh: 由于复杂的环境和多样性的事件，检测和识别拥挤场景视频中的人体动作是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的作品在两个方面都未能解决这个问题：（1）缺乏对场景信息的利用； (2)缺乏人群、复杂场景的训练数据。在本文中，我们致力于通过充分利用场景信息和收集新数据来提高时空动作识别。采用自上而下的策略来克服这些限制。具体来说，我们采用强大的人体检测器来检测每一帧的空间位置。然后，我们应用动作识别模型从 HIE 数据集上的视频帧和来自互联网的不同场景的新数据中学习时空信息，这可以提高我们模型的泛化能力。此外，通过语义分割模型提取场景信息来辅助处理。结果，我们的方法平均获得了 26.05 wf\_mAP（在 2020 年 ACM MM 大挑战：人类事件中排名第一）。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用场景信息和收集新数据，提升拥挤场景中视频的人级动作识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在拥挤场景中动作识别效果不佳，主要因未充分利用场景信息且缺乏复杂场景的训练数据。
AI.method: 采用自上而下策略，结合强人体检测器定位空间位置，利用语义分割模型提取场景信息，并在多样化数据集上训练时空动作识别模型。
AI.result: 在ACM MM 2020挑战赛中取得26.05 wf_mAP成绩（排名第一）。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合场景信息与多样化数据训练，有效提升了模型在复杂拥挤场景中的动作识别泛化能力。

authors_text: Zhaowen Wang,Wei Zhang,Zhiming Wang
title: G-DARTS-A: Groups of Channel Parallel Sampling with Attention
title_zh: G-DARTS-A：带注意力的通道组并行采样
abstract: Differentiable Architecture Search (DARTS) provides a baseline for searching effective network architectures based gradient, but it is accompanied by huge computational overhead in searching and training network architecture. Recently, many novel works have improved DARTS. Particularly, Partially-Connected DARTS(PC-DARTS) proposed the partial channel sampling technique which achieved good results. In this work, we found that the backbone provided by DARTS is prone to overfitting. To mitigate this problem, we propose an approach named Group-DARTS with Attention (G-DARTS-A), using multiple groups of channels for searching. Inspired by the partially sampling strategy of PC-DARTS, we use groups channels to sample the super-network to perform a more efficient search while maintaining the relative integrity of the network information. In order to relieve the competition between channel groups and keep channel balance, we follow the attention mechanism in Squeeze-and-Excitation Network. Each group of channels shares defined weights thence they can provide different suggestion for searching. The searched architecture is more powerful and better adapted to different deployments. Specifically, by only using the attention module on DARTS we achieved an error rate of 2.82%/16.36% on CIFAR10/100 with 0.3GPU-days for search process on CIFAR10. Apply our G-DARTS-A to DARTS/PC-DARTS, an error rate of 2.57%/2.61% on CIFAR10 with 0.5/0.4 GPU-days is achieved.
summary: Differentiable Architecture Search (DARTS) provides a baseline for searching effective network architectures based gradient, but it is accompanied by huge computational overhead in searching and training network architecture. Recently, many novel works have improved DARTS. Particularly, Partially-Connected DARTS(PC-DARTS) proposed the partial channel sampling technique which achieved good results. In this work, we found that the backbone provided by DARTS is prone to overfitting. To mitigate this problem, we propose an approach named Group-DARTS with Attention (G-DARTS-A), using multiple groups of channels for searching. Inspired by the partially sampling strategy of PC-DARTS, we use groups channels to sample the super-network to perform a more efficient search while maintaining the relative integrity of the network information. In order to relieve the competition between channel groups and keep channel balance, we follow the attention mechanism in Squeeze-and-Excitation Network. Each group of channels shares defined weights thence they can provide different suggestion for searching. The searched architecture is more powerful and better adapted to different deployments. Specifically, by only using the attention module on DARTS we achieved an error rate of 2.82%/16.36% on CIFAR10/100 with 0.3GPU-days for search process on CIFAR10. Apply our G-DARTS-A to DARTS/PC-DARTS, an error rate of 2.57%/2.61% on CIFAR10 with 0.5/0.4 GPU-days is achieved.
abstract_zh: 可微架构搜索（DARTS）为搜索基于梯度的有效网络架构提供了基线，但它在搜索和训练网络架构时伴随着巨大的计算开销。最近，很多小说作品都对DARTS进行了改进。特别是部分连接DARTS(PC-DARTS)提出的部分通道采样技术取得了良好的效果。在这项工作中，我们发现 DARTS 提供的主干很容易出现过度拟合。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 Group-DARTS with Attention (G-DARTS-A) 的方法，使用多组通道进行搜索。受 PC-DARTS 部分采样策略的启发，我们使用组通道对超级网络进行采样，以执行更有效的搜索，同时保持网络信息的相对完整性。为了缓解通道组之间的竞争并保持通道平衡，我们在挤压和激励网络中遵循注意力机制。每组频道共享定义的权重，因此它们可以提供不同的搜索建议。搜索到的架构更强大，更能适应不同的部署。具体来说，仅在 DARTS 上使用注意力模块，我们在 CIFAR10/100 上实现了 2.82%/16.36% 的错误率，在 CIFAR10 上的搜索过程花费了 0.3GPU 天。将我们的 G-DARTS-A 应用于 DARTS/PC-DARTS，在 CIFAR10 上实现了 2.57%/2.61% 的错误率，0.5/0.4 GPU 天。

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-DARTS-A方法，通过分组通道并行采样与注意力机制优化网络架构搜索，降低计算开销并缓解过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: DARTS在搜索网络架构时存在计算开销大且易过拟合的问题，现有方法如PC-DARTS虽部分改进，但未充分解决通道组间竞争与信息完整性保持的矛盾。
AI.method: 采用多组通道分组采样策略，结合Squeeze-and-Excitation网络的注意力机制，通过共享权重实现通道平衡，提升搜索效率与网络适应性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100上分别达到2.82%/16.36%的错误率，搜索耗时仅需0.3 GPU-days；应用于DARTS/PC-DARTS时，CIFAR10错误率进一步降至2.57%/2.61%。
AI.conclusion: G-DARTS-A通过分组采样与注意力机制有效降低了计算成本与过拟合风险，生成的架构在不同部署场景中表现更优。

In this work, we found that the backbone provided by DARTS is prone to overfitting. To mitigate this problem, we propose an approach named Group-DARTS with Attention (G-DARTS-A), using multiple groups of channels for searching. Inspired by the partially sampling strategy of PC-DARTS, we use groups channels to sample the super-network to perform a more efficient search while maintaining the relative integrity of the network information. In order to relieve the competition between channel groups and keep channel balance, we follow the attention mechanism in Squeeze-and-Excitation Network. Each group of channels shares defined weights thence they can provide different suggestion for searching. The searched architecture is more powerful and better adapted to different deployments. Specifically, by only using the attention module on DARTS we achieved an error rate of 2.82%/16.36% on CIFAR10/100 with 0.3GPU-days for search process on CIFAR10. Apply our G-DARTS-A to DARTS/PC-DARTS, an error rate of 2.57%/2.61% on CIFAR10 with 0.5/0.4 GPU-days is achieved. 可微架构搜索（DARTS）为搜索基于梯度的有效网络架构提供了基线，但它在搜索和训练网络架构时伴随着巨大的计算开销。最近，很多小说作品都对DARTS进行了改进。特别是部分连接DARTS(PC-DARTS)提出的部分通道采样技术取得了良好的效果。在这项工作中，我们发现 DARTS 提供的主干很容易出现过度拟合。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 Group-DARTS with Attention (G-DARTS-A) 的方法，使用多组通道进行搜索。受 PC-DARTS 部分采样策略的启发，我们使用组通道对超级网络进行采样，以执行更有效的搜索，同时保持网络信息的相对完整性。为了缓解通道组之间的竞争并保持通道平衡，我们在挤压和激励网络中遵循注意力机制。每组频道共享定义的权重，因此它们可以提供不同的搜索建议。搜索到的架构更强大，更能适应不同的部署。具体来说，仅在 DARTS 上使用注意力模块，我们在 CIFAR10/100 上实现了 2.82%/16.36% 的错误率，在 CIFAR10 上的搜索过程花费了 0.3GPU 天。将我们的 G-DARTS-A 应用于 DARTS/PC-DARTS，在 CIFAR10 上实现了 2.57%/2.61% 的错误率，0.5/0.4 GPU 天。 本文提出G-DARTS-A方法，通过分组通道并行采样与注意力机制优化网络架构搜索，降低计算开销并缓解过拟合问题。 Zhaowen Wang,Wei Zhang,Zhiming Wang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yinhao Li,Yutaro Iwamoto,Lanfen Lin,Rui Xu,Yen-Wei Chen
title: VolumeNet: A Lightweight Parallel Network for Super-Resolution of Medical Volumetric Data
title_zh: VolumeNet：用于医疗体积数据超分辨率的轻量级并行网络
abstract: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) techniques have generally achieved excellent performance in the computer vision field. Recently, it has been proven that three-dimensional (3D) SR for medical volumetric data delivers better visual results than conventional two-dimensional (2D) processing. However, deepening and widening 3D networks increases training difficulty significantly due to the large number of parameters and small number of training samples. Thus, we propose a 3D convolutional neural network (CNN) for SR of medical volumetric data called ParallelNet using parallel connections. We construct a parallel connection structure based on the group convolution and feature aggregation to build a 3D CNN that is as wide as possible with few parameters. As a result, the model thoroughly learns more feature maps with larger receptive fields. In addition, to further improve accuracy, we present an efficient version of ParallelNet (called VolumeNet), which reduces the number of parameters and deepens ParallelNet using a proposed lightweight building block module called the Queue module. Unlike most lightweight CNNs based on depthwise convolutions, the Queue module is primarily constructed using separable 2D cross-channel convolutions. As a result, the number of network parameters and computational complexity can be reduced significantly while maintaining accuracy due to full channel fusion. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed VolumeNet significantly reduces the number of model parameters and achieves high precision results compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) techniques have generally achieved excellent performance in the computer vision field. Recently, it has been proven that three-dimensional (3D) SR for medical volumetric data delivers better visual results than conventional two-dimensional (2D) processing. However, deepening and widening 3D networks increases training difficulty significantly due to the large number of parameters and small number of training samples. Thus, we propose a 3D convolutional neural network (CNN) for SR of medical volumetric data called ParallelNet using parallel connections. We construct a parallel connection structure based on the group convolution and feature aggregation to build a 3D CNN that is as wide as possible with few parameters. As a result, the model thoroughly learns more feature maps with larger receptive fields. In addition, to further improve accuracy, we present an efficient version of ParallelNet (called VolumeNet), which reduces the number of parameters and deepens ParallelNet using a proposed lightweight building block module called the Queue module. Unlike most lightweight CNNs based on depthwise convolutions, the Queue module is primarily constructed using separable 2D cross-channel convolutions. As a result, the number of network parameters and computational complexity can be reduced significantly while maintaining accuracy due to full channel fusion. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed VolumeNet significantly reduces the number of model parameters and achieves high precision results compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的超分辨率（SR）技术在计算机视觉领域普遍取得了优异的性能。最近，事实证明，用于医学体积数据的三维 (3D) SR 比传统的二维 (2D) 处理能提供更好的视觉效果。然而，由于参数数量较多且训练样本数量较少，加深和拓宽3D网络显着增加了训练难度。因此，我们提出了一种用于医学体积数据 SR 的 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN)，称为 ParallelNet，使用并行连接。我们构建基于组卷积和特征聚合的并行连接结构，以构建尽可能宽且参数较少的 3D CNN。结果，模型彻底学习了更多具有更大感受野的特征图。此外，为了进一步提高准确性，我们提出了 ParallelNet 的高效版本（称为 VolumeNet），它减少了参数数量，并使用提出的轻量级构建块模块（称为 Queue 模块）加深了 ParallelNet。与大多数基于深度卷积的轻量级 CNN 不同，队列模块主要使用可分离的 2D 跨通道卷积构建。因此，由于全通道融合，可以显着减少网络参数的数量和计算复杂度，同时保持精度。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的 VolumeNet 显着减少了模型参数的数量并实现了高精度结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级并行网络VolumeNet，用于医学体积数据的超分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D超分辨率在医学影像中效果优于2D方法，但现有3D网络因参数量大、训练样本少导致训练困难，需设计更高效的网络结构。
AI.method: 通过组卷积和特征聚合构建并行连接结构，设计轻量级Queue模块（基于可分离2D跨通道卷积）减少参数量并加深网络。
AI.result: 实验表明VolumeNet显著减少模型参数，在保持精度的同时优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: VolumeNet通过并行结构与轻量化设计，在医学体积数据超分辨率任务中实现了参数效率与精度的平衡。

authors_text: Zhihao Cheng,Liu Liu,Aishan Liu,Hao Sun,Meng Fang,Dacheng Tao
title: On the Guaranteed Almost Equivalence between Imitation Learning from Observation and Demonstration
title_zh: 论观察模仿学习与示范学习之间保证几乎等价
abstract: Imitation learning from observation (LfO) is more preferable than imitation learning from demonstration (LfD) due to the nonnecessity of expert actions when reconstructing the expert policy from the expert data. However, previous studies imply that the performance of LfO is inferior to LfD by a tremendous gap, which makes it challenging to employ LfO in practice. By contrast, this paper proves that LfO is almost equivalent to LfD in the deterministic robot environment, and more generally even in the robot environment with bounded randomness. In the deterministic robot environment, from the perspective of the control theory, we show that the inverse dynamics disagreement between LfO and LfD approaches zero, meaning that LfO is almost equivalent to LfD. To further relax the deterministic constraint and better adapt to the practical environment, we consider bounded randomness in the robot environment and prove that the optimizing targets for both LfD and LfO remain almost same in the more generalized setting. Extensive experiments for multiple robot tasks are conducted to empirically demonstrate that LfO achieves comparable performance to LfD. In fact, most common robot systems in reality are the robot environment with bounded randomness (i.e., the environment this paper considered). Hence, our findings greatly extend the potential of LfO and suggest that we can safely apply LfO without sacrificing the performance compared to LfD in practice.
summary: Imitation learning from observation (LfO) is more preferable than imitation learning from demonstration (LfD) due to the nonnecessity of expert actions when reconstructing the expert policy from the expert data. However, previous studies imply that the performance of LfO is inferior to LfD by a tremendous gap, which makes it challenging to employ LfO in practice. By contrast, this paper proves that LfO is almost equivalent to LfD in the deterministic robot environment, and more generally even in the robot environment with bounded randomness. In the deterministic robot environment, from the perspective of the control theory, we show that the inverse dynamics disagreement between LfO and LfD approaches zero, meaning that LfO is almost equivalent to LfD. To further relax the deterministic constraint and better adapt to the practical environment, we consider bounded randomness in the robot environment and prove that the optimizing targets for both LfD and LfO remain almost same in the more generalized setting. Extensive experiments for multiple robot tasks are conducted to empirically demonstrate that LfO achieves comparable performance to LfD. In fact, most common robot systems in reality are the robot environment with bounded randomness (i.e., the environment this paper considered). Hence, our findings greatly extend the potential of LfO and suggest that we can safely apply LfO without sacrificing the performance compared to LfD in practice.
abstract_zh: 由于从专家数据重建专家策略时不需要专家行动，因此观察模仿学习（LfO）比示范模仿学习（LfD）更可取。然而，之前的研究表明，LfO 的性能与 LfD 相比存在巨大差距，这使得在实践中使用 LfO 具有挑战性。相比之下，本文证明了在确定性机器人环境中，甚至在有界随机性的机器人环境中，LfO 几乎等同于 LfD。在确定性机器人环境中，从控制理论的角度来看，我们表明LfO和LfD之间的逆动力学差异接近于零，这意味着LfO几乎等于LfD。为了进一步放宽确定性约束并更好地适应实际环境，我们考虑机器人环境中的有界随机性，并证明 LfD 和 LfO 的优化目标在更广义的设置中几乎保持相同。针对多个机器人任务进行了大量实验，以实证证明 LfO 实现了与 LfD 相当的性能。事实上，现实中最常见的机器人系统都是具有有限随机性的机器人环境（即本文考虑的环境）。因此，我们的研究结果极大地扩展了 LfO 的潜力，并表明我们可以安全地应用 LfO，而不会牺牲实践中与 LfD 相比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文证明在确定性机器人环境中，基于观察的模仿学习（LfO）与基于示范的模仿学习（LfD）几乎等价，并扩展到具有有界随机性的环境，实验验证了LfO的性能可与LfD媲美。
AI.motivation: LfO因无需专家动作而更受青睐，但此前研究认为其性能远逊于LfD，限制了实际应用。本文旨在证明LfO与LfD的等价性，以提升LfO的实用性。
AI.method: 从控制理论角度分析确定性环境下的逆动力学差异，证明其趋近于零；进一步考虑有界随机性环境，证明优化目标保持一致，并通过多任务实验验证理论结论。
AI.result: 实验表明LfO在多个机器人任务中性能与LfD相当，且现实中的机器人系统多属于有界随机性环境，支持理论分析。
AI.conclusion: LfO在确定性和有界随机性环境中与LfD几乎等价，可安全替代LfD而无需牺牲性能，显著拓展了LfO的应用潜力。

Extensive experiments for multiple robot tasks are conducted to empirically demonstrate that LfO achieves comparable performance to LfD. In fact, most common robot systems in reality are the robot environment with bounded randomness (i.e., the environment this paper considered). Hence, our findings greatly extend the potential of LfO and suggest that we can safely apply LfO without sacrificing the performance compared to LfD in practice. 由于从专家数据重建专家策略时不需要专家行动，因此观察模仿学习（LfO）比示范模仿学习（LfD）更可取。然而，之前的研究表明，LfO 的性能与 LfD 相比存在巨大差距，这使得在实践中使用 LfO 具有挑战性。相比之下，本文证明了在确定性机器人环境中，甚至在有界随机性的机器人环境中，LfO 几乎等同于 LfD。在确定性机器人环境中，从控制理论的角度来看，我们表明LfO和LfD之间的逆动力学差异接近于零，这意味着LfO几乎等于LfD。为了进一步放宽确定性约束并更好地适应实际环境，我们考虑机器人环境中的有界随机性，并证明 LfD 和 LfO 的优化目标在更广义的设置中几乎保持相同。针对多个机器人任务进行了大量实验，以实证证明 LfO 实现了与 LfD 相当的性能。事实上，现实中最常见的机器人系统都是具有有限随机性的机器人环境（即本文考虑的环境）。因此，我们的研究结果极大地扩展了 LfO 的潜力，并表明我们可以安全地应用 LfO，而不会牺牲实践中与 LfD 相比的性能。 本文证明在确定性机器人环境中，基于观察的模仿学习（LfO）与基于示范的模仿学习（LfD）几乎等价，并扩展到具有有界随机性的环境，实验验证了LfO的性能可与LfD媲美。 Zhihao Cheng,Liu Liu,Aishan Liu,Hao Sun,Meng Fang,Dacheng Tao cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Javier Hidalgo-Carrió,Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Learning Monocular Dense Depth from Events
title_zh: 从事件中学习单目密集深度
abstract: Event cameras are novel sensors that output brightness changes in the form of a stream of asynchronous events instead of intensity frames. Compared to conventional image sensors, they offer significant advantages: high temporal resolution, high dynamic range, no motion blur, and much lower bandwidth. Recently, learning-based approaches have been applied to event-based data, thus unlocking their potential and making significant progress in a variety of tasks, such as monocular depth prediction. Most existing approaches use standard feed-forward architectures to generate network predictions, which do not leverage the temporal consistency presents in the event stream. We propose a recurrent architecture to solve this task and show significant improvement over standard feed-forward methods. In particular, our method generates dense depth predictions using a monocular setup, which has not been shown previously. We pretrain our model using a new dataset containing events and depth maps recorded in the CARLA simulator. We test our method on the Multi Vehicle Stereo Event Camera Dataset (MVSEC). Quantitative experiments show up to 50% improvement in average depth error with respect to previous event-based methods.
summary: Event cameras are novel sensors that output brightness changes in the form of a stream of asynchronous events instead of intensity frames. Compared to conventional image sensors, they offer significant advantages: high temporal resolution, high dynamic range, no motion blur, and much lower bandwidth. Recently, learning-based approaches have been applied to event-based data, thus unlocking their potential and making significant progress in a variety of tasks, such as monocular depth prediction. Most existing approaches use standard feed-forward architectures to generate network predictions, which do not leverage the temporal consistency presents in the event stream. We propose a recurrent architecture to solve this task and show significant improvement over standard feed-forward methods. In particular, our method generates dense depth predictions using a monocular setup, which has not been shown previously. We pretrain our model using a new dataset containing events and depth maps recorded in the CARLA simulator. We test our method on the Multi Vehicle Stereo Event Camera Dataset (MVSEC). Quantitative experiments show up to 50% improvement in average depth error with respect to previous event-based methods.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是新颖的传感器，以异步事件流而不是强度帧的形式输出亮度变化。与传统图像传感器相比，它们具有显着的优势：高时间分辨率、高动态范围、无运动模糊以及低得多的带宽。最近，基于学习的方法已应用于基于事件的数据，从而释放了它们的潜力，并在单目深度预测等各种任务中取得了重大进展。大多数现有方法使用标准前馈架构来生成网络预测，这不利用事件流中存在的时间一致性。我们提出了一种循环架构来解决此任务，并显示出相对于标准前馈方法的显着改进。特别是，我们的方法使用单目设置生成密集的深度预测，这在之前尚未展示过。我们使用包含 CARLA 模拟器中记录的事件和深度图的新数据集来预训练我们的模型。我们在多车辆立体事件相机数据集（MVSEC）上测试我们的方法。定量实验表明，与之前基于事件的方法相比，平均深度误差提高了 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的单目密集深度预测方法，通过循环网络架构提升深度估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有事件相机深度预测方法未充分利用事件流的时间一致性，且尚未实现单目设置下的密集深度预测。
AI.method: 设计循环神经网络架构，结合CARLA模拟器生成的事件-深度数据集进行预训练，并在MVSEC数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在MVSEC数据集上实现平均深度误差较现有事件相机方法降低50%的提升。
AI.conclusion: 循环架构有效捕捉事件流时序特征，首次实现单目事件相机的密集深度预测，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Yichen Qian,Zhiyu Tan,Xiuyu Sun,Ming Lin,Dongyang Li,Zhenhong Sun,Hao Li,Rong Jin
title: Learning Accurate Entropy Model with Global Reference for Image Compression
title_zh: 学习具有图像压缩全局参考的精确熵模型
abstract: In recent deep image compression neural networks, the entropy model plays a critical role in estimating the prior distribution of deep image encodings. Existing methods combine hyperprior with local context in the entropy estimation function. This greatly limits their performance due to the absence of a global vision. In this work, we propose a novel Global Reference Model for image compression to effectively leverage both the local and the global context information, leading to an enhanced compression rate. The proposed method scans decoded latents and then finds the most relevant latent to assist the distribution estimating of the current latent. A by-product of this work is the innovation of a mean-shifting GDN module that further improves the performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the rate-distortion performance of most of the state-of-the-art methods in the industry.
summary: In recent deep image compression neural networks, the entropy model plays a critical role in estimating the prior distribution of deep image encodings. Existing methods combine hyperprior with local context in the entropy estimation function. This greatly limits their performance due to the absence of a global vision. In this work, we propose a novel Global Reference Model for image compression to effectively leverage both the local and the global context information, leading to an enhanced compression rate. The proposed method scans decoded latents and then finds the most relevant latent to assist the distribution estimating of the current latent. A by-product of this work is the innovation of a mean-shifting GDN module that further improves the performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the rate-distortion performance of most of the state-of-the-art methods in the industry.
abstract_zh: 在最近的深度图像压缩神经网络中，熵模型在估计深度图像编码的先验分布中起着至关重要的作用。现有方法将超先验与熵估计函数中的局部上下文相结合。由于缺乏全球视野，这极大地限制了他们的表现。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像压缩全局参考模型，以有效利用局部和全局上下文信息，从而提高压缩率。所提出的方法扫描解码的潜在变量，然后找到最相关的潜在变量来协助当前潜在变量的分布估计。这项工作的副产品是均值平移 GDN 模块的创新，进一步提高了性能。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于业内大多数最先进方法的率失真性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合全局与局部信息的熵模型，以提升图像压缩的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有图像压缩方法因缺乏全局视野，仅依赖局部上下文和超先验信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计全局参考模型，通过扫描已解码潜变量寻找相关性最强的参考变量，并引入均值偏移GDN模块优化分布估计。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在率失真性能上优于大多数现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合全局上下文信息及改进的GDN模块能有效提升图像压缩性能。

authors_text: Wei Huang,Yifan Zhou,Gaojie Jin,Youcheng Sun,Jie Meng,Fan Zhang,Xiaowei Huang
title: Formal Verification of Robustness and Resilience of Learning-Enabled State Estimation Systems
title_zh: 学习型状态估计系统的鲁棒性和弹性的形式验证
abstract: This paper presents a formal verification guided approach for a principled design and implementation of robust and resilient learning-enabled systems. We focus on learning-enabled state estimation systems (LE-SESs), which have been widely used in robotics applications to determine the current state (e.g., location, speed, direction, etc.) of a complex system. The LE-SESs are networked systems, composed of a set of connected components including: Bayes filters for state estimation, and neural networks for processing sensory input. We study LE-SESs from the perspective of formal verification, which determines the satisfiabilty of a system model against the specified properties. Over LE-SESs, we investigate two key properties -- robustness and resilience -- and provide their formal definitions. To enable formal verification, we reduce the LE-SESs to a novel class of labelled transition systems, named {PO}^2-LTS in the paper, and formally express the properties as constrained optimisation objectives. We prove that the verification problems are NP-complete. Based on {PO}^2-LTS and the optimisation objectives, practical verification algorithms are developed to check the satisfiability of the properties on the LE-SESs. As a major case study, we interrogate a real-world dynamic tracking system which uses a single Kalman Filter (KF) -- a special case of Bayes filter -- to localise and track a ground vehicle. Its perception system, based on convolutional neural networks, processes a high-resolution Wide Area Motion Imagery (WAMI) data stream. Experimental results show that our algorithms can not only verify the properties of the WAMI tracking system but also provide representative examples, the latter of which inspired us to take an enhanced LE-SESs design where runtime monitors or joint-KFs are required. Experimental results confirm the improvement in the robustness of the enhanced design.
summary: This paper presents a formal verification guided approach for a principled design and implementation of robust and resilient learning-enabled systems. We focus on learning-enabled state estimation systems (LE-SESs), which have been widely used in robotics applications to determine the current state (e.g., location, speed, direction, etc.) of a complex system. The LE-SESs are networked systems, composed of a set of connected components including: Bayes filters for state estimation, and neural networks for processing sensory input. We study LE-SESs from the perspective of formal verification, which determines the satisfiabilty of a system model against the specified properties. Over LE-SESs, we investigate two key properties -- robustness and resilience -- and provide their formal definitions. To enable formal verification, we reduce the LE-SESs to a novel class of labelled transition systems, named {PO}^2-LTS in the paper, and formally express the properties as constrained optimisation objectives. We prove that the verification problems are NP-complete. Based on {PO}^2-LTS and the optimisation objectives, practical verification algorithms are developed to check the satisfiability of the properties on the LE-SESs. As a major case study, we interrogate a real-world dynamic tracking system which uses a single Kalman Filter (KF) -- a special case of Bayes filter -- to localise and track a ground vehicle. Its perception system, based on convolutional neural networks, processes a high-resolution Wide Area Motion Imagery (WAMI) data stream. Experimental results show that our algorithms can not only verify the properties of the WAMI tracking system but also provide representative examples, the latter of which inspired us to take an enhanced LE-SESs design where runtime monitors or joint-KFs are required. Experimental results confirm the improvement in the robustness of the enhanced design.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种形式验证引导方法，用于稳健且有弹性的学习系统的原则设计和实现。我们专注于支持学习的状态估计系统（LE-SES），该系统已广泛应用于机器人应用中，以确定复杂系统的当前状态（例如位置、速度、方向等）。 LE-SES 是网络系统，由一组连接的组件组成，包括：用于状态估计的贝叶斯滤波器和用于处理感官输入的神经网络。我们从形式验证的角度研究 LE-SES，形式验证决定了系统模型对指定属性的可满足性。在 LE-SES 上，我们研究了两个关键属性——稳健性和弹性——并提供了它们的正式定义。为了实现形式验证，我们将 LE-SES 简化为一类新型标记转换系统，在论文中命名为 {PO}^2-LTS，并将这些属性正式表达为约束优化目标。我们证明验证问题是NP完全的。基于{PO}^2-LTS和优化目标，开发了实用的验证算法来检查LE-SES上的属性的可满足性。作为一个主要案例研究，我们研究了一个现实世界的动态跟踪系统，该系统使用单个卡尔曼滤波器（KF）（贝叶斯滤波器的一种特殊情况）来定位和跟踪地面车辆。其基于卷积神经网络的感知系统可处理高分辨率广域运动图像（WAMI）数据流。实验结果表明，我们的算法不仅可以验证 WAMI 跟踪系统的属性，还可以提供代表性示例，后者启发我们在需要运行时监视器或联合 KF 的情况下采用增强的 LE-SES 设计。实验结果证实了增强设计的稳健性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种形式化验证方法，用于确保学习赋能状态估计系统（LE-SESs）的鲁棒性与弹性。
AI.motivation: 现有LE-SESs在复杂动态环境中易受干扰，缺乏系统性验证方法以保障其鲁棒性和弹性。
AI.method: 将LE-SESs建模为新型标记转换系统（PO²-LTS），通过约束优化目标形式化定义鲁棒性与弹性，并开发NP完全问题求解算法进行验证。
AI.result: 验证算法成功分析了WAMI车辆跟踪系统，发现其缺陷并提出增强设计（如联合卡尔曼滤波器），实验确认鲁棒性提升。
AI.conclusion: 形式化验证框架可有效评估LE-SESs安全性，为设计可靠学习系统提供理论指导与改进方向。

search_text: Formal Verification of Robustness and Resilience of Learning-Enabled State Estimation Systems 学习型状态估计系统的鲁棒性和弹性的形式验证 This paper presents a formal verification guided approach for a principled design and implementation of robust and resilient learning-enabled systems. We focus on learning-enabled state estimation systems (LE-SESs), which have been widely used in robotics applications to determine the current state (e.g., location, speed, direction, etc.) of a complex system. The LE-SESs are networked systems, composed of a set of connected components including: Bayes filters for state estimation, and neural networks for processing sensory input. We study LE-SESs from the perspective of formal verification, which determines the satisfiabilty of a system model against the specified properties. Over LE-SESs, we investigate two key properties -- robustness and resilience -- and provide their formal definitions. To enable formal verification, we reduce the LE-SESs to a novel class of labelled transition systems, named {PO}^2-LTS in the paper, and formally express the properties as constrained optimisation objectives. We prove that the verification problems are NP-complete. Based on {PO}^2-LTS and the optimisation objectives, practical verification algorithms are developed to check the satisfiability of the properties on the LE-SESs. As a major case study, we interrogate a real-world dynamic tracking system which uses a single Kalman Filter (KF) -- a special case of Bayes filter -- to localise and track a ground vehicle. Its perception system, based on convolutional neural networks, processes a high-resolution Wide Area Motion Imagery (WAMI) data stream. Experimental results show that our algorithms can not only verify the properties of the WAMI tracking system but also provide representative examples, the latter of which inspired us to take an enhanced LE-SESs design where runtime monitors or joint-KFs are required. Experimental results confirm the improvement in the robustness of the enhanced design. 本文提出了一种形式验证引导方法，用于稳健且有弹性的学习系统的原则设计和实现。我们专注于支持学习的状态估计系统（LE-SES），该系统已广泛应用于机器人应用中，以确定复杂系统的当前状态（例如位置、速度、方向等）。 LE-SES 是网络系统，由一组连接的组件组成，包括：用于状态估计的贝叶斯滤波器和用于处理感官输入的神经网络。我们从形式验证的角度研究 LE-SES，形式验证决定了系统模型对指定属性的可满足性。在 LE-SES 上，我们研究了两个关键属性——稳健性和弹性——并提供了它们的正式定义。为了实现形式验证，我们将 LE-SES 简化为一类新型标记转换系统，在论文中命名为 {PO}^2-LTS，并将这些属性正式表达为约束优化目标。我们证明验证问题是NP完全的。基于{PO}^2-LTS和优化目标，开发了实用的验证算法来检查LE-SES上的属性的可满足性。作为一个主要案例研究，我们研究了一个现实世界的动态跟踪系统，该系统使用单个卡尔曼滤波器（KF）（贝叶斯滤波器的一种特殊情况）来定位和跟踪地面车辆。其基于卷积神经网络的感知系统可处理高分辨率广域运动图像（WAMI）数据流。实验结果表明，我们的算法不仅可以验证 WAMI 跟踪系统的属性，还可以提供代表性示例，后者启发我们在需要运行时监视器或联合 KF 的情况下采用增强的 LE-SES 设计。实验结果证实了增强设计的稳健性的提高。 本文提出一种形式化验证方法，用于确保学习赋能状态估计系统（LE-SESs）的鲁棒性与弹性。 Wei Huang,Yifan Zhou,Gaojie Jin,Youcheng Sun,Jie Meng,Fan Zhang,Xiaowei Huang cs.RO,cs.CR

authors_text: David Gillsjö,Kalle Åström
title: In Depth Bayesian Semantic Scene Completion
title_zh: 深入贝叶斯语义场景完成
abstract: This work studies Semantic Scene Completion which aims to predict a 3D semantic segmentation of our surroundings, even though some areas are occluded. For this we construct a Bayesian Convolutional Neural Network (BCNN), which is not only able to perform the segmentation, but also predict model uncertainty. This is an important feature not present in standard CNNs. We show on the MNIST dataset that the Bayesian approach performs equal or better to the standard CNN when processing digits unseen in the training phase when looking at accuracy, precision and recall. With the added benefit of having better calibrated scores and the ability to express model uncertainty. We then show results for the Semantic Scene Completion task where a category is introduced at test time on the SUNCG dataset. In this more complex task the Bayesian approach outperforms the standard CNN. Showing better Intersection over Union score and excels in Average Precision and separation scores.
summary: This work studies Semantic Scene Completion which aims to predict a 3D semantic segmentation of our surroundings, even though some areas are occluded. For this we construct a Bayesian Convolutional Neural Network (BCNN), which is not only able to perform the segmentation, but also predict model uncertainty. This is an important feature not present in standard CNNs. We show on the MNIST dataset that the Bayesian approach performs equal or better to the standard CNN when processing digits unseen in the training phase when looking at accuracy, precision and recall. With the added benefit of having better calibrated scores and the ability to express model uncertainty. We then show results for the Semantic Scene Completion task where a category is introduced at test time on the SUNCG dataset. In this more complex task the Bayesian approach outperforms the standard CNN. Showing better Intersection over Union score and excels in Average Precision and separation scores.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究语义场景完成，旨在预测我们周围环境的 3D 语义分割，即使某些区域被遮挡。为此，我们构建了一个贝叶斯卷积神经网络（BCNN），它不仅能够执行分割，还能预测模型的不确定性。这是标准 CNN 中不存在的一个重要特征。我们在 MNIST 数据集上表明，在处理训练阶段未见过的数字时，从准确性、精确度和召回率来看，贝叶斯方法的表现与标准 CNN 相同或更好。具有更好的校准分数和表达模型不确定性的能力的额外好处。然后，我们显示语义场景完成任务的结果，其中在 SUNCG 数据集上的测试时引入了一个类别。在这个更复杂的任务中，贝叶斯方法优于标准 CNN。显示出比联合分数更好的交集，并且在平均精度和分离分数方面表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语义场景补全任务，提出贝叶斯卷积神经网络（BCNN）以实现3D语义分割并预测模型不确定性。
AI.motivation: 标准卷积神经网络无法量化预测不确定性，而语义场景补全需处理遮挡区域，贝叶斯方法可提供不确定性估计以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯卷积神经网络（BCNN），通过概率建模实现3D语义分割，同时输出模型预测的不确定性。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上，BCNN在未见过的数字测试中表现优于或等于标准CNN；在SUNCG数据集的语义场景补全任务中，交并比、平均精度和分离分数均优于标准CNN。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法在语义场景补全中优于传统CNN，尤其在处理新类别和不确定性估计方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Daehoon Gwak,Gyuhyeon Sim,Michael Poli,Stefano Massaroli,Jaegul Choo,Edward Choi
title: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Intervention Modeling
title_zh: 用于干预建模的神经常微分方程
abstract: By interpreting the forward dynamics of the latent representation of neural networks as an ordinary differential equation, Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (Neural ODE) emerged as an effective framework for modeling a system dynamics in the continuous time domain. However, real-world systems often involves external interventions that cause changes in the system dynamics such as a moving ball coming in contact with another ball, or such as a patient being administered with particular drug. Neural ODE and a number of its recent variants, however, are not suitable for modeling such interventions as they do not properly model the observations and the interventions separately. In this paper, we propose a novel neural ODE-based approach (IMODE) that properly model the effect of external interventions by employing two ODE functions to separately handle the observations and the interventions. Using both synthetic and real-world time-series datasets involving interventions, our experimental results consistently demonstrate the superiority of IMODE compared to existing approaches.
summary: By interpreting the forward dynamics of the latent representation of neural networks as an ordinary differential equation, Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (Neural ODE) emerged as an effective framework for modeling a system dynamics in the continuous time domain. However, real-world systems often involves external interventions that cause changes in the system dynamics such as a moving ball coming in contact with another ball, or such as a patient being administered with particular drug. Neural ODE and a number of its recent variants, however, are not suitable for modeling such interventions as they do not properly model the observations and the interventions separately. In this paper, we propose a novel neural ODE-based approach (IMODE) that properly model the effect of external interventions by employing two ODE functions to separately handle the observations and the interventions. Using both synthetic and real-world time-series datasets involving interventions, our experimental results consistently demonstrate the superiority of IMODE compared to existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 通过将神经网络潜在表示的正向动力学解释为常微分方程，神经常微分方程（神经 ODE）成为连续时域中系统动力学建模的有效框架。然而，现实世界的系统通常涉及外部干预，这些干预会导致系统动力学发生变化，例如移动的球与另一个球接触，或者例如给患者服用特定药物。然而，神经常微分方程及其最近的一些变体不适合对此类干预措施进行建模，因为它们不能分别正确地对观察结果和干预措施进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 ODE 的方法（IMODE），该方法通过使用两个 ODE 函数分别处理观察和干预来正确模拟外部干预的效果。使用涉及干预的合成和真实时间序列数据集，我们的实验结果一致证明了 IMODE 相对于现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经常微分方程的干预建模方法（IMODE），以有效处理外部干预对系统动态的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）无法有效建模外部干预，导致在存在干预的系统动态中表现不足，需改进方法以准确区分观测和干预的影响。
AI.method: 通过引入两个独立的ODE函数分别建模观测数据和外部干预，实现对系统动态的分离处理。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实世界时间序列数据集上的实验结果表明，IMODE在处理干预任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: IMODE方法有效解决了外部干预建模问题，在存在干预的动态系统中表现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Intervention Modeling 用于干预建模的神经常微分方程 By interpreting the forward dynamics of the latent representation of neural networks as an ordinary differential equation, Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (Neural ODE) emerged as an effective framework for modeling a system dynamics in the continuous time domain. However, real-world systems often involves external interventions that cause changes in the system dynamics such as a moving ball coming in contact with another ball, or such as a patient being administered with particular drug. Neural ODE and a number of its recent variants, however, are not suitable for modeling such interventions as they do not properly model the observations and the interventions separately. In this paper, we propose a novel neural ODE-based approach (IMODE) that properly model the effect of external interventions by employing two ODE functions to separately handle the observations and the interventions. Using both synthetic and real-world time-series datasets involving interventions, our experimental results consistently demonstrate the superiority of IMODE compared to existing approaches. 通过将神经网络潜在表示的正向动力学解释为常微分方程，神经常微分方程（神经 ODE）成为连续时域中系统动力学建模的有效框架。然而，现实世界的系统通常涉及外部干预，这些干预会导致系统动力学发生变化，例如移动的球与另一个球接触，或者例如给患者服用特定药物。然而，神经常微分方程及其最近的一些变体不适合对此类干预措施进行建模，因为它们不能分别正确地对观察结果和干预措施进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 ODE 的方法（IMODE），该方法通过使用两个 ODE 函数分别处理观察和干预来正确模拟外部干预的效果。使用涉及干预的合成和真实时间序列数据集，我们的实验结果一致证明了 IMODE 相对于现有方法的优越性。 提出一种基于神经常微分方程的干预建模方法（IMODE），以有效处理外部干预对系统动态的影响。 Daehoon Gwak,Gyuhyeon Sim,Michael Poli,Stefano Massaroli,Jaegul Choo,Edward Choi cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Boyi Liu,Lujia Wang,Xinquan Chen,Lexiong Huang,Cheng-Zhong Xu
title: Peer-Assisted Robotic Learning: A Data-Driven Collaborative Learning Approach for Cloud Robotic Systems
title_zh: 同伴辅助机器人学习：云机器人系统的数据驱动协作学习方法
abstract: A technological revolution is occurring in the field of robotics with the data-driven deep learning technology. However, building datasets for each local robot is laborious. Meanwhile, data islands between local robots make data unable to be utilized collaboratively. To address this issue, the work presents Peer-Assisted Robotic Learning (PARL) in robotics, which is inspired by the peer-assisted learning in cognitive psychology and pedagogy. PARL implements data collaboration with the framework of cloud robotic systems. Both data and models are shared by robots to the cloud after semantic computing and training locally. The cloud converges the data and performs augmentation, integration, and transferring. Finally, fine tune this larger shared dataset in the cloud to local robots. Furthermore, we propose the DAT Network (Data Augmentation and Transferring Network) to implement the data processing in PARL. DAT Network can realize the augmentation of data from multi-local robots. We conduct experiments on a simplified self-driving task for robots (cars). DAT Network has a significant improvement in the augmentation in self-driving scenarios. Along with this, the self-driving experimental results also demonstrate that PARL is capable of improving learning effects with data collaboration of local robots.
summary: A technological revolution is occurring in the field of robotics with the data-driven deep learning technology. However, building datasets for each local robot is laborious. Meanwhile, data islands between local robots make data unable to be utilized collaboratively. To address this issue, the work presents Peer-Assisted Robotic Learning (PARL) in robotics, which is inspired by the peer-assisted learning in cognitive psychology and pedagogy. PARL implements data collaboration with the framework of cloud robotic systems. Both data and models are shared by robots to the cloud after semantic computing and training locally. The cloud converges the data and performs augmentation, integration, and transferring. Finally, fine tune this larger shared dataset in the cloud to local robots. Furthermore, we propose the DAT Network (Data Augmentation and Transferring Network) to implement the data processing in PARL. DAT Network can realize the augmentation of data from multi-local robots. We conduct experiments on a simplified self-driving task for robots (cars). DAT Network has a significant improvement in the augmentation in self-driving scenarios. Along with this, the self-driving experimental results also demonstrate that PARL is capable of improving learning effects with data collaboration of local robots.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的深度学习技术正在机器人领域发生一场技术革命。然而，为每个本地机器人构建数据集是很费力的。同时，本地机器人之间的数据孤岛导致数据无法协同利用。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了机器人学中的同伴辅助机器人学习（PARL），其灵感来自于认知心理学和教育学中的同伴辅助学习。 PARL以云机器人系统的框架实现数据协作。机器人在本地进行语义计算和训练后，将数据和模型共享到云端。云汇聚数据并执行扩充、集成和传输。最后，将云中更大的共享数据集微调到本地机器人。此外，我们提出了 DAT 网络（数据增强和传输网络）来实现 PARL 中的数据处理。 DAT Network可以实现多本地机器人数据的增强。我们对机器人（汽车）的简化自动驾驶任务进行实验。 DAT Network 在自动驾驶场景的增强方面有显着的提升。除此之外，自动驾驶实验结果也表明PARL能够通过本地机器人的数据协作来提高学习效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PARL的协作学习方法，通过云机器人系统实现本地机器人之间的数据共享与协作学习，并设计了DAT网络进行数据增强与迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统方法中每个机器人单独构建数据集效率低下且存在数据孤岛问题，难以实现跨机器人数据协作利用。
AI.method: 基于认知心理学中的同伴辅助学习理念，构建PARL框架：本地机器人进行语义计算与初步训练后，将数据与模型上传至云端，通过DAT网络实现多源数据增强、整合与迁移，最终将优化后的模型下发至本地机器人。
AI.result: 在简化自动驾驶任务实验中，DAT网络显著提升了数据增强效果，PARL方法通过数据协作有效提高了机器人学习效果。
AI.conclusion: PARL与DAT网络通过云端数据协作机制，有效解决了机器人数据孤岛问题，提升了数据驱动下的机器人学习效率与性能。

authors_text: Xixi Lu,Avigdor Gal,Hajo A. Reijers
title: Discovering Hierarchical Processes Using Flexible Activity Trees for Event Abstraction
title_zh: 使用灵活的活动树进行事件抽象来发现分层流程
abstract: Processes, such as patient pathways, can be very complex, comprising of hundreds of activities and dozens of interleaved subprocesses. While existing process discovery algorithms have proven to construct models of high quality on clean logs of structured processes, it still remains a challenge when the algorithms are being applied to logs of complex processes. The creation of a multi-level, hierarchical representation of a process can help to manage this complexity. However, current approaches that pursue this idea suffer from a variety of weaknesses. In particular, they do not deal well with interleaving subprocesses. In this paper, we propose FlexHMiner, a three-step approach to discover processes with multi-level interleaved subprocesses. We implemented FlexHMiner in the open source Process Mining toolkit ProM. We used seven real-life logs to compare the qualities of hierarchical models discovered using domain knowledge, random clustering, and flat approaches. Our results indicate that the hierarchical process models that the FlexHMiner generates compare favorably to approaches that do not exploit hierarchy.
summary: Processes, such as patient pathways, can be very complex, comprising of hundreds of activities and dozens of interleaved subprocesses. While existing process discovery algorithms have proven to construct models of high quality on clean logs of structured processes, it still remains a challenge when the algorithms are being applied to logs of complex processes. The creation of a multi-level, hierarchical representation of a process can help to manage this complexity. However, current approaches that pursue this idea suffer from a variety of weaknesses. In particular, they do not deal well with interleaving subprocesses. In this paper, we propose FlexHMiner, a three-step approach to discover processes with multi-level interleaved subprocesses. We implemented FlexHMiner in the open source Process Mining toolkit ProM. We used seven real-life logs to compare the qualities of hierarchical models discovered using domain knowledge, random clustering, and flat approaches. Our results indicate that the hierarchical process models that the FlexHMiner generates compare favorably to approaches that do not exploit hierarchy.
abstract_zh: 流程（例如患者路径）可能非常复杂，由数百个活动和数十个交错的子流程组成。虽然现有的流程发现算法已被证明可以在结构化流程的干净日志上构建高质量的模型，但当算法应用于复杂流程的日志时，它仍然是一个挑战。创建流程的多级、分层表示可以帮助管理这种复杂性。然而，当前追求这一想法的方法存在多种弱点。特别是，它们不能很好地处理交错子流程。在本文中，我们提出了 FlexHMiner，这是一种发现具有多级交错子流程的流程的三步方法。我们在开源流程挖掘工具包 ProM 中实现了 FlexHMiner。我们使用七个现实生活日志来比较使用领域知识、随机聚类和扁平方法发现的分层模型的质量。我们的结果表明，FlexHMiner 生成的分层流程模型与不利用分层结构的方法相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlexHMiner方法，通过灵活活动树发现具有多级交织子流程的复杂过程模型。
AI.motivation: 现有流程发现算法难以处理包含数百活动和交织子流程的复杂日志，而分层表示能有效管理复杂度但现有方法存在缺陷。
AI.method: 设计三步法FlexHMiner，利用灵活活动树构建分层模型，并在ProM工具中实现，通过七组真实日志对比领域知识、随机聚类和平铺方法的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明FlexHMiner生成的分层模型在质量上优于非分层方法，尤其在处理交织子流程时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 分层过程模型能更好处理复杂流程，FlexHMiner通过灵活活动树有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

authors_text: Zhoujian Sun,Wei Dong,Jinlong Shi,Zhengxing Huang
title: Interpretable Disease Prediction based on Reinforcement Path Reasoning over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 基于知识图强化路径推理的可解释疾病预测
abstract: Objective: To combine medical knowledge and medical data to interpretably predict the risk of disease. Methods: We formulated the disease prediction task as a random walk along a knowledge graph (KG). Specifically, we build a KG to record relationships between diseases and risk factors according to validated medical knowledge. Then, a mathematical object walks along the KG. It starts walking at a patient entity, which connects the KG based on the patient current diseases or risk factors and stops at a disease entity, which represents the predicted disease. The trajectory generated by the object represents an interpretable disease progression path of the given patient. The dynamics of the object are controlled by a policy-based reinforcement learning (RL) module, which is trained by electronic health records (EHRs). Experiments: We utilized two real-world EHR datasets to evaluate the performance of our model. In the disease prediction task, our model achieves 0.743 and 0.639 in terms of macro area under the curve (AUC) in predicting 53 circulation system diseases in the two datasets, respectively. This performance is comparable to the commonly used machine learning (ML) models in medical research. In qualitative analysis, our clinical collaborator reviewed the disease progression paths generated by our model and advocated their interpretability and reliability. Conclusion: Experimental results validate the proposed model in interpretably evaluating and optimizing disease prediction. Significance: Our work contributes to leveraging the potential of medical knowledge and medical data jointly for interpretable prediction tasks.

Conclusion: Experimental results validate the proposed model in interpretably evaluating and optimizing disease prediction. Significance: Our work contributes to leveraging the potential of medical knowledge and medical data jointly for interpretable prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 目的：结合医学知识和医学数据来可解释地预测疾病风险。方法：我们将疾病预测任务制定为沿着知识图（KG）的随机游走。具体来说，我们根据经过验证的医学知识建立一个知识图谱来记录疾病和危险因素之间的关系。然后，一个数学对象沿着 KG 行走。它从患者实体开始行走，患者实体根据患者当前的疾病或风险因素连接 KG，并在代表预测疾病的疾病实体处停止。对象生成的轨迹代表给定患者的可解释的疾病进展路径。对象的动态由基于策略的强化学习 (RL) 模块控制，该模块由电子健康记录 (EHR) 进行训练。实验：我们利用两个真实世界的 EHR 数据集来评估我们模型的性能。在疾病预测任务中，我们的模型在预测两个数据集中的 53 种循环系统疾病时，曲线下面积 (AUC) 分别达到 0.743 和 0.639。该性能可与医学研究中常用的机器学习（ML）模型相媲美。在定性分析中，我们的临床合作者审查了我们的模型生成的疾病进展路径，并提倡其可解释性和可靠性。结论：实验结果验证了所提出的模型在可解释性评估和优化疾病预测方面的有效性。意义：我们的工作有助于联合利用医学知识和医学数据的潜力来完成可解释的预测任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识图谱和强化学习的可解释疾病预测方法，通过构建疾病与风险因素的关系图谱并模拟患者疾病进展路径进行预测。
AI.motivation: 现有疾病预测模型缺乏可解释性，而临床决策需要结合医学知识与数据驱动的预测结果，因此需开发兼顾准确性与可解释性的疾病预测方法。
AI.method: 构建包含疾病-风险因素关系的医学知识图谱，设计基于强化学习的随机游走策略，通过电子健康记录训练策略网络生成可解释的疾病进展路径。
AI.result: 在两个真实EHR数据集上，模型对53种循环系统疾病的预测AUC分别为0.743和0.639，达到传统机器学习模型水平，临床专家认可其路径的可解释性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了结合医学知识图谱与强化学习进行可解释疾病预测的可行性，为医学决策提供了兼具准确性与可解释性的新工具。
