search_text: Interpretable Disease Prediction based on Reinforcement Path Reasoning over Knowledge Graphs 基于知识图强化路径推理的可解释疾病预测 Objective: To combine medical knowledge and medical data to interpretably predict the risk of disease. Methods: We formulated the disease prediction task as a random walk along a knowledge graph (KG). Specifically, we build a KG to record relationships between diseases and risk factors according to validated medical knowledge. Then, a mathematical object walks along the KG. It starts walking at a patient entity, which connects the KG based on the patient current diseases or risk factors and stops at a disease entity, which represents the predicted disease. The trajectory generated by the object represents an interpretable disease progression path of the given patient. The dynamics of the object are controlled by a policy-based reinforcement learning (RL) module, which is trained by electronic health records (EHRs). Experiments: We utilized two real-world EHR datasets to evaluate the performance of our model. In the disease prediction task, our model achieves 0.743 and 0.639 in terms of macro area under the curve (AUC) in predicting 53 circulation system diseases in the two datasets, respectively. This performance is comparable to the commonly used machine learning (ML) models in medical research. In qualitative analysis, our clinical collaborator reviewed the disease progression paths generated by our model and advocated their interpretability and reliability. Conclusion: Experimental results validate the proposed model in interpretably evaluating and optimizing disease prediction. Significance: Our work contributes to leveraging the potential of medical knowledge and medical data jointly for interpretable prediction tasks. 目的：结合医学知识和医学数据来可解释地预测疾病风险。方法：我们将疾病预测任务制定为沿着知识图（KG）的随机游走。具体来说，我们根据经过验证的医学知识建立一个知识图谱来记录疾病和危险因素之间的关系。然后，一个数学对象沿着 KG 行走。它从患者实体开始行走，患者实体根据患者当前的疾病或风险因素连接 KG，并在代表预测疾病的疾病实体处停止。对象生成的轨迹代表给定患者的可解释的疾病进展路径。对象的动态由基于策略的强化学习 (RL) 模块控制，该模块由电子健康记录 (EHR) 进行训练。实验：我们利用两个真实世界的 EHR 数据集来评估我们模型的性能。在疾病预测任务中，我们的模型在预测两个数据集中的 53 种循环系统疾病时，曲线下面积 (AUC) 分别达到 0.743 和 0.639。该性能可与医学研究中常用的机器学习（ML）模型相媲美。在定性分析中，我们的临床合作者审查了我们的模型生成的疾病进展路径，并提倡其可解释性和可靠性。结论：实验结果验证了所提出的模型在可解释性评估和优化疾病预测方面的有效性。意义：我们的工作有助于联合利用医学知识和医学数据的潜力来完成可解释的预测任务。 本文提出一种基于知识图谱和强化学习的可解释疾病预测方法，通过构建疾病与风险因素的关系图谱并模拟患者疾病进展路径进行预测。 Zhoujian Sun,Wei Dong,Jinlong Shi,Zhengxing Huang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Keenan Granland,Rhys Newbury,David Ting,Chao Chen
title: Minimizing Labeling Effort for Tree Skeleton Segmentation using an Automated Iterative Training Methodology
title_zh: 使用自动迭代训练方法最大限度地减少树骨架分割的标记工作
abstract: Training of convolutional neural networks for semantic segmentation requires accurate pixel-wise labeling which requires large amounts of human effort. The human-in-the-loop method reduces labeling effort; however, it requires human intervention for each image. This paper describes a general iterative training methodology for semantic segmentation, Automating-the-Loop. This aims to replicate the manual adjustments of the human-in-the-loop method with an automated process, hence, drastically reducing labeling effort. Using the application of detecting partially occluded apple tree segmentation, we compare manually labeled annotations, self-training, human-in-the-loop, and Automating-the-Loop methods in both the quality of the trained convolutional neural networks, and the effort needed to create them. The convolutional neural network (U-Net) performance is analyzed using traditional metrics and a new metric, Complete Grid Scan, which promotes connectivity and low noise. It is shown that in our application, the new Automating-the-Loop method greatly reduces the labeling effort while producing comparable performance to both human-in-the-loop and complete manual labeling methods.
summary: Training of convolutional neural networks for semantic segmentation requires accurate pixel-wise labeling which requires large amounts of human effort. The human-in-the-loop method reduces labeling effort; however, it requires human intervention for each image. This paper describes a general iterative training methodology for semantic segmentation, Automating-the-Loop. This aims to replicate the manual adjustments of the human-in-the-loop method with an automated process, hence, drastically reducing labeling effort. Using the application of detecting partially occluded apple tree segmentation, we compare manually labeled annotations, self-training, human-in-the-loop, and Automating-the-Loop methods in both the quality of the trained convolutional neural networks, and the effort needed to create them. The convolutional neural network (U-Net) performance is analyzed using traditional metrics and a new metric, Complete Grid Scan, which promotes connectivity and low noise. It is shown that in our application, the new Automating-the-Loop method greatly reduces the labeling effort while producing comparable performance to both human-in-the-loop and complete manual labeling methods.
abstract_zh: 用于语义分割的卷积神经网络的训练需要精确的像素级标记，这需要大量的人力。人机交互方法减少了标记工作；然而，它需要对每个图像进行人工干预。本文描述了一种用于语义分割的通用迭代训练方法，即自动化循环。其目的是通过自动化流程复制人机交互方法的手动调整，从而大大减少标签工作。使用检测部分遮挡的苹果树分割的应用，我们比较了手动标记注释、自我训练、人机循环和自动化循环方法在训练后的卷积神经网络的质量以及创建它们所需的工作量方面的差异。使用传统指标和新指标“完整网格扫描”来分析卷积神经网络 (U-Net) 的性能，该指标可提高连接性和低噪声。结果表明，在我们的应用中，新的自动化循环方法大大减少了标记工作，同时产生与人在循环和完全手动标记方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化迭代训练方法（Automating-the-Loop），用于减少树骨架分割任务中的人工标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割需要大量人工像素级标注，而现有半自动化方法仍需人工干预每张图像，亟需更高效的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 开发自动化迭代训练框架，通过模仿人工调整过程减少标注需求，并在苹果树部分遮挡分割任务中对比手动标注、自训练、人工干预及自动化方法的性能与标注效率。
AI.result: 自动化方法在显著降低标注工作量的同时，其U-Net模型性能与人工标注方法相当，且新提出的Complete Grid Scan指标验证了分割结果的连通性与低噪声特性。
AI.conclusion: 自动化迭代训练方法可有效替代传统人工标注流程，在保证分割质量的前提下大幅提升标注效率，适用于资源受限的农业遥感等场景。

authors_text: Marcin Jurdziński,Rémi Morvan,Pierre Ohlmann,K. S. Thejaswini
title: A symmetric attractor-decomposition lifting algorithm for parity games
title_zh: 奇偶博弈的对称吸引子分解提升算法
comment: 30 pages, including 10 pages of appendix and 5 figures. Submitted to FoSSaCS2021
comments: 30 pages, including 10 pages of appendix and 5 figures. Submitted to FoSSaCS2021
abstract: Progress-measure lifting algorithms for solving parity games have the best worst-case asymptotic runtime, but are limited by their asymmetric nature, and known from the work of Czerwiński et al. (2018) to be subject to a matching quasi-polynomial lower bound inherited from the combinatorics of universal trees. Parys (2019) has developed an ingenious quasi-polynomial McNaughton- Zielonka-style algorithm, and Lehtinen et al. (2019) have improved its worst-case runtime. Jurdziński and Morvan (2020) have recently brought forward a generic attractor-based algorithm, formalizing a second class of quasi-polynomial solutions to solving parity games, which have runtime quadratic in the size of universal trees. First, we adapt the framework of iterative lifting algorithms to computing attractor-based strategies. Second, we design a symmetric lifting algorithm in this setting, in which two lifting iterations, one for each player, accelerate each other in a recursive fashion. The symmetric algorithm performs at least as well as progress-measure liftings in the worst-case, whilst bypassing their inherent asymmetric limitation. Thirdly, we argue that the behaviour of the generic attractor-based algorithm of Jurdzinski and Morvan (2020) can be reproduced by a specific deceleration of our symmetric lifting algorithm, in which some of the information collected by the algorithm is repeatedly discarded. This yields a novel interpretation of McNaughton-Zielonka-style algorithms as progress-measure lifting iterations (with deliberate set-backs), further strengthening the ties between all known quasi-polynomial algorithms to date.
summary: Progress-measure lifting algorithms for solving parity games have the best worst-case asymptotic runtime, but are limited by their asymmetric nature, and known from the work of Czerwiński et al. (2018) to be subject to a matching quasi-polynomial lower bound inherited from the combinatorics of universal trees. Parys (2019) has developed an ingenious quasi-polynomial McNaughton- Zielonka-style algorithm, and Lehtinen et al. (2019) have improved its worst-case runtime. Jurdziński and Morvan (2020) have recently brought forward a generic attractor-based algorithm, formalizing a second class of quasi-polynomial solutions to solving parity games, which have runtime quadratic in the size of universal trees. First, we adapt the framework of iterative lifting algorithms to computing attractor-based strategies. Second, we design a symmetric lifting algorithm in this setting, in which two lifting iterations, one for each player, accelerate each other in a recursive fashion. The symmetric algorithm performs at least as well as progress-measure liftings in the worst-case, whilst bypassing their inherent asymmetric limitation. Thirdly, we argue that the behaviour of the generic attractor-based algorithm of Jurdzinski and Morvan (2020) can be reproduced by a specific deceleration of our symmetric lifting algorithm, in which some of the information collected by the algorithm is repeatedly discarded. This yields a novel interpretation of McNaughton-Zielonka-style algorithms as progress-measure lifting iterations (with deliberate set-backs), further strengthening the ties between all known quasi-polynomial algorithms to date.
abstract_zh: 用于解决奇偶游戏的进度度量提升算法具有最佳的最坏情况渐近运行时间，但受到其不对称性质的限制，并且从 Czerwiński 等人的工作中得知。 （2018）服从从通用树组合继承的匹配拟多项式下界。 Parys (2019) 开发了一种巧妙的拟多项式 McNaughton-Zielonka 式算法，Lehtinen 等人。 （2019）改善了最坏情况下的运行时间。 Jurdziński 和 Morvan (2020) 最近提出了一种基于通用吸引子的算法，形式化了解决奇偶博弈的第二类拟多项式解决方案，其运行时间与通用树的大小成二次方。首先，我们采用迭代提升算法的框架来计算基于吸引子的策略。其次，我们在此设置中设计了一种对称提升算法，其中两次提升迭代（每个玩家一次）以递归方式相互加速。在最坏的情况下，对称算法的性能至少与进度测量提升一样好，同时绕过了其固有的不对称限制。第三，我们认为 Jurdzinski 和 Morvan (2020) 的基于通用吸引子的算法的行为可以通过我们的对称提升算法的特定减速来重现，其中算法收集的一些信息被重复丢弃。这产生了对 McNaughton-Zielonka 式算法作为进度测量提升迭代（带有故意的挫折）的新颖解释，进一步加强了迄今为止所有已知的拟多项式算法之间的联系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对称的吸引子分解提升算法，用于解决奇偶博弈问题，克服了现有算法的不对称性限制。
AI.motivation: 现有进展度量提升算法虽具最优渐进时间复杂度，但因不对称性存在准多项式下界限制，需寻找更高效的对称算法。
AI.method: 通过迭代提升框架实现吸引子策略计算，设计双向递归的对称提升算法，并证明其与通用吸引子算法的等价性。
AI.result: 对称算法在最坏情况下表现优于传统提升算法，且能复现McNaughton-Zielonka风格算法的行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作统一了所有已知准多项式算法的理论框架，为奇偶博弈求解提供了新的分析视角和实现路径。

search_text: A symmetric attractor-decomposition lifting algorithm for parity games 奇偶博弈的对称吸引子分解提升算法 Progress-measure lifting algorithms for solving parity games have the best worst-case asymptotic runtime, but are limited by their asymmetric nature, and known from the work of Czerwiński et al. (2018) to be subject to a matching quasi-polynomial lower bound inherited from the combinatorics of universal trees. Parys (2019) has developed an ingenious quasi-polynomial McNaughton- Zielonka-style algorithm, and Lehtinen et al. (2019) have improved its worst-case runtime. Jurdziński and Morvan (2020) have recently brought forward a generic attractor-based algorithm, formalizing a second class of quasi-polynomial solutions to solving parity games, which have runtime quadratic in the size of universal trees. First, we adapt the framework of iterative lifting algorithms to computing attractor-based strategies. Second, we design a symmetric lifting algorithm in this setting, in which two lifting iterations, one for each player, accelerate each other in a recursive fashion. The symmetric algorithm performs at least as well as progress-measure liftings in the worst-case, whilst bypassing their inherent asymmetric limitation. Thirdly, we argue that the behaviour of the generic attractor-based algorithm of Jurdzinski and Morvan (2020) can be reproduced by a specific deceleration of our symmetric lifting algorithm, in which some of the information collected by the algorithm is repeatedly discarded. This yields a novel interpretation of McNaughton-Zielonka-style algorithms as progress-measure lifting iterations (with deliberate set-backs), further strengthening the ties between all known quasi-polynomial algorithms to date. 用于解决奇偶游戏的进度度量提升算法具有最佳的最坏情况渐近运行时间，但受到其不对称性质的限制，并且从 Czerwiński 等人的工作中得知。 （2018）服从从通用树组合继承的匹配拟多项式下界。 Parys (2019) 开发了一种巧妙的拟多项式 McNaughton-Zielonka 式算法，Lehtinen 等人。 （2019）改善了最坏情况下的运行时间。 Jurdziński 和 Morvan (2020) 最近提出了一种基于通用吸引子的算法，形式化了解决奇偶博弈的第二类拟多项式解决方案，其运行时间与通用树的大小成二次方。首先，我们采用迭代提升算法的框架来计算基于吸引子的策略。其次，我们在此设置中设计了一种对称提升算法，其中两次提升迭代（每个玩家一次）以递归方式相互加速。在最坏的情况下，对称算法的性能至少与进度测量提升一样好，同时绕过了其固有的不对称限制。第三，我们认为 Jurdzinski 和 Morvan (2020) 的基于通用吸引子的算法的行为可以通过我们的对称提升算法的特定减速来重现，其中算法收集的一些信息被重复丢弃。这产生了对 McNaughton-Zielonka 式算法作为进度测量提升迭代（带有故意的挫折）的新颖解释，进一步加强了迄今为止所有已知的拟多项式算法之间的联系。 本文提出一种对称的吸引子分解提升算法，用于解决奇偶博弈问题，克服了现有算法的不对称性限制。 Marcin Jurdziński,Rémi Morvan,Pierre Ohlmann,K. authors_text: Gastón García González,Pedro Casas,Alicia Fernández,Gabriel Gómez
title: On the Usage of Generative Models for Network Anomaly Detection in Multivariate Time-Series
title_zh: 关于生成模型在多元时间序列网络异常检测中的应用
comment: To be published in ACM SIGMETRICS Performance Evaluation Review
comments: To be published in ACM SIGMETRICS Performance Evaluation Review
abstract: Despite the many attempts and approaches for anomaly detection explored over the years, the automatic detection of rare events in data communication networks remains a complex problem. In this paper we introduce Net-GAN, a novel approach to network anomaly detection in time-series, using recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and generative adversarial networks (GAN). Different from the state of the art, which traditionally focuses on univariate measurements, Net-GAN detects anomalies in multivariate time-series, exploiting temporal dependencies through RNNs. Net-GAN discovers the underlying distribution of the baseline, multivariate data, without making any assumptions on its nature, offering a powerful approach to detect anomalies in complex, difficult to model network monitoring data. We further exploit the concepts behind generative models to conceive Net-VAE, a complementary approach to Net-GAN for network anomaly detection, based on variational auto-encoders (VAE). We evaluate Net-GAN and Net-VAE in different monitoring scenarios, including anomaly detection in IoT sensor data, and intrusion detection in network measurements. Generative models represent a promising approach for network anomaly detection, especially when considering the complexity and ever-growing number of time-series to monitor in operational networks.
summary: Despite the many attempts and approaches for anomaly detection explored over the years, the automatic detection of rare events in data communication networks remains a complex problem. In this paper we introduce Net-GAN, a novel approach to network anomaly detection in time-series, using recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and generative adversarial networks (GAN). Different from the state of the art, which traditionally focuses on univariate measurements, Net-GAN detects anomalies in multivariate time-series, exploiting temporal dependencies through RNNs. Net-GAN discovers the underlying distribution of the baseline, multivariate data, without making any assumptions on its nature, offering a powerful approach to detect anomalies in complex, difficult to model network monitoring data. We further exploit the concepts behind generative models to conceive Net-VAE, a complementary approach to Net-GAN for network anomaly detection, based on variational auto-encoders (VAE). We evaluate Net-GAN and Net-VAE in different monitoring scenarios, including anomaly detection in IoT sensor data, and intrusion detection in network measurements. Generative models represent a promising approach for network anomaly detection, especially when considering the complexity and ever-growing number of time-series to monitor in operational networks.
abstract_zh: 尽管多年来探索了许多异常检测的尝试和方法，但数据通信网络中罕见事件的自动检测仍然是一个复杂的问题。在本文中，我们介绍了 Net-GAN，这是一种使用循环神经网络 (RNN) 和生成对抗网络 (GAN) 进行时间序列网络异常检测的新方法。与传统上关注单变量测量的现有技术不同，Net-GAN 通过 RNN 利用时间依赖性来检测多变量时间序列中的异常。 Net-GAN 发现基线、多元数据的基本分布，无需对其性质做出任何假设，从而提供了一种强大的方法来检测复杂、难以建模的网络监控数据中的异常情况。我们进一步利用生成模型背后的概念来构思 Net-VAE，这是一种基于变分自动编码器 (VAE) 的 Net-GAN 的补充方法，用于网络异常检测。我们在不同的监控场景中评估 Net-GAN 和 Net-VAE，包括物联网传感器数据中的异常检测和网络测量中的入侵检测。生成模型代表了一种有前途的网络异常检测方法，特别是考虑到运营网络中需要监控的复杂性和不断增长的时间序列数量时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成模型的Net-GAN和Net-VAE方法，用于多变量时间序列的网络异常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统网络异常检测方法多关注单变量测量，难以处理复杂多变的多变量网络监控数据。
AI.method: Net-GAN结合RNN与GAN捕捉多变量时间序列分布，Net-VAE基于VAE构建生成模型，通过重构误差检测异常。
AI.result: 在物联网传感器数据和网络入侵检测场景中验证了Net-GAN和Net-VAE的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型为复杂网络监控数据的异常检测提供了有效解决方案，尤其适用于多变量时间序列分析。

authors_text: Cian Ryan,Brian O Sullivan,Amr Elrasad,Joe Lemley,Paul Kielty,Christoph Posch,Etienne Perot
title: Real-Time Face & Eye Tracking and Blink Detection using Event Cameras
title_zh: 使用事件相机进行实时面部和眼睛跟踪以及眨眼检测
abstract: Event cameras contain emerging, neuromorphic vision sensors that capture local light intensity changes at each pixel, generating a stream of asynchronous events. This way of acquiring visual information constitutes a departure from traditional frame based cameras and offers several significant advantages: low energy consumption, high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. Driver monitoring systems (DMS) are in-cabin safety systems designed to sense and understand a drivers physical and cognitive state. Event cameras are particularly suited to DMS due to their inherent advantages. This paper proposes a novel method to simultaneously detect and track faces and eyes for driver monitoring. A unique, fully convolutional recurrent neural network architecture is presented. To train this network, a synthetic event-based dataset is simulated with accurate bounding box annotations, called Neuromorphic HELEN. Additionally, a method to detect and analyse drivers eye blinks is proposed, exploiting the high temporal resolution of event cameras. Behaviour of blinking provides greater insights into a driver level of fatigue or drowsiness. We show that blinks have a unique temporal signature that can be better captured by event cameras.
summary: Event cameras contain emerging, neuromorphic vision sensors that capture local light intensity changes at each pixel, generating a stream of asynchronous events. This way of acquiring visual information constitutes a departure from traditional frame based cameras and offers several significant advantages: low energy consumption, high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. Driver monitoring systems (DMS) are in-cabin safety systems designed to sense and understand a drivers physical and cognitive state. Event cameras are particularly suited to DMS due to their inherent advantages. This paper proposes a novel method to simultaneously detect and track faces and eyes for driver monitoring. A unique, fully convolutional recurrent neural network architecture is presented. To train this network, a synthetic event-based dataset is simulated with accurate bounding box annotations, called Neuromorphic HELEN. Additionally, a method to detect and analyse drivers eye blinks is proposed, exploiting the high temporal resolution of event cameras. Behaviour of blinking provides greater insights into a driver level of fatigue or drowsiness. We show that blinks have a unique temporal signature that can be better captured by event cameras.
abstract_zh: 事件相机包含新兴的神经形态视觉传感器，可以捕获每个像素的局部光强度变化，从而生成异步事件流。这种获取视觉信息的方式与传统的基于帧的相机不同，并具有几个显着的优点：低能耗、高时间分辨率、高动态范围和低延迟。驾驶员监控系统 (DMS) 是车内安全系统，旨在感知和了解驾驶员的身体和认知状态。事件摄像机因其固有的优势而特别适合 DMS。本文提出了一种同时检测和跟踪面部和眼睛以进行驾驶员监控的新方法。提出了一种独特的全卷积循环神经网络架构。为了训练这个网络，使用精确的边界框注释模拟了一个基于事件的合成数据集，称为神经形态 HELEN。此外，还提出了一种利用事件摄像机的高时间分辨率来检测和分析驾驶员眨眼的方法。眨眼行为可以更深入地了解驾驶员的疲劳或困倦程度。我们证明眨眼具有独特的时间特征，可以通过事件摄像机更好地捕获。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的实时人脸与眼睛追踪及眨眼检测方法，用于驾驶员监控系统。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头存在高能耗、低动态范围等问题，而事件相机具有高时间分辨率和低延迟等优势，适合用于驾驶员状态监测。
AI.method: 设计全卷积循环神经网络架构，结合合成事件数据集Neuromorphic HELEN进行训练，并利用事件相机高时间分辨率分析眨眼时序特征。
AI.result: 验证了眨眼具有独特时序特征，事件相机能更准确捕捉该特征，提升驾驶员疲劳检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机结合新型神经网络架构可有效实现驾驶员面部追踪与眨眼检测，为车载安全系统提供新解决方案。

search_text: Real-Time Face & Eye Tracking and Blink Detection using Event Cameras 使用事件相机进行实时面部和眼睛跟踪以及眨眼检测 Event cameras contain emerging, neuromorphic vision sensors that capture local light intensity changes at each pixel, generating a stream of asynchronous events. This way of acquiring visual information constitutes a departure from traditional frame based cameras and offers several significant advantages: low energy consumption, high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. Driver monitoring systems (DMS) are in-cabin safety systems designed to sense and understand a drivers physical and cognitive state. Event cameras are particularly suited to DMS due to their inherent advantages. This paper proposes a novel method to simultaneously detect and track faces and eyes for driver monitoring. A unique, fully convolutional recurrent neural network architecture is presented. To train this network, a synthetic event-based dataset is simulated with accurate bounding box annotations, called Neuromorphic HELEN. Additionally, a method to detect and analyse drivers eye blinks is proposed, exploiting the high temporal resolution of event cameras. Behaviour of blinking provides greater insights into a driver level of fatigue or drowsiness. We show that blinks have a unique temporal signature that can be better captured by event cameras. 事件相机包含新兴的神经形态视觉传感器，可以捕获每个像素的局部光强度变化，从而生成异步事件流。这种获取视觉信息的方式与传统的基于帧的相机不同，并具有几个显着的优点：低能耗、高时间分辨率、高动态范围和低延迟。驾驶员监控系统 (DMS) 是车内安全系统，旨在感知和了解驾驶员的身体和认知状态。事件摄像机因其固有的优势而特别适合 DMS。本文提出了一种同时检测和跟踪面部和眼睛以进行驾驶员监控的新方法。提出了一种独特的全卷积循环神经网络架构。为了训练这个网络，使用精确的边界框注释模拟了一个基于事件的合成数据集，称为神经形态 HELEN。此外，还提出了一种利用事件摄像机的高时间分辨率来检测和分析驾驶员眨眼的方法。眨眼行为可以更深入地了解驾驶员的疲劳或困倦程度。我们证明眨眼具有独特的时间特征，可以通过事件摄像机更好地捕获。 本文提出一种基于事件相机的实时人脸与眼睛追踪及眨眼检测方法，用于驾驶员监控系统。 Cian Ryan,Brian O Sullivan,Amr Elrasad,Joe Lemley,Paul Kielty,Christoph Posch,Etienne Perot cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tran Nguyen Le,Francesco Verdoja,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Ville Kyrki
title: Probabilistic Surface Friction Estimation Based on Visual and Haptic Measurements
title_zh: 基于视觉和触觉测量的概率表面摩擦估计
comment: Published in RA-L and ICRA2021. 8 pages, 8 figures. Tin IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2021
comments: Published in RA-L and ICRA2021. 8 pages, 8 figures. Tin IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, 2021
abstract: Accurately modeling local surface properties of objects is crucial to many robotic applications, from grasping to material recognition. Surface properties like friction are however difficult to estimate, as visual observation of the object does not convey enough information over these properties. In contrast, haptic exploration is time consuming as it only provides information relevant to the explored parts of the object. In this work, we propose a joint visuo-haptic object model that enables the estimation of surface friction coefficient over an entire object by exploiting the correlation of visual and haptic information, together with a limited haptic exploration by a robotic arm. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed method by showing its ability to estimate varying friction coefficients on a range of real multi-material objects. Furthermore, we illustrate how the estimated friction coefficients can improve grasping success rate by guiding a grasp planner toward high friction areas.
summary: Accurately modeling local surface properties of objects is crucial to many robotic applications, from grasping to material recognition. Surface properties like friction are however difficult to estimate, as visual observation of the object does not convey enough information over these properties. In contrast, haptic exploration is time consuming as it only provides information relevant to the explored parts of the object. In this work, we propose a joint visuo-haptic object model that enables the estimation of surface friction coefficient over an entire object by exploiting the correlation of visual and haptic information, together with a limited haptic exploration by a robotic arm. We demonstrate the validity of the proposed method by showing its ability to estimate varying friction coefficients on a range of real multi-material objects. Furthermore, we illustrate how the estimated friction coefficients can improve grasping success rate by guiding a grasp planner toward high friction areas.
abstract_zh: 准确地建模物体的局部表面特性对于许多机器人应用（从抓取到材料识别）至关重要。然而，像摩擦力这样的表面特性很难估计，因为对物体的视觉观察并不能传达有关这些特性的足够信息。相比之下，触觉探索非常耗时，因为它仅提供与对象的探索部分相关的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种联合视觉-触觉对象模型，该模型能够通过利用视觉和触觉信息的相关性以及机械臂的有限触觉探索来估计整个对象的表面摩擦系数。我们通过展示其估计一系列真实多材料物体上变化的摩擦系数的能力来证明该方法的有效性。此外，我们还说明了估计的摩擦系数如何通过引导抓取规划器朝向高摩擦区域来提高抓取成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉和触觉测量的概率表面摩擦估计方法，用于机器人抓取和材料识别。
AI.motivation: 视觉信息无法充分表征物体表面摩擦特性，而触觉探索效率低下且信息局部化，需融合多模态数据提升估计准确性。
AI.method: 构建联合视觉-触觉物体模型，通过机器人臂的有限触觉探索与视觉信息的关联性，估计物体整体表面摩擦系数。
AI.result: 方法成功估计了多种真实多材料物体的摩擦系数，并通过引导抓取规划器选择高摩擦区域提升了抓取成功率。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉与触觉信息的模型能有效估计表面摩擦特性，为机器人抓取任务提供可靠依据。

authors_text: Biao Zhang,Peter Wonka
title: Training Data Generating Networks: Shape Reconstruction via Bi-level Optimization
title_zh: 训练数据生成网络：通过双层优化进行形状重建
abstract: We propose a novel 3d shape representation for 3d shape reconstruction from a single image. Rather than predicting a shape directly, we train a network to generate a training set which will be fed into another learning algorithm to define the shape. The nested optimization problem can be modeled by bi-level optimization. Specifically, the algorithms for bi-level optimization are also being used in meta learning approaches for few-shot learning. Our framework establishes a link between 3D shape analysis and few-shot learning. We combine training data generating networks with bi-level optimization algorithms to obtain a complete framework for which all components can be jointly trained. We improve upon recent work on standard benchmarks for 3d shape reconstruction.
summary: We propose a novel 3d shape representation for 3d shape reconstruction from a single image. Rather than predicting a shape directly, we train a network to generate a training set which will be fed into another learning algorithm to define the shape. The nested optimization problem can be modeled by bi-level optimization. Specifically, the algorithms for bi-level optimization are also being used in meta learning approaches for few-shot learning. Our framework establishes a link between 3D shape analysis and few-shot learning. We combine training data generating networks with bi-level optimization algorithms to obtain a complete framework for which all components can be jointly trained. We improve upon recent work on standard benchmarks for 3d shape reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 形状表示，用于从单个图像重建 3D 形状。我们不是直接预测形状，而是训练网络来生成训练集，该训练集将被输入到另一个学习算法中来定义形状。嵌套优化问题可以通过双层优化来建模。具体来说，双层优化的算法也被用于小样本学习的元学习方法中。我们的框架在 3D 形状分析和小样本学习之间建立了联系。我们将训练数据生成网络与双层优化算法相结合，以获得一个完整的框架，所有组件都可以联合训练。我们改进了最近关于 3D 形状重建标准基准的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过生成训练数据网络和双层优化进行3D形状重建的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D形状重建方法直接预测形状存在局限，需探索更有效的数据生成与优化框架以提升重建精度。
AI.method: 设计生成训练数据的神经网络，结合双层优化算法构建端到端框架，通过联合训练实现形状重建。
AI.result: 在标准3D形状重建基准上优于现有方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架建立了3D形状分析与少样本学习的联系，为复杂场景下的形状重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mark Berger,Jakub Zavrel,Paul Groth
title: Effective Distributed Representations for Academic Expert Search
title_zh: 用于学术专家搜索的有效分布式表示
comment: To be published in the Scholarly Document Processing 2020 Workshop @ EMNLP 2020 proceedings
comments: To be published in the Scholarly Document Processing 2020 Workshop @ EMNLP 2020 proceedings
abstract: Expert search aims to find and rank experts based on a user's query. In academia, retrieving experts is an efficient way to navigate through a large amount of academic knowledge. Here, we study how different distributed representations of academic papers (i.e. embeddings) impact academic expert retrieval. We use the Microsoft Academic Graph dataset and experiment with different configurations of a document-centric voting model for retrieval. In particular, we explore the impact of the use of contextualized embeddings on search performance. We also present results for paper embeddings that incorporate citation information through retrofitting. Additionally, experiments are conducted using different techniques for assigning author weights based on author order. We observe that using contextual embeddings produced by a transformer model trained for sentence similarity tasks produces the most effective paper representations for document-centric expert retrieval. However, retrofitting the paper embeddings and using elaborate author contribution weighting strategies did not improve retrieval performance.
summary: Expert search aims to find and rank experts based on a user's query. In academia, retrieving experts is an efficient way to navigate through a large amount of academic knowledge. Here, we study how different distributed representations of academic papers (i.e. embeddings) impact academic expert retrieval. We use the Microsoft Academic Graph dataset and experiment with different configurations of a document-centric voting model for retrieval. In particular, we explore the impact of the use of contextualized embeddings on search performance. We also present results for paper embeddings that incorporate citation information through retrofitting. Additionally, experiments are conducted using different techniques for assigning author weights based on author order. We observe that using contextual embeddings produced by a transformer model trained for sentence similarity tasks produces the most effective paper representations for document-centric expert retrieval. However, retrofitting the paper embeddings and using elaborate author contribution weighting strategies did not improve retrieval performance.
abstract_zh: 专家搜索旨在根据用户的查询查找专家并对其进行排名。在学术界，检索专家是浏览大量学术知识的有效方法。在这里，我们研究学术论文的不同分布式表示（即嵌入）如何影响学术专家检索。我们使用 Microsoft 学术图谱数据集，并尝试以文档为中心的投票模型的不同配置进行检索。特别是，我们探讨了使用上下文嵌入对搜索性能的影响。我们还提供了通过改造合并引用信息的论文嵌入的结果。此外，还使用不同的技术进行实验，根据作者顺序分配作者权重。我们观察到，使用针对句子相似性任务训练的变压器模型生成的上下文嵌入可以为以文档为中心的专家检索产生最有效的论文表示。然而，改造论文嵌入并使用精心设计的作者贡献加权策略并没有提高检索性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同学术论文嵌入方法对专家检索的影响，探索最有效的分布式表示技术。
AI.motivation: 学术专家检索在信息过载时代至关重要，但现有方法未充分验证嵌入技术对检索效果的影响，需系统评估不同表示方法的性能差异。
AI.method: 基于Microsoft Academic Graph数据集，采用文档中心投票模型，对比实验包括上下文嵌入、引用信息retfitting嵌入及作者贡献权重分配策略。
AI.result: Transformer模型生成的句子相似度任务嵌入效果最佳，而retfitting嵌入和复杂作者权重策略未提升检索性能。
AI.conclusion: 上下文化嵌入是当前最优的论文表示方法，但引用信息整合与作者贡献加权策略对专家检索无显著提升作用。

search_text: Effective Distributed Representations for Academic Expert Search 用于学术专家搜索的有效分布式表示 Expert search aims to find and rank experts based on a user's query. In academia, retrieving experts is an efficient way to navigate through a large amount of academic knowledge. Here, we study how different distributed representations of academic papers (i.e. embeddings) impact academic expert retrieval. We use the Microsoft Academic Graph dataset and experiment with different configurations of a document-centric voting model for retrieval. In particular, we explore the impact of the use of contextualized embeddings on search performance. We also present results for paper embeddings that incorporate citation information through retrofitting. Additionally, experiments are conducted using different techniques for assigning author weights based on author order. We observe that using contextual embeddings produced by a transformer model trained for sentence similarity tasks produces the most effective paper representations for document-centric expert retrieval. However, retrofitting the paper embeddings and using elaborate author contribution weighting strategies did not improve retrieval performance. 专家搜索旨在根据用户的查询查找专家并对其进行排名。在学术界，检索专家是浏览大量学术知识的有效方法。在这里，我们研究学术论文的不同分布式表示（即嵌入）如何影响学术专家检索。我们使用 Microsoft 学术图谱数据集，并尝试以文档为中心的投票模型的不同配置进行检索。特别是，我们探讨了使用上下文嵌入对搜索性能的影响。我们还提供了通过改造合并引用信息的论文嵌入的结果。此外，还使用不同的技术进行实验，根据作者顺序分配作者权重。我们观察到，使用针对句子相似性任务训练的变压器模型生成的上下文嵌入可以为以文档为中心的专家检索产生最有效的论文表示。然而，改造论文嵌入并使用精心设计的作者贡献加权策略并没有提高检索性能。 本文研究不同学术论文嵌入方法对专家检索的影响，探索最有效的分布式表示技术。 Mark Berger,Jakub Zavrel,Paul Groth cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Bernd Illing,Jean Ventura,Guillaume Bellec,Wulfram Gerstner
title: Local plasticity rules can learn deep representations using self-supervised contrastive predictions
title_zh: 局部可塑性规则可以使用自监督对比预测来学习深度表示
abstract: Learning in the brain is poorly understood and learning rules that respect biological constraints, yet yield deep hierarchical representations, are still unknown. Here, we propose a learning rule that takes inspiration from neuroscience and recent advances in self-supervised deep learning. Learning minimizes a simple layer-specific loss function and does not need to back-propagate error signals within or between layers. Instead, weight updates follow a local, Hebbian, learning rule that only depends on pre- and post-synaptic neuronal activity, predictive dendritic input and widely broadcasted modulation factors which are identical for large groups of neurons. The learning rule applies contrastive predictive learning to a causal, biological setting using saccades (i.e. rapid shifts in gaze direction). We find that networks trained with this self-supervised and local rule build deep hierarchical representations of images, speech and video.
summary: Learning in the brain is poorly understood and learning rules that respect biological constraints, yet yield deep hierarchical representations, are still unknown. Here, we propose a learning rule that takes inspiration from neuroscience and recent advances in self-supervised deep learning. Learning minimizes a simple layer-specific loss function and does not need to back-propagate error signals within or between layers. Instead, weight updates follow a local, Hebbian, learning rule that only depends on pre- and post-synaptic neuronal activity, predictive dendritic input and widely broadcasted modulation factors which are identical for large groups of neurons. The learning rule applies contrastive predictive learning to a causal, biological setting using saccades (i.e. rapid shifts in gaze direction). We find that networks trained with this self-supervised and local rule build deep hierarchical representations of images, speech and video.
abstract_zh: 人们对大脑中的学习知之甚少，并且尊重生物约束但产生深层层次表示的学习规则仍然未知。在这里，我们提出了一种学习规则，该规则的灵感来自神经科学和自监督深度学习的最新进展。学习最小化了简单的特定于层的损失函数，并且不需要在层内或层之间反向传播误差信号。相反，权重更新遵循局部赫布学习规则，该规则仅取决于突触前和突触后神经元活动、预测树突输入和广泛广播的调制因子，这些因子对于大群神经元来说是相同的。学习规则使用眼跳（即注视方向的快速变化）将对比预测学习应用于因果生物环境。我们发现，用这种自我监督和本地规则训练的网络构建了图像、语音和视频的深层层次表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部可塑性规则的自监督对比预测学习方法，无需反向传播即可构建深度分层表征。
AI.motivation: 现有学习规则要么违背生物约束，要么无法生成深度表征，需探索符合生物学规律且能实现深度学习的替代方案。
AI.method: 设计局部赫布规则，结合突触活动、预测性树突输入及全局调节因子，通过眼动触发的对比预测进行自监督训练。
AI.result: 训练网络成功构建图像、语音和视频的深度分层表征，验证了局部规则的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在生物合理性与深度学习间建立桥梁，为神经科学和人工智能提供新研究方向。

authors_text: Jiancong Huang,Juan Rojas,Matthieu Zimmer,Hongmin Wu,Yisheng Guan,Paul Weng
title: Hyperparameter Auto-tuning in Self-Supervised Robotic Learning
title_zh: 自监督机器人学习中的超参数自动调整
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters; Presented at The 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2021); Presented at Deep RL Workshop, NeurIPS 2020
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters; Presented at The 2021 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2021); Presented at Deep RL Workshop, NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Policy optimization in reinforcement learning requires the selection of numerous hyperparameters across different environments. Fixing them incorrectly may negatively impact optimization performance leading notably to insufficient or redundant learning. Insufficient learning (due to convergence to local optima) results in under-performing policies whilst redundant learning wastes time and resources. The effects are further exacerbated when using single policies to solve multi-task learning problems. Observing that the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) used in Variational Auto-Encoders correlates with the diversity of image samples, we propose an auto-tuning technique based on the ELBO for self-supervised reinforcement learning. Our approach can auto-tune three hyperparameters: the replay buffer size, the number of policy gradient updates during each epoch, and the number of exploration steps during each epoch. We use a state-of-the-art self-supervised robot learning framework (Reinforcement Learning with Imagined Goals (RIG) using Soft Actor-Critic) as baseline for experimental verification. Experiments show that our method can auto-tune online and yields the best performance at a fraction of the time and computational resources. Code, video, and appendix for simulated and real-robot experiments can be found at the project page \url{www.JuanRojas.net/autotune}.
summary: Policy optimization in reinforcement learning requires the selection of numerous hyperparameters across different environments. Fixing them incorrectly may negatively impact optimization performance leading notably to insufficient or redundant learning. Insufficient learning (due to convergence to local optima) results in under-performing policies whilst redundant learning wastes time and resources. The effects are further exacerbated when using single policies to solve multi-task learning problems. Observing that the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) used in Variational Auto-Encoders correlates with the diversity of image samples, we propose an auto-tuning technique based on the ELBO for self-supervised reinforcement learning. Our approach can auto-tune three hyperparameters: the replay buffer size, the number of policy gradient updates during each epoch, and the number of exploration steps during each epoch. We use a state-of-the-art self-supervised robot learning framework (Reinforcement Learning with Imagined Goals (RIG) using Soft Actor-Critic) as baseline for experimental verification. Experiments show that our method can auto-tune online and yields the best performance at a fraction of the time and computational resources. Code, video, and appendix for simulated and real-robot experiments can be found at the project page \url{www.JuanRojas.net/autotune}.
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的策略优化需要在不同环境中选择大量超参数。错误地修复它们可能会对优化性能产生负面影响，特别是导致学习不足或冗余。学习不足（由于收敛到局部最优）会导致政策表现不佳，而多余的学习会浪费时间和资源。当使用单一策略来解决多任务学习问题时，这种影响会进一步加剧。观察到变分自动编码器中使用的证据下界（ELBO）与图像样本的多样性相关，我们提出了一种基于 ELBO 的自动调整技术，用于自监督强化学习。我们的方法可以自动调整三个超参数：重放缓冲区大小、每个时期期间的策略梯度更新数量以及每个时期期间的探索步骤数量。我们使用最先进的自监督机器人学习框架（使用 Soft Actor-Critic 的具有想象目标的强化学习（RIG））作为实验验证的基准。实验表明，我们的方法可以在线自动调整，并以很少的时间和计算资源产生最佳性能。模拟和真实机器人实验的代码、视频和附录可以在项目页面 \url{www.JuanRojas.net/autotune} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ELBO的自监督强化学习超参数自动调整方法，用于优化机器人学习中的策略优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习中固定超参数可能导致学习效率低下或资源浪费，尤其在多任务场景下问题更显著。
AI.method: 通过分析ELBO与图像样本多样性的关联性，设计在线自动调整机制，动态优化回放缓冲区大小、策略梯度更新次数和探索步数三个关键超参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持最佳性能的同时，将训练时间与计算资源消耗降低至传统方法的分数之一。
AI.conclusion: 基于ELBO的自适应超参数调整技术能有效提升自监督机器人学习的效率与实用性。

result: 实验表明该方法在保持最佳性能的同时，将训练时间与计算资源消耗降低至传统方法的分数之一。
conclusion: 基于ELBO的自适应超参数调整技术能有效提升自监督机器人学习的效率与实用性。
search_text: Hyperparameter Auto-tuning in Self-Supervised Robotic Learning 自监督机器人学习中的超参数自动调整 Policy optimization in reinforcement learning requires the selection of numerous hyperparameters across different environments. Fixing them incorrectly may negatively impact optimization performance leading notably to insufficient or redundant learning. Insufficient learning (due to convergence to local optima) results in under-performing policies whilst redundant learning wastes time and resources. The effects are further exacerbated when using single policies to solve multi-task learning problems. Observing that the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO) used in Variational Auto-Encoders correlates with the diversity of image samples, we propose an auto-tuning technique based on the ELBO for self-supervised reinforcement learning. Our approach can auto-tune three hyperparameters: the replay buffer size, the number of policy gradient updates during each epoch, and the number of exploration steps during each epoch. We use a state-of-the-art self-supervised robot learning framework (Reinforcement Learning with Imagined Goals (RIG) using Soft Actor-Critic) as baseline for experimental verification. Experiments show that our method can auto-tune online and yields the best performance at a fraction of the time and computational resources. Code, video, and appendix for simulated and real-robot experiments can be found at the project page \url{www.JuanRojas.net/autotune}. 强化学习中的策略优化需要在不同环境中选择大量超参数。错误地修复它们可能会对优化性能产生负面影响，特别是导致学习不足或冗余。学习不足（由于收敛到局部最优）会导致政策表现不佳，而多余的学习会浪费时间和资源。当使用单一策略来解决多任务学习问题时，这种影响会进一步加剧。观察到变分自动编码器中使用的证据下界（ELBO）与图像样本的多样性相关，我们提出了一种基于 ELBO 的自动调整技术，用于自监督强化学习。我们的方法可以自动调整三个超参数：重放缓冲区大小、每个时期期间的策略梯度更新数量以及每个时期期间的探索步骤数量。我们使用最先进的自监督机器人学习框架（使用 Soft Actor-Critic 的具有想象目标的强化学习（RIG））作为实验验证的基准。实验表明，我们的方法可以在线自动调整，并以很少的时间和计算资源产生最佳性能。模拟和真实机器人实验的代码、视频和附录可以在项目页面 \url{www.JuanRojas.net/autotune} 中找到。 本文提出一种基于ELBO的自监督强化学习超参数自动调整方法，用于优化机器人学习中的策略优化问题。 Jiancong Huang,Juan Rojas,Matthieu Zimmer,Hongmin Wu,Yisheng Guan,Paul Weng cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Andras Horvath,Jalal Al-afandi
title: Filtered Batch Normalization
title_zh: 过滤批量归一化
abstract: It is a common assumption that the activation of different layers in neural networks follow Gaussian distribution. This distribution can be transformed using normalization techniques, such as batch-normalization, increasing convergence speed and improving accuracy. In this paper we would like to demonstrate, that activations do not necessarily follow Gaussian distribution in all layers. Neurons in deeper layers are more selective and specific which can result extremely large, out-of-distribution activations. We will demonstrate that one can create more consistent mean and variance values for batch normalization during training by filtering out these activations which can further improve convergence speed and yield higher validation accuracy.
summary: It is a common assumption that the activation of different layers in neural networks follow Gaussian distribution. This distribution can be transformed using normalization techniques, such as batch-normalization, increasing convergence speed and improving accuracy. In this paper we would like to demonstrate, that activations do not necessarily follow Gaussian distribution in all layers. Neurons in deeper layers are more selective and specific which can result extremely large, out-of-distribution activations. We will demonstrate that one can create more consistent mean and variance values for batch normalization during training by filtering out these activations which can further improve convergence speed and yield higher validation accuracy.
abstract_zh: 通常的假设是神经网络中不同层的激活遵循高斯分布。可以使用归一化技术（例如批量归一化）来转换该分布，从而提高收敛速度并提高准确性。在本文中，我们想证明，激活不一定在所有层中遵循高斯分布。更深层的神经元更具选择性和特异性，这可能会导致极大的、不符合分布的激活。我们将证明，通过过滤掉这些激活，可以在训练期间为批量归一化创建更一致的均值和方差值，这可以进一步提高收敛速度并产生更高的验证准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的批归一化方法，通过过滤深层网络中异常的激活值来提升模型收敛速度和验证准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统批归一化假设激活值服从高斯分布，但深层网络中神经元的选择性导致激活值可能出现极端异常值，破坏归一化效果。
AI.method: 在训练过程中过滤掉超出分布范围的极端激活值，使批归一化的均值和方差计算更稳定。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法提升了收敛速度并提高了验证集准确率。
AI.conclusion: 过滤异常激活值能有效改进批归一化，增强模型训练效率和性能。

authors_text: Baifeng Shi,Judy Hoffman,Kate Saenko,Trevor Darrell,Huijuan Xu
title: Auxiliary Task Reweighting for Minimum-data Learning
title_zh: 最小数据学习的辅助任务重新加权
abstract: Supervised learning requires a large amount of training data, limiting its application where labeled data is scarce. To compensate for data scarcity, one possible method is to utilize auxiliary tasks to provide additional supervision for the main task. Assigning and optimizing the importance weights for different auxiliary tasks remains an crucial and largely understudied research question. In this work, we propose a method to automatically reweight auxiliary tasks in order to reduce the data requirement on the main task. Specifically, we formulate the weighted likelihood function of auxiliary tasks as a surrogate prior for the main task. By adjusting the auxiliary task weights to minimize the divergence between the surrogate prior and the true prior of the main task, we obtain a more accurate prior estimation, achieving the goal of minimizing the required amount of training data for the main task and avoiding a costly grid search. In multiple experimental settings (e.g. semi-supervised learning, multi-label classification), we demonstrate that our algorithm can effectively utilize limited labeled data of the main task with the benefit of auxiliary tasks compared with previous task reweighting methods. We also show that under extreme cases with only a few extra examples (e.g. few-shot domain adaptation), our algorithm results in significant improvement over the baseline.
summary: Supervised learning requires a large amount of training data, limiting its application where labeled data is scarce. To compensate for data scarcity, one possible method is to utilize auxiliary tasks to provide additional supervision for the main task. Assigning and optimizing the importance weights for different auxiliary tasks remains an crucial and largely understudied research question. In this work, we propose a method to automatically reweight auxiliary tasks in order to reduce the data requirement on the main task. Specifically, we formulate the weighted likelihood function of auxiliary tasks as a surrogate prior for the main task. By adjusting the auxiliary task weights to minimize the divergence between the surrogate prior and the true prior of the main task, we obtain a more accurate prior estimation, achieving the goal of minimizing the required amount of training data for the main task and avoiding a costly grid search. In multiple experimental settings (e.g. semi-supervised learning, multi-label classification), we demonstrate that our algorithm can effectively utilize limited labeled data of the main task with the benefit of auxiliary tasks compared with previous task reweighting methods. We also show that under extreme cases with only a few extra examples (e.g. few-shot domain adaptation), our algorithm results in significant improvement over the baseline.
abstract_zh: 监督学习需要大量的训练数据，限制了其在标记数据稀缺的情况下的应用。为了弥补数据稀缺，一种可能的方法是利用辅助任务为主要任务提供额外的监督。分配和优化不同辅助任务的重要性权重仍然是一个至关重要且很大程度上未被充分研究的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自动重新加权辅助任务的方法，以减少主任务的数据需求。具体来说，我们制定辅助任务的加权似然函数作为主要任务的替代先验。通过调整辅助任务权重以最小化主任务的代理先验和真实先验之间的差异，我们获得了更准确的先验估计，实现了最小化主任务所需的训练数据量并避免昂贵的网格搜索的目标。在多个实验设置（例如半监督学习、多标签分类）中，我们证明了与以前的任务重新加权方法相比，我们的算法可以有效地利用主任务的有限标记数据，并具有辅助任务的优势。我们还表明，在极端情况下，只有一些额外的例子（例如少样本域适应），我们的算法比基线有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动重新加权辅助任务的方法，以减少主任务所需的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 监督学习需要大量训练数据，这在标注数据稀缺的情况下限制了其应用。利用辅助任务提供额外监督是一种可能的解决方案，但如何为不同辅助任务分配和优化重要性权重仍是一个关键且研究不足的问题。
AI.method: 本文将辅助任务的加权似然函数公式化为一个替代先验，通过调整辅助任务权重以最小化替代先验与主任务真实先验之间的差异，从而获得更准确的先验估计。
AI.result: 在多个实验设置（如半监督学习、多标签分类）中，该算法相比之前的任务重新加权方法能够更有效地利用有限的主任务标注数据，并在极端情况下（如少量额外示例）显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了主任务所需的训练数据量，避免了代价高昂的网格搜索，并在多种任务设置中展示了优越性。

authors_text: Cristiano Saltori,Stéphane Lathuiliére,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci,Fabio Galasso
title: SF-UDA$^{3D}$: Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detection
title_zh: SF-UDA$^{3D}$：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的无源无监督域适应
abstract: 3D object detectors based only on LiDAR point clouds hold the state-of-the-art on modern street-view benchmarks. However, LiDAR-based detectors poorly generalize across domains due to domain shift. In the case of LiDAR, in fact, domain shift is not only due to changes in the environment and in the object appearances, as for visual data from RGB cameras, but is also related to the geometry of the point clouds (e.g., point density variations). This paper proposes SF-UDA$^{3D}$, the first Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA) framework to domain-adapt the state-of-the-art PointRCNN 3D detector to target domains for which we have no annotations (unsupervised), neither we hold images nor annotations of the source domain (source-free). SF-UDA$^{3D}$ is novel on both aspects. Our approach is based on pseudo-annotations, reversible scale-transformations and motion coherency. SF-UDA$^{3D}$ outperforms both previous domain adaptation techniques based on features alignment and state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods which additionally use few-shot target annotations or target annotation statistics. This is demonstrated by extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and nuScenes.
summary: 3D object detectors based only on LiDAR point clouds hold the state-of-the-art on modern street-view benchmarks. However, LiDAR-based detectors poorly generalize across domains due to domain shift. In the case of LiDAR, in fact, domain shift is not only due to changes in the environment and in the object appearances, as for visual data from RGB cameras, but is also related to the geometry of the point clouds (e.g., point density variations). This paper proposes SF-UDA$^{3D}$, the first Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA) framework to domain-adapt the state-of-the-art PointRCNN 3D detector to target domains for which we have no annotations (unsupervised), neither we hold images nor annotations of the source domain (source-free). SF-UDA$^{3D}$ is novel on both aspects. Our approach is based on pseudo-annotations, reversible scale-transformations and motion coherency. SF-UDA$^{3D}$ outperforms both previous domain adaptation techniques based on features alignment and state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods which additionally use few-shot target annotations or target annotation statistics. This is demonstrated by extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and nuScenes.
abstract_zh: 仅基于 LiDAR 点云的 3D 物体探测器在现代街景基准上保持着最先进的水平。然而，由于域转移，基于激光雷达的探测器很难跨域泛化。事实上，就 LiDAR 而言，域偏移不仅是由于环境和物体外观的变化（如 RGB 相机的视觉数据）引起的，而且还与点云的几何形状（例如点密度变化）有关。本文提出了 SF-UDA$^{3D}$，这是第一个无源无监督域适应 (SF-UDA) 框架，用于将最先进的 PointRCNN 3D 检测器域适应到我们没有注释（无监督）的目标域，我们既不保存源域的图像，也不保存源域的注释（无源）。 SF-UDA$^{3D}$ 在这两个方面都是新颖的。我们的方法基于伪注释、可逆尺度变换和运动一致性。 SF-UDA$^{3D}$ 优于之前基于特征对齐的领域适应技术和最先进的 3D 对象检测方法，这些方法另外使用少样本目标注释或目标注释统计数据。这通过两个大型数据集（即 KITTI 和 nuScenes）的大量实验得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SF-UDA³，一种源自由的无监督域适应框架，用于解决基于LiDAR点云的3D目标检测器在跨域场景下的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法依赖源域数据或目标域少量标注，而实际场景中可能无法获取这些数据；LiDAR点云的域偏移不仅涉及环境变化，还包含点云几何结构（如密度）差异，现有方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 通过伪标注生成、可逆尺度变换（消除点云密度差异）和运动一致性约束（增强时空信息对齐），实现无需源域数据和目标域标注的跨域适配。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上，SF-UDA³优于基于特征对齐的域适应方法及需少量标注的最新3D检测方法，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出源自由的无监督域适应框架，通过几何感知的适配策略有效解决LiDAR点云跨域检测难题，为实际部署提供新思路。

search_text: SF-UDA$^{3D}$: Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detection SF-UDA$^{3D}$：基于 LiDAR 的 3D 物体检测的无源无监督域适应 3D object detectors based only on LiDAR point clouds hold the state-of-the-art on modern street-view benchmarks. However, LiDAR-based detectors poorly generalize across domains due to domain shift. In the case of LiDAR, in fact, domain shift is not only due to changes in the environment and in the object appearances, as for visual data from RGB cameras, but is also related to the geometry of the point clouds (e.g., point density variations). This paper proposes SF-UDA$^{3D}$, the first Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA) framework to domain-adapt the state-of-the-art PointRCNN 3D detector to target domains for which we have no annotations (unsupervised), neither we hold images nor annotations of the source domain (source-free). SF-UDA$^{3D}$ is novel on both aspects. Our approach is based on pseudo-annotations, reversible scale-transformations and motion coherency. SF-UDA$^{3D}$ outperforms both previous domain adaptation techniques based on features alignment and state-of-the-art 3D object detection methods which additionally use few-shot target annotations or target annotation statistics. This is demonstrated by extensive experiments on two large-scale datasets, i.e., KITTI and nuScenes. 仅基于 LiDAR 点云的 3D 物体探测器在现代街景基准上保持着最先进的水平。然而，由于域转移，基于激光雷达的探测器很难跨域泛化。事实上，就 LiDAR 而言，域偏移不仅是由于环境和物体外观的变化（如 RGB 相机的视觉数据）引起的，而且还与点云的几何形状（例如点密度变化）有关。本文提出了 SF-UDA$^{3D}$，这是第一个无源无监督域适应 (SF-UDA) 框架，用于将最先进的 PointRCNN 3D 检测器域适应到我们没有注释（无监督）的目标域，我们既不保存源域的图像，也不保存源域的注释（无源）。 SF-UDA$^{3D}$ 在这两个方面都是新颖的。我们的方法基于伪注释、可逆尺度变换和运动一致性。 SF-UDA$^{3D}$ 优于之前基于特征对齐的领域适应技术和最先进的 3D 对象检测方法，这些方法另外使用少样本目标注释或目标注释统计数据。这通过两个大型数据集（即 KITTI 和 nuScenes）的大量实验得到了证明。 本文提出SF-UDA³，一种源自由的无监督域适应框架，用于解决基于LiDAR点云的3D目标检测器在跨域场景下的泛化问题。 Cristiano Saltori,Stéphane Lathuiliére,Nicu Sebe,Elisa Ricci,Fabio Galasso cs.CV

authors_text: Youngjin Park,Deokjun Eom,Byoungki Seo,Jaesik Choi
title: Improved Predictive Deep Temporal Neural Networks with Trend Filtering
title_zh: 具有趋势过滤功能的改进预测深度时态神经网络
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, ICAIF 2020: ACM International Conference on AI in Finance
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, ICAIF 2020: ACM International Conference on AI in Finance
abstract: Forecasting with multivariate time series, which aims to predict future values given previous and current several univariate time series data, has been studied for decades, with one example being ARIMA. Because it is difficult to measure the extent to which noise is mixed with informative signals within rapidly fluctuating financial time series data, designing a good predictive model is not a simple task. Recently, many researchers have become interested in recurrent neural networks and attention-based neural networks, applying them in financial forecasting. There have been many attempts to utilize these methods for the capturing of long-term temporal dependencies and to select more important features in multivariate time series data in order to make accurate predictions. In this paper, we propose a new prediction framework based on deep neural networks and a trend filtering, which converts noisy time series data into a piecewise linear fashion. We reveal that the predictive performance of deep temporal neural networks improves when the training data is temporally processed by a trend filtering. To verify the effect of our framework, three deep temporal neural networks, state of the art models for predictions in time series finance data, are used and compared with models that contain trend filtering as an input feature. Extensive experiments on real-world multivariate time series data show that the proposed method is effective and significantly better than existing baseline methods.
summary: Forecasting with multivariate time series, which aims to predict future values given previous and current several univariate time series data, has been studied for decades, with one example being ARIMA. Because it is difficult to measure the extent to which noise is mixed with informative signals within rapidly fluctuating financial time series data, designing a good predictive model is not a simple task. Recently, many researchers have become interested in recurrent neural networks and attention-based neural networks, applying them in financial forecasting. There have been many attempts to utilize these methods for the capturing of long-term temporal dependencies and to select more important features in multivariate time series data in order to make accurate predictions. In this paper, we propose a new prediction framework based on deep neural networks and a trend filtering, which converts noisy time series data into a piecewise linear fashion. We reveal that the predictive performance of deep temporal neural networks improves when the training data is temporally processed by a trend filtering. To verify the effect of our framework, three deep temporal neural networks, state of the art models for predictions in time series finance data, are used and compared with models that contain trend filtering as an input feature. Extensive experiments on real-world multivariate time series data show that the proposed method is effective and significantly better than existing baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列预测旨在根据先前和当前的多个单变量时间序列数据来预测未来值，这一研究已经进行了数十年，ARIMA 就是一个例子。由于很难测量快速波动的金融时间序列数据中噪声与信息信号混合的程度，因此设计良好的预测模型并不是一项简单的任务。最近，许多研究人员对循环神经网络和基于注意力的神经网络产生了兴趣，并将其应用于金融预测。人们已经进行了许多尝试，利用这些方法来捕获长期时间依赖性，并在多元时间序列数据中选择更重要的特征，以便做出准确的预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度神经网络和趋势过滤的新预测框架，它将噪声时间序列数据转换为分段线性方式。我们发现，当通过趋势过滤对训练数据进行时间处理时，深度时间神经网络的预测性能会得到改善。为了验证我们框架的效果，使用了三个深度时序神经网络（用于时间序列金融数据预测的最先进模型），并将其与包含趋势过滤作为输入特征的模型进行比较。对现实世界多元时间序列数据的大量实验表明，所提出的方法是有效的，并且明显优于现有的基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度神经网络和趋势过滤的新框架，用于改进多变量时间序列的预测性能，特别是在金融时间序列数据中。
AI.motivation: 金融时间序列数据波动剧烈且噪声多，传统模型如ARIMA和近期的循环神经网络/注意力网络难以有效捕捉长期依赖关系并筛选重要特征，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 通过趋势过滤将噪声时间序列数据转换为分段线性形式，并将其作为输入特征集成到三种先进的深度时序神经网络模型中，对比验证其效果。
AI.result: 在真实世界多变量时间序列数据上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基线方法，预测性能提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 趋势过滤能够有效提升深度时序神经网络的预测能力，为金融时间序列分析提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Krzysztof Domino,Mátyás Koniorczyk,Krzysztof Krawiec,Konrad Jałowiecki,Bartłomiej Gardas
title: Quantum computing approach to railway dispatching and conflict management optimization on single-track railway lines
title_zh: 单线铁路线路的铁路调度和冲突管理优化的量子计算方法
comment: 36 pages, 17 figures, secondrevision based on reviewers' comments
comments: 36 pages, 17 figures, secondrevision based on reviewers' comments
abstract: In this work, we consider a practical railway dispatching problem: delay and conflict management on a single-track railway line. We examine the issue of train dispatching consequences caused by the arrival of an already delayed train to the segment being considered. This problem is computationally hard and often needs to be solved timely. Here, we introduce a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) model of the problem in question, compatible with the emerging quantum annealing technology. The model's instances can be executed on present-day quantum annealers. As a proof-of-concept, we solve selected real-life problems from the Polish railway network using D-Wave quantum annealers. As a reference, we also provide solutions calculated with classical methods, including those relevant to the community (linear integer programming) and a sophisticated algorithm based on tensor networks for solving QUBO problems.
summary: In this work, we consider a practical railway dispatching problem: delay and conflict management on a single-track railway line. We examine the issue of train dispatching consequences caused by the arrival of an already delayed train to the segment being considered. This problem is computationally hard and often needs to be solved timely. Here, we introduce a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) model of the problem in question, compatible with the emerging quantum annealing technology. The model's instances can be executed on present-day quantum annealers. As a proof-of-concept, we solve selected real-life problems from the Polish railway network using D-Wave quantum annealers. As a reference, we also provide solutions calculated with classical methods, including those relevant to the community (linear integer programming) and a sophisticated algorithm based on tensor networks for solving QUBO problems.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑一个实际的铁路调度问题：单轨铁路线上的延误和冲突管理。我们研究了因已经延误的列车到达所考虑的路段而造成的列车调度后果问题。这个问题计算困难，通常需要及时解决。在这里，我们引入了所讨论问题的二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）模型，该模型与新兴的量子退火技术兼容。该模型的实例可以在当今的量子退火器上执行。作为概念验证，我们使用 D-Wave 量子退火器解决了波兰铁路网络中选定的现实问题。作为参考，我们还提供了使用经典方法计算的解决方案，包括与社区相关的方法（线性整数规划）以及基于张量网络的用于解决 QUBO 问题的复杂算法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用量子计算方法优化单线铁路的列车调度与冲突管理，解决因列车延误导致的调度问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理复杂且需快速解决的铁路调度问题时存在局限，需探索更高效的量子计算方法。
AI.method: 构建QUBO模型并利用量子退火技术（如D-Wave）求解，同时采用经典方法（如线性整数规划和张量网络算法）进行对比验证。
AI.result: 成功在波兰铁路网络的实际案例中应用量子退火技术，验证了其有效性，并与经典方法结果进行了对比。
AI.conclusion: 量子退火技术在解决铁路调度问题上展现出潜力，但需进一步优化模型和硬件以提升实际应用效果。

search_text: Quantum computing approach to railway dispatching and conflict management optimization on single-track railway lines 单线铁路线路的铁路调度和冲突管理优化的量子计算方法 In this work, we consider a practical railway dispatching problem: delay and conflict management on a single-track railway line. We examine the issue of train dispatching consequences caused by the arrival of an already delayed train to the segment being considered. This problem is computationally hard and often needs to be solved timely. Here, we introduce a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) model of the problem in question, compatible with the emerging quantum annealing technology. The model's instances can be executed on present-day quantum annealers. As a proof-of-concept, we solve selected real-life problems from the Polish railway network using D-Wave quantum annealers. As a reference, we also provide solutions calculated with classical methods, including those relevant to the community (linear integer programming) and a sophisticated algorithm based on tensor networks for solving QUBO problems. 在这项工作中，我们考虑一个实际的铁路调度问题：单轨铁路线上的延误和冲突管理。我们研究了因已经延误的列车到达所考虑的路段而造成的列车调度后果问题。这个问题计算困难，通常需要及时解决。在这里，我们引入了所讨论问题的二次无约束二元优化（QUBO）模型，该模型与新兴的量子退火技术兼容。该模型的实例可以在当今的量子退火器上执行。作为概念验证，我们使用 D-Wave 量子退火器解决了波兰铁路网络中选定的现实问题。作为参考，我们还提供了使用经典方法计算的解决方案，包括与社区相关的方法（线性整数规划）以及基于张量网络的用于解决 QUBO 问题的复杂算法。 本文旨在利用量子计算方法优化单线铁路的列车调度与冲突管理，解决因列车延误导致的调度问题。 Krzysztof Domino,Mátyás Koniorczyk,Krzysztof Krawiec,Konrad Jałowiecki,Bartłomiej Gardas cs.ET,math.OC,quant-ph

authors_text: Michael Fürst,Shriya T. P. Gupta,René Schuster,Oliver Wasenmüller,Didier Stricker
title: HPERL: 3D Human Pose Estimation from RGB and LiDAR
title_zh: HPERL：根据 RGB 和 LiDAR 进行 3D 人体姿势估计
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables, LiDAR and RGB Fusion
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables, LiDAR and RGB Fusion
abstract: In-the-wild human pose estimation has a huge potential for various fields, ranging from animation and action recognition to intention recognition and prediction for autonomous driving. The current state-of-the-art is focused only on RGB and RGB-D approaches for predicting the 3D human pose. However, not using precise LiDAR depth information limits the performance and leads to very inaccurate absolute pose estimation. With LiDAR sensors becoming more affordable and common on robots and autonomous vehicle setups, we propose an end-to-end architecture using RGB and LiDAR to predict the absolute 3D human pose with unprecedented precision. Additionally, we introduce a weakly-supervised approach to generate 3D predictions using 2D pose annotations from PedX [1]. This allows for many new opportunities in the field of 3D human pose estimation.
summary: In-the-wild human pose estimation has a huge potential for various fields, ranging from animation and action recognition to intention recognition and prediction for autonomous driving. The current state-of-the-art is focused only on RGB and RGB-D approaches for predicting the 3D human pose. However, not using precise LiDAR depth information limits the performance and leads to very inaccurate absolute pose estimation. With LiDAR sensors becoming more affordable and common on robots and autonomous vehicle setups, we propose an end-to-end architecture using RGB and LiDAR to predict the absolute 3D human pose with unprecedented precision. Additionally, we introduce a weakly-supervised approach to generate 3D predictions using 2D pose annotations from PedX [1]. This allows for many new opportunities in the field of 3D human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 野外人体姿势估计在各个领域具有巨大潜力，从动画和动作识别到自动驾驶的意图识别和预测。当前最先进的技术仅关注用于预测 3D 人体姿势的 RGB 和 RGB-D 方法。然而，不使用精确的 LiDAR 深度信息会限制性能并导致绝对姿态估计非常不准确。随着 LiDAR 传感器在机器人和自动驾驶车辆设置中变得更加经济实惠和普遍，我们提出了一种使用 RGB 和 LiDAR 的端到端架构，以前所未有的精度预测绝对 3D 人体姿势。此外，我们引入了一种弱监督方法，使用 PedX [1] 的 2D 姿态注释生成 3D 预测。这为 3D 人体姿势估计领域带来了许多新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HPERL方法，结合RGB和LiDAR数据实现高精度的3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖RGB或RGB-D数据，无法充分利用LiDAR的精确深度信息，导致绝对姿态估计不准确。随着LiDAR成本下降，亟需融合多模态数据提升精度。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络架构联合处理RGB和LiDAR数据，并引入弱监督方法利用PedX数据集的2D姿态标注生成3D预测。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现前所未有的绝对3D姿态估计精度，验证了LiDAR与RGB融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态数据融合与弱监督学习，显著提升了3D人体姿态估计性能，为自动驾驶等场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Ilias Aouaj,Vincent Padois,Alessandro Saccon
title: Predicting the Post-Impact Velocity of a Robotic Arm via Rigid Multibody Models: an Experimental Study
title_zh: 通过刚性多体模型预测机械臂的撞击后速度：实验研究
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, May 2021, Xi'an, China
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation, May 2021, Xi'an, China
abstract: Accurate post-impact velocity predictions are essential in developing impact-aware manipulation strategies for robots, where contacts are intentionally established at non-zero speed mimicking human manipulation abilities in dynamic grasping and pushing of objects. Starting from the recorded dynamic response of a 7DOF torque-controlled robot that intentionally impacts a rigid surface, we investigate the possibility and accuracy of predicting the post-impact robot velocity from the pre-impact velocity and impact configuration. The velocity prediction is obtained by means of an impact map, derived using the framework of nonsmooth mechanics, that makes use of the known rigid-body robot model and the assumption of a frictionless inelastic impact.The main contribution is proposing a methodology that allows for a meaningful quantitative comparison between the recorded post-impact data, that exhibits a damped oscillatory response after the impact, and the post-impact velocity prediction derived via the readily available rigid-body robot model, that presents no oscillations and that is the one typically obtained via mainstream robot simulator software. The results of this new approach are promising in terms of prediction accuracy and thus relevant for the growing field of impact-aware robot control. The recorded impact data (18 experiments) is made publicly available, together with the numerical routines employed to generate the quantitative comparison, to further stimulate interest/research in this field.
summary: Accurate post-impact velocity predictions are essential in developing impact-aware manipulation strategies for robots, where contacts are intentionally established at non-zero speed mimicking human manipulation abilities in dynamic grasping and pushing of objects. Starting from the recorded dynamic response of a 7DOF torque-controlled robot that intentionally impacts a rigid surface, we investigate the possibility and accuracy of predicting the post-impact robot velocity from the pre-impact velocity and impact configuration. The velocity prediction is obtained by means of an impact map, derived using the framework of nonsmooth mechanics, that makes use of the known rigid-body robot model and the assumption of a frictionless inelastic impact.The main contribution is proposing a methodology that allows for a meaningful quantitative comparison between the recorded post-impact data, that exhibits a damped oscillatory response after the impact, and the post-impact velocity prediction derived via the readily available rigid-body robot model, that presents no oscillations and that is the one typically obtained via mainstream robot simulator software. The results of this new approach are promising in terms of prediction accuracy and thus relevant for the growing field of impact-aware robot control. The recorded impact data (18 experiments) is made publicly available, together with the numerical routines employed to generate the quantitative comparison, to further stimulate interest/research in this field.
abstract_zh: 准确的撞击后速度预测对于开发机器人的撞击感知操纵策略至关重要，其中有意以非零速度建立接触，模仿人类动态抓取和推动物体的操纵能力。从记录的有意撞击刚性表面的 7DOF 扭矩控制机器人的动态响应开始，我们研究了根据撞击前速度和撞击配置预测撞击后机器人速度的可能性和准确性。速度预测是通过使用非光滑力学框架导出的碰撞图获得的，该碰撞图利用了已知的刚体机器人模型和无摩擦非弹性碰撞的假设。主要贡献是提出了一种方法，可以对记录的碰撞后数据（碰撞后表现出阻尼振荡响应）和通过现成的刚体机器人模型得出的碰撞后速度预测进行有意义的定量比较，该碰撞后速度预测不存在振动，通常通过主流机器人获得模拟器软件。这种新方法的结果在预测精度方面很有希望，因此与不断发展的冲击感知机器人控制领域相关。记录的影响数据（18 个实验）连同用于生成定量比较的数值例程一起公开，以进一步激发对该领域的兴趣/研究。

AI.tldr: 通过刚性多体模型预测机械臂撞击后的速度：一项实验研究
AI.motivation: 开发具有冲击感知能力的机器人操作策略需要准确预测撞击后的速度，以模拟人类在动态抓取和推动物体时的能力。
AI.method: 基于记录的7自由度力控机器人撞击刚性表面的动态响应，利用非光滑力学框架构建冲击映射，结合刚体机器人模型和无摩擦非弹性冲击假设进行预测。
AI.result: 提出的预测方法在18组实验中展现出较高的准确性，能够有效对比实际阻尼振荡响应与传统仿真软件的无振荡预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为冲击感知机器人控制领域提供了量化分析新思路，公开的实验数据和代码有助于推动相关研究发展。

The velocity prediction is obtained by means of an impact map, derived using the framework of nonsmooth mechanics, that makes use of the known rigid-body robot model and the assumption of a frictionless inelastic impact.The main contribution is proposing a methodology that allows for a meaningful quantitative comparison between the recorded post-impact data, that exhibits a damped oscillatory response after the impact, and the post-impact velocity prediction derived via the readily available rigid-body robot model, that presents no oscillations and that is the one typically obtained via mainstream robot simulator software. The results of this new approach are promising in terms of prediction accuracy and thus relevant for the growing field of impact-aware robot control. The recorded impact data (18 experiments) is made publicly available, together with the numerical routines employed to generate the quantitative comparison, to further stimulate interest/research in this field. 准确的撞击后速度预测对于开发机器人的撞击感知操纵策略至关重要，其中有意以非零速度建立接触，模仿人类动态抓取和推动物体的操纵能力。从记录的有意撞击刚性表面的 7DOF 扭矩控制机器人的动态响应开始，我们研究了根据撞击前速度和撞击配置预测撞击后机器人速度的可能性和准确性。速度预测是通过使用非光滑力学框架导出的碰撞图获得的，该碰撞图利用了已知的刚体机器人模型和无摩擦非弹性碰撞的假设。主要贡献是提出了一种方法，可以对记录的碰撞后数据（碰撞后表现出阻尼振荡响应）和通过现成的刚体机器人模型得出的碰撞后速度预测进行有意义的定量比较，该碰撞后速度预测不存在振动，通常通过主流机器人获得模拟器软件。这种新方法的结果在预测精度方面很有希望，因此与不断发展的冲击感知机器人控制领域相关。记录的影响数据（18 个实验）连同用于生成定量比较的数值例程一起公开，以进一步激发对该领域的兴趣/研究。 通过刚性多体模型预测机械臂撞击后的速度：一项实验研究 Ilias Aouaj,Vincent Padois,Alessandro Saccon cs.RO

authors_text: Yuge Zhang,Quanlu Zhang,Yaming Yang
title: How Does Supernet Help in Neural Architecture Search?
title_zh: Supernet 如何帮助神经架构搜索？
comment: Accepted by 2nd Workshop on Neural Architecture Search at ICLR 2021
comments: Accepted by 2nd Workshop on Neural Architecture Search at ICLR 2021
abstract: Weight sharing, as an approach to speed up architecture performance estimation has received wide attention. Instead of training each architecture separately, weight sharing builds a supernet that assembles all the architectures as its submodels. However, there has been debate over whether the NAS process actually benefits from weight sharing, due to the gap between supernet optimization and the objective of NAS. To further understand the effect of weight sharing on NAS, we conduct a comprehensive analysis on five search spaces, including NAS-Bench-101, NAS-Bench-201, DARTS-CIFAR10, DARTS-PTB, and ProxylessNAS. We find that weight sharing works well on some search spaces but fails on others. Taking a step forward, we further identified biases accounting for such phenomenon and the capacity of weight sharing. Our work is expected to inspire future NAS researchers to better leverage the power of weight sharing.
summary: Weight sharing, as an approach to speed up architecture performance estimation has received wide attention. Instead of training each architecture separately, weight sharing builds a supernet that assembles all the architectures as its submodels. However, there has been debate over whether the NAS process actually benefits from weight sharing, due to the gap between supernet optimization and the objective of NAS. To further understand the effect of weight sharing on NAS, we conduct a comprehensive analysis on five search spaces, including NAS-Bench-101, NAS-Bench-201, DARTS-CIFAR10, DARTS-PTB, and ProxylessNAS. We find that weight sharing works well on some search spaces but fails on others. Taking a step forward, we further identified biases accounting for such phenomenon and the capacity of weight sharing. Our work is expected to inspire future NAS researchers to better leverage the power of weight sharing.
abstract_zh: 权重共享作为一种加速架构性能估计的方法受到了广泛的关注。权重共享不是单独训练每个架构，而是构建一个超级网，将所有架构组装为其子模型。然而，由于超网优化与 NAS 目标之间的差距，关于 NAS 进程是否真正受益于权重共享一直存在争议。为了进一步了解权重共享对 NAS 的影响，我们对 NAS-Bench-101、NAS-Bench-201、DARTS-CIFAR10、DARTS-PTB 和 ProxylessNAS 五个搜索空间进行了综合分析。我们发现权重共享在某些搜索空间上效果很好，但在其他搜索空间上却失败了。向前迈出了一步，我们进一步确定了造成这种现象的偏差以及权重共享的能力。我们的工作预计将激励未来的 NAS 研究人员更好地利用权重共享的力量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了超网（Supernet）在神经网络架构搜索（NAS）中的作用，分析了权重共享机制在不同搜索空间中的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管权重共享被广泛用于加速NAS过程，但其实际效果存在争议，需进一步探讨其在不同场景下的有效性及潜在偏差。
AI.method: 通过在五个搜索空间（如NAS-Bench-101、DARTS-CIFAR10等）上进行实验，分析权重共享的效果并识别导致差异的关键因素。
AI.result: 权重共享在部分搜索空间中表现良好，但在其他场景下失效，研究发现了导致这一现象的偏差及权重共享的容量限制。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了权重共享的适用性条件，为未来NAS研究提供了更有效的超网设计指导。

authors_text: Sunny Verma,Jiwei Wang,Zhefeng Ge,Rujia Shen,Fan Jin,Yang Wang,Fang Chen,Wei Liu
title: Deep-HOSeq: Deep Higher Order Sequence Fusion for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: Deep-HOSeq：用于多模态情感分析的深度高阶序列融合
abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis utilizes multiple heterogeneous modalities for sentiment classification. The recent multimodal fusion schemes customize LSTMs to discover intra-modal dynamics and design sophisticated attention mechanisms to discover the inter-modal dynamics from multimodal sequences. Although powerful, these schemes completely rely on attention mechanisms which is problematic due to two major drawbacks 1) deceptive attention masks, and 2) training dynamics. Nevertheless, strenuous efforts are required to optimize hyperparameters of these consolidate architectures, in particular their custom-designed LSTMs constrained by attention schemes. In this research, we first propose a common network to discover both intra-modal and inter-modal dynamics by utilizing basic LSTMs and tensor based convolution networks. We then propose unique networks to encapsulate temporal-granularity among the modalities which is essential while extracting information within asynchronous sequences. We then integrate these two kinds of information via a fusion layer and call our novel multimodal fusion scheme as Deep-HOSeq (Deep network with higher order Common and Unique Sequence information). The proposed Deep-HOSeq efficiently discovers all-important information from multimodal sequences and the effectiveness of utilizing both types of information is empirically demonstrated on CMU-MOSEI and CMU-MOSI benchmark datasets. The source code of our proposed Deep-HOSeq is and available at https://github.com/sverma88/Deep-HOSeq--ICDM-2020.
summary: Multimodal sentiment analysis utilizes multiple heterogeneous modalities for sentiment classification. The recent multimodal fusion schemes customize LSTMs to discover intra-modal dynamics and design sophisticated attention mechanisms to discover the inter-modal dynamics from multimodal sequences. Although powerful, these schemes completely rely on attention mechanisms which is problematic due to two major drawbacks 1) deceptive attention masks, and 2) training dynamics. Nevertheless, strenuous efforts are required to optimize hyperparameters of these consolidate architectures, in particular their custom-designed LSTMs constrained by attention schemes. In this research, we first propose a common network to discover both intra-modal and inter-modal dynamics by utilizing basic LSTMs and tensor based convolution networks. We then propose unique networks to encapsulate temporal-granularity among the modalities which is essential while extracting information within asynchronous sequences. We then integrate these two kinds of information via a fusion layer and call our novel multimodal fusion scheme as Deep-HOSeq (Deep network with higher order Common and Unique Sequence information). The proposed Deep-HOSeq efficiently discovers all-important information from multimodal sequences and the effectiveness of utilizing both types of information is empirically demonstrated on CMU-MOSEI and CMU-MOSI benchmark datasets. The source code of our proposed Deep-HOSeq is and available at https://github.com/sverma88/Deep-HOSeq--ICDM-2020.
abstract_zh: 多模态情感分析利用多种异构模态进行情感分类。最近的多模态融合方案定制了 LSTM 以发现模态内动力学，并设计复杂的注意力机制以从多模态序列中发现模态间动力学。尽管功能强大，但这些方案完全依赖于注意力机制，但由于两个主要缺点，注意力机制存在问题：1）欺骗性注意力掩模，2）训练动态。然而，需要付出巨大的努力来优化这些整合架构的超参数，特别是受注意力方案约束的定制设计的 LSTM。在这项研究中，我们首先提出了一个通用网络，通过利用基本的 LSTM 和基于张量的卷积网络来发现模内和模间动态。然后，我们提出独特的网络来封装模态之间的时间粒度，这在异步序列中提取信息时至关重要。然后，我们通过融合层集成这两种信息，并将我们的新颖多模态融合方案称为 Deep-HOSeq（具有高阶公共和唯一序列信息的深度网络）。所提出的 Deep-HOSeq 有效地从多模态序列中发现所有重要信息，并且利用这两种类型信息的有效性在 CMU-MOSEI 和 CMU-MOSI 基准数据集上得到了实证证明。我们提出的 Deep-HOSeq 的源代码可在 https://github.com/sverma88/Deep-HOSeq--ICDM-2020 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep-HOSeq的多模态情感分析方法，通过结合基本LSTM和张量卷积网络来捕捉模态内和模态间动态信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖注意力机制，存在误导性注意力掩码和训练动态问题，且需复杂调参。本文旨在设计更稳健的融合方案以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 利用基础LSTM和张量卷积网络提取模态内/间动态，通过时序粒度网络处理异步序列，并通过融合层整合两种信息形成Deep-HOSeq框架。
AI.result: 在CMU-MOSEI和CMU-MOSI基准数据集上验证了Deep-HOSeq的有效性，证明了同时利用两种信息类型的优势。
AI.conclusion: Deep-HOSeq通过避免对注意力机制的完全依赖，有效捕捉多模态序列的关键信息，为多模态情感分析提供了新思路。
