authors_text: Zheng Liu,Fu Zhang
title: BALM: Bundle Adjustment for Lidar Mapping
title_zh: BALM：激光雷达测绘的捆绑调整
abstract: A local Bundle Adjustment (BA) on a sliding window of keyframes has been widely used in visual SLAM and proved to be very effective in lowering the drift. But in lidar SLAM, BA method is hardly used because the sparse feature points (e.g., edge and plane) make the exact point matching impossible. In this paper, we formulate the lidar BA as minimizing the distance from a feature point to its matched edge or plane. Unlike the visual SLAM (and prior plane adjustment method in lidar SLAM) where the feature has to be co-determined along with the pose, we show that the feature can be analytically solved and removed from the BA, the resultant BA is only dependent on the scan poses. This greatly reduces the optimization scale and allows large-scale dense plane and edge features to be used. To speedup the optimization, we derive the analytical derivatives of the cost function, up to second order, in closed form. Moreover, we propose a novel adaptive voxelization method to search feature correspondence efficiently. The proposed formulations are incorporated into a LOAM back-end for map refinement. Results show that, although as a back-end, the local BA can be solved very efficiently, even in real-time at 10Hz when optimizing 20 scans of point-cloud. The local BA also considerably lowers the LOAM drift. Our implementation of the BA optimization and LOAM are open-sourced to benefit the community.
summary: A local Bundle Adjustment (BA) on a sliding window of keyframes has been widely used in visual SLAM and proved to be very effective in lowering the drift. But in lidar SLAM, BA method is hardly used because the sparse feature points (e.g., edge and plane) make the exact point matching impossible. In this paper, we formulate the lidar BA as minimizing the distance from a feature point to its matched edge or plane. Unlike the visual SLAM (and prior plane adjustment method in lidar SLAM) where the feature has to be co-determined along with the pose, we show that the feature can be analytically solved and removed from the BA, the resultant BA is only dependent on the scan poses. This greatly reduces the optimization scale and allows large-scale dense plane and edge features to be used. To speedup the optimization, we derive the analytical derivatives of the cost function, up to second order, in closed form. Moreover, we propose a novel adaptive voxelization method to search feature correspondence efficiently. The proposed formulations are incorporated into a LOAM back-end for map refinement. Results show that, although as a back-end, the local BA can be solved very efficiently, even in real-time at 10Hz when optimizing 20 scans of point-cloud. The local BA also considerably lowers the LOAM drift. Our implementation of the BA optimization and LOAM are open-sourced to benefit the community.
abstract_zh: 关键帧滑动窗口上的局部捆绑调整（BA）已广泛应用于视觉 SLAM 中，并被证明对于降低漂移非常有效。但在激光雷达SLAM中，很难使用BA方法，因为稀疏的特征点（例如边缘和平面）使得精确的点匹配变得不可能。在本文中，我们将激光雷达 BA 公式化为最小化从特征点到其匹配边缘或平面的距离。与视觉 SLAM（以及激光雷达 SLAM 中的先前平面调整方法）不同，特征必须与姿态一起共同确定，我们表明可以分析求解特征并将其从 BA 中删除，得到的 BA 仅依赖于扫描姿态。这大大减少了优化规模，并允许使用大规模密集的平面和边缘特征。为了加速优化，我们以封闭形式导出了成本函数的解析导数（高达二阶）。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应体素化方法来有效地搜索特征对应关系。所提出的公式被纳入 LOAM 后端以进行地图细化。结果表明，虽然作为后端，但在优化 20 次点云扫描时，即使在 10Hz 下实时，也可以非常有效地求解局部 BA。局部 BA 也大大降低了 LOAM 漂移。我们对 BA 优化和 LOAM 的实施是开源的，以造福社区。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BALM方法，通过改进Bundle Adjustment（BA）技术解决LiDAR SLAM中的特征匹配难题，并优化大规模平面和边缘特征的处理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM中BA能有效降低漂移，但LiDAR SLAM因稀疏特征点（如边缘和平面）难以精确匹配而极少使用BA。现有方法需同时优化特征和位姿，导致计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 将LiDAR BA建模为最小化特征点到匹配边缘/平面的距离；通过解析求解特征并将其从BA中分离，仅优化扫描位姿；推导二阶解析导数并设计自适应体素化方法加速特征匹配。
AI.result: 实现10Hz实时优化20帧点云数据，显著降低LOAM漂移；开源代码验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: BALM通过解耦特征优化与位姿优化，提升LiDAR SLAM效率和精度，为大规模平面/边缘特征处理提供新思路。

Results show that, although as a back-end, the local BA can be solved very efficiently, even in real-time at 10Hz when optimizing 20 scans of point-cloud. authors_text: Yanghoon Kim,Seungpil Won,Seunghyun Yoon,Kyomin Jung
title: Collaborative Training of GANs in Continuous and Discrete Spaces for Text Generation
title_zh: 用于文本生成的连续和离散空间中的 GAN 协作训练
abstract: Applying generative adversarial networks (GANs) to text-related tasks is challenging due to the discrete nature of language. One line of research resolves this issue by employing reinforcement learning (RL) and optimizing the next-word sampling policy directly in a discrete action space. Such methods compute the rewards from complete sentences and avoid error accumulation due to exposure bias. Other approaches employ approximation techniques that map the text to continuous representation in order to circumvent the non-differentiable discrete process. Particularly, autoencoder-based methods effectively produce robust representations that can model complex discrete structures. In this paper, we propose a novel text GAN architecture that promotes the collaborative training of the continuous-space and discrete-space methods. Our method employs an autoencoder to learn an implicit data manifold, providing a learning objective for adversarial training in a continuous space. Furthermore, the complete textual output is directly evaluated and updated via RL in a discrete space. The collaborative interplay between the two adversarial trainings effectively regularize the text representations in different spaces. The experimental results on three standard benchmark datasets show that our model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art text GANs with respect to quality, diversity, and global consistency.
summary: Applying generative adversarial networks (GANs) to text-related tasks is challenging due to the discrete nature of language. One line of research resolves this issue by employing reinforcement learning (RL) and optimizing the next-word sampling policy directly in a discrete action space. Such methods compute the rewards from complete sentences and avoid error accumulation due to exposure bias. Other approaches employ approximation techniques that map the text to continuous representation in order to circumvent the non-differentiable discrete process. Particularly, autoencoder-based methods effectively produce robust representations that can model complex discrete structures. In this paper, we propose a novel text GAN architecture that promotes the collaborative training of the continuous-space and discrete-space methods. Our method employs an autoencoder to learn an implicit data manifold, providing a learning objective for adversarial training in a continuous space. Furthermore, the complete textual output is directly evaluated and updated via RL in a discrete space. The collaborative interplay between the two adversarial trainings effectively regularize the text representations in different spaces. The experimental results on three standard benchmark datasets show that our model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art text GANs with respect to quality, diversity, and global consistency.
abstract_zh: 由于语言的离散性，将生成对抗网络（GAN）应用于文本相关任务具有挑战性。一项研究通过采用强化学习（RL）并直接在离散动作空间中优化下一个单词采样策略来解决这个问题。这些方法计算完整句子的奖励，并避免由于暴露偏差而导致的错误累积。其他方法采用将文本映射到连续表示的近似技术，以规避不可微分的离散过程。特别是，基于自动编码器的方法有效地产生可以对复杂离散结构进行建模的鲁棒表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的文本 GAN 架构，可促进连续空间和离散空间方法的协作训练。我们的方法采用自动编码器来学习隐式数据流形，为连续空间中的对抗训练提供学习目标。此外，完整的文本输出通过 RL 在离散空间中直接评估和更新。两种对抗训练之间的协作相互作用有效地规范了不同空间中的文本表示。三个标准基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型在质量、多样性和全局一致性方面远远优于最先进的文本 GAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合连续空间和离散空间协作训练的文本生成GAN架构，以解决传统GAN在文本生成中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 文本生成中语言的离散性导致GAN训练困难，现有方法或依赖强化学习处理离散空间但存在误差累积，或通过连续表示近似但可能丢失离散结构。
AI.method: 通过自编码器学习隐含数据流形实现连续空间对抗训练，同时在离散空间直接用强化学习评估和更新完整文本输出，两种训练方式协同正则化不同空间的文本表示。
AI.result: 在三个标准数据集上，模型在文本质量、多样性和全局一致性指标上显著优于现有最先进的文本GAN方法。
AI.conclusion: 连续-离散空间协作训练机制有效提升了文本生成效果，为处理离散序列的GAN提供了新思路。

search_text: Collaborative Training of GANs in Continuous and Discrete Spaces for Text Generation 用于文本生成的连续和离散空间中的 GAN 协作训练 Applying generative adversarial networks (GANs) to text-related tasks is challenging due to the discrete nature of language. One line of research resolves this issue by employing reinforcement learning (RL) and optimizing the next-word sampling policy directly in a discrete action space. Such methods compute the rewards from complete sentences and avoid error accumulation due to exposure bias. Other approaches employ approximation techniques that map the text to continuous representation in order to circumvent the non-differentiable discrete process. Particularly, autoencoder-based methods effectively produce robust representations that can model complex discrete structures. In this paper, we propose a novel text GAN architecture that promotes the collaborative training of the continuous-space and discrete-space methods. Our method employs an autoencoder to learn an implicit data manifold, providing a learning objective for adversarial training in a continuous space. Furthermore, the complete textual output is directly evaluated and updated via RL in a discrete space. The collaborative interplay between the two adversarial trainings effectively regularize the text representations in different spaces. The experimental results on three standard benchmark datasets show that our model substantially outperforms state-of-the-art text GANs with respect to quality, diversity, and global consistency. 由于语言的离散性，将生成对抗网络（GAN）应用于文本相关任务具有挑战性。一项研究通过采用强化学习（RL）并直接在离散动作空间中优化下一个单词采样策略来解决这个问题。这些方法计算完整句子的奖励，并避免由于暴露偏差而导致的错误累积。其他方法采用将文本映射到连续表示的近似技术，以规避不可微分的离散过程。特别是，基于自动编码器的方法有效地产生可以对复杂离散结构进行建模的鲁棒表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的文本 GAN 架构，可促进连续空间和离散空间方法的协作训练。我们的方法采用自动编码器来学习隐式数据流形，为连续空间中的对抗训练提供学习目标。此外，完整的文本输出通过 RL 在离散空间中直接评估和更新。两种对抗训练之间的协作相互作用有效地规范了不同空间中的文本表示。三个标准基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的模型在质量、多样性和全局一致性方面远远优于最先进的文本 GAN。 本文提出一种结合连续空间和离散空间协作训练的文本生成GAN架构，以解决传统GAN在文本生成中的挑战。 Yanghoon Kim,Seungpil Won,Seunghyun Yoon,Kyomin Jung cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruohua Shi,Wenyao Wang,Zhixuan Li,Liuyuan He,Kaiwen Sheng,Lei Ma,Kai Du,Tingting Jiang,Tiejun Huang
title: Human Perception-based Evaluation Criterion for Ultra-high Resolution Cell Membrane Segmentation
title_zh: 基于人类感知的超高分辨率细胞膜分割评估标准
abstract: Computer vision technology is widely used in biological and medical data analysis and understanding. However, there are still two major bottlenecks in the field of cell membrane segmentation, which seriously hinder further research: lack of sufficient high-quality data and lack of suitable evaluation criteria. In order to solve these two problems, this paper first proposes an Ultra-high Resolution Image Segmentation dataset for the Cell membrane, called U-RISC, the largest annotated Electron Microscopy (EM) dataset for the Cell membrane with multiple iterative annotations and uncompressed high-resolution raw data. During the analysis process of the U-RISC, we found that the current popular segmentation evaluation criteria are inconsistent with human perception. This interesting phenomenon is confirmed by a subjective experiment involving twenty people. Furthermore, to resolve this inconsistency, we propose a new evaluation criterion called Perceptual Hausdorff Distance (PHD) to measure the quality of cell membrane segmentation results. Detailed performance comparison and discussion of classic segmentation methods along with two iterative manual annotation results under existing evaluation criteria and PHD is given.
summary: Computer vision technology is widely used in biological and medical data analysis and understanding. However, there are still two major bottlenecks in the field of cell membrane segmentation, which seriously hinder further research: lack of sufficient high-quality data and lack of suitable evaluation criteria. In order to solve these two problems, this paper first proposes an Ultra-high Resolution Image Segmentation dataset for the Cell membrane, called U-RISC, the largest annotated Electron Microscopy (EM) dataset for the Cell membrane with multiple iterative annotations and uncompressed high-resolution raw data. During the analysis process of the U-RISC, we found that the current popular segmentation evaluation criteria are inconsistent with human perception. This interesting phenomenon is confirmed by a subjective experiment involving twenty people. Furthermore, to resolve this inconsistency, we propose a new evaluation criterion called Perceptual Hausdorff Distance (PHD) to measure the quality of cell membrane segmentation results. Detailed performance comparison and discussion of classic segmentation methods along with two iterative manual annotation results under existing evaluation criteria and PHD is given.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉技术广泛应用于生物和医学数据分析和理解。然而，细胞膜分割领域仍然存在两大瓶颈，严重阻碍了进一步的研究：缺乏足够的高质量数据和缺乏合适的评价标准。为了解决这两个问题，本文首先提出了一种细胞膜超高分辨率图像分割数据集，称为U-RISC，这是最大的细胞膜注释电子显微镜（EM）数据集，具有多个迭代注释和未压缩的高分辨率原始数据。在对U-RISC的分析过程中，我们发现目前流行的分割评价标准与人类的感知不一致。这个有趣的现象得到了二十人参与的主观实验的证实。此外，为了解决这种不一致问题，我们提出了一种称为感知豪斯多夫距离（PHD）的新评估标准来衡量细胞膜分割结果的质量。给出了经典分割方法的详细性能比较和讨论，以及现有评估标准和 PHD 下的两次迭代手动注释结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人类感知的细胞膜分割评估标准，并构建了超高分辨率数据集U-RISC以解决当前分割方法存在的评估指标与人类感知不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞膜分割方法面临高质量数据不足和评估指标不符合人类感知的双重瓶颈，亟需改进评估体系以提升分割结果的实用性。
AI.method: 构建包含多轮标注的超高分辨率电子显微镜数据集U-RISC，并通过20人主观实验验证感知差异，提出感知霍夫曼距离（PHD）作为新型评估指标。
AI.result: 发现传统评估指标与人类感知存在显著差异，PHD在经典分割方法和人工标注结果的对比中展现出更符合人类视觉感知的评估效果。
AI.conclusion: PHD有效解决了分割评估指标与人类感知的不一致性问题，为细胞膜分割领域提供了更符合实际需求的评估框架。

search_text: Human Perception-based Evaluation Criterion for Ultra-high Resolution Cell Membrane Segmentation 基于人类感知的超高分辨率细胞膜分割评估标准 Computer vision technology is widely used in biological and medical data analysis and understanding. However, there are still two major bottlenecks in the field of cell membrane segmentation, which seriously hinder further research: lack of sufficient high-quality data and lack of suitable evaluation criteria. In order to solve these two problems, this paper first proposes an Ultra-high Resolution Image Segmentation dataset for the Cell membrane, called U-RISC, the largest annotated Electron Microscopy (EM) dataset for the Cell membrane with multiple iterative annotations and uncompressed high-resolution raw data. During the analysis process of the U-RISC, we found that the current popular segmentation evaluation criteria are inconsistent with human perception. This interesting phenomenon is confirmed by a subjective experiment involving twenty people. Furthermore, to resolve this inconsistency, we propose a new evaluation criterion called Perceptual Hausdorff Distance (PHD) to measure the quality of cell membrane segmentation results. Detailed performance comparison and discussion of classic segmentation methods along with two iterative manual annotation results under existing evaluation criteria and PHD is given. 计算机视觉技术广泛应用于生物和医学数据分析和理解。然而，细胞膜分割领域仍然存在两大瓶颈，严重阻碍了进一步的研究：缺乏足够的高质量数据和缺乏合适的评价标准。为了解决这两个问题，本文首先提出了一种细胞膜超高分辨率图像分割数据集，称为U-RISC，这是最大的细胞膜注释电子显微镜（EM）数据集，具有多个迭代注释和未压缩的高分辨率原始数据。在对U-RISC的分析过程中，我们发现目前流行的分割评价标准与人类的感知不一致。这个有趣的现象得到了二十人参与的主观实验的证实。此外，为了解决这种不一致问题，我们提出了一种称为感知豪斯多夫距离（PHD）的新评估标准来衡量细胞膜分割结果的质量。给出了经典分割方法的详细性能比较和讨论，以及现有评估标准和 PHD 下的两次迭代手动注释结果。 本文提出基于人类感知的细胞膜分割评估标准，并构建了超高分辨率数据集U-RISC以解决当前分割方法存在的评估指标与人类感知不一致的问题。 Ruohua Shi,Wenyao Wang,Zhixuan Li,Liuyuan He,Kaiwen Sheng,Lei Ma,Kai Du,Tingting Jiang,Tiejun Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaotong Chen,Kaizhi Zheng,Zhen Zeng,Cameron Kisailus,Shreshtha Basu,James Cooney,Jana Pavlasek,Odest Chadwicke Jenkins
title: Manipulation-Oriented Object Perception in Clutter through Affordance Coordinate Frames
title_zh: 通过可供性坐标系实现面向操作的杂乱物体感知
comment: Humanoids 2022 paper. video link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VkLI8m_3erU; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7P9_O9wveYk, github link: https://github.com/cxt98/ACF_perception
comments: Humanoids 2022 paper. video link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VkLI8m_3erU; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7P9_O9wveYk, github link: https://github.com/cxt98/ACF_perception
abstract: In order to enable robust operation in unstructured environments, robots should be able to generalize manipulation actions to novel object instances. For example, to pour and serve a drink, a robot should be able to recognize novel containers which afford the task. Most importantly, robots should be able to manipulate these novel containers to fulfill the task. To achieve this, we aim to provide robust and generalized perception of object affordances and their associated manipulation poses for reliable manipulation. In this work, we combine the notions of affordance and category-level pose, and introduce the Affordance Coordinate Frame (ACF). With ACF, we represent each object class in terms of individual affordance parts and the compatibility between them, where each part is associated with a part category-level pose for robot manipulation. In our experiments, we demonstrate that ACF outperforms state-of-the-art methods for object detection, as well as category-level pose estimation for object parts. We further demonstrate the applicability of ACF to robot manipulation tasks through experiments in a simulated environment.
summary: In order to enable robust operation in unstructured environments, robots should be able to generalize manipulation actions to novel object instances. For example, to pour and serve a drink, a robot should be able to recognize novel containers which afford the task. Most importantly, robots should be able to manipulate these novel containers to fulfill the task. To achieve this, we aim to provide robust and generalized perception of object affordances and their associated manipulation poses for reliable manipulation. In this work, we combine the notions of affordance and category-level pose, and introduce the Affordance Coordinate Frame (ACF). With ACF, we represent each object class in terms of individual affordance parts and the compatibility between them, where each part is associated with a part category-level pose for robot manipulation. In our experiments, we demonstrate that ACF outperforms state-of-the-art methods for object detection, as well as category-level pose estimation for object parts. We further demonstrate the applicability of ACF to robot manipulation tasks through experiments in a simulated environment.
abstract_zh: 为了在非结构化环境中实现稳健的操作，机器人应该能够将操纵动作推广到新的对象实例。例如，要倒饮料并提供饮料，机器人应该能够识别能够完成这项任务的新颖容器。最重要的是，机器人应该能够操纵这些新颖的容器来完成任务。为了实现这一目标，我们的目标是提供对对象可供性及其相关操作姿势的稳健和广义的感知，以实现可靠的操作。在这项工作中，我们结合了可供性和类别级姿势的概念，并引入了可供性坐标系（ACF）。使用 ACF，我们根据各个可供性部件及其之间的兼容性来表示每个对象类，其中每个部件都与用于机器人操作的部件类别级姿势相关联。在我们的实验中，我们证明 ACF 优于最先进的对象检测方法以及对象部分的类别级姿态估计。我们通过模拟环境中的实验进一步证明了 ACF 在机器人操作任务中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'可供性坐标框架'(ACF)的方法，用于在杂乱环境中实现机器人对物体操作的鲁棒感知，通过结合物体可供性与类别级姿态估计来提升操作任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在非结构化环境中操作未知物体，但现有方法在物体检测和姿态估计上存在局限，难以应对杂乱场景中新型容器的识别与操作需求。
AI.method: 引入ACF框架，将物体按可供性分解为部件并关联类别级操作姿态，通过部件间兼容性建模实现对物体功能部位的感知与操作规划。
AI.result: 实验表明ACF在物体检测和部件级姿态估计任务中优于现有方法，并成功应用于模拟环境中的机器人操作任务验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ACF框架通过整合可供性分析与姿态估计，为机器人提供了在杂乱环境中可靠识别物体功能部位并规划操作的解决方案。

authors_text: Muhammad Abbas,Asifullah Khan,Aqsa Saeed Qureshi,Muhammad Waleed Khan
title: Extracting Signals of Higgs Boson From Background Noise Using Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络从背景噪声中提取希格斯玻色子信号
abstract: Higgs boson is a fundamental particle, and the classification of Higgs signals is a well-known problem in high energy physics. The identification of the Higgs signal is a challenging task because its signal has a resemblance to the background signals. This study proposes a Higgs signal classification using a novel combination of random forest, auto encoder and deep auto encoder to build a robust and generalized Higgs boson prediction system to discriminate the Higgs signal from the background noise. The proposed ensemble technique is based on achieving diversity in the decision space, and the results show good discrimination power on the private leaderboard; achieving an area under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve of 0.9 and an Approximate Median Significance score of 3.429.
summary: Higgs boson is a fundamental particle, and the classification of Higgs signals is a well-known problem in high energy physics. The identification of the Higgs signal is a challenging task because its signal has a resemblance to the background signals. This study proposes a Higgs signal classification using a novel combination of random forest, auto encoder and deep auto encoder to build a robust and generalized Higgs boson prediction system to discriminate the Higgs signal from the background noise. The proposed ensemble technique is based on achieving diversity in the decision space, and the results show good discrimination power on the private leaderboard; achieving an area under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve of 0.9 and an Approximate Median Significance score of 3.429.
abstract_zh: 希格斯玻色子是一种基本粒子，希格斯信号的分类是高能物理中的一个众所周知的问题。希格斯信号的识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它的信号与背景信号相似。本研究提出了一种希格斯信号分类，使用随机森林、自动编码器和深度自动编码器的新颖组合来构建鲁棒且通用的希格斯玻色子预测系统，以区分希格斯信号与背景噪声。所提出的集成技术基于实现决策空间的多样性，结果在私人排行榜上显示出良好的区分能力；接收者操作特征曲线下面积为 0.9，近似中值显着性得分为 3.429。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合随机森林、自编码器和深度自编码器的集成方法，用于从背景噪声中有效分类希格斯玻色子信号。
AI.motivation: 希格斯玻色子信号与背景噪声相似，传统方法难以有效区分，需构建更鲁棒的分类系统以提高识别准确率。
AI.method: 采用随机森林与自编码器（含深度自编码器）的集成技术，通过决策空间多样性增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在私有排行榜中达到AUC 0.9和近似中位数显著性得分3.429，表现出优秀的信号区分能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了希格斯信号分类性能，为高能物理中的信号识别提供了新的技术思路。

search_text: Extracting Signals of Higgs Boson From Background Noise Using Deep Neural Networks 使用深度神经网络从背景噪声中提取希格斯玻色子信号 Higgs boson is a fundamental particle, and the classification of Higgs signals is a well-known problem in high energy physics. The identification of the Higgs signal is a challenging task because its signal has a resemblance to the background signals. This study proposes a Higgs signal classification using a novel combination of random forest, auto encoder and deep auto encoder to build a robust and generalized Higgs boson prediction system to discriminate the Higgs signal from the background noise. The proposed ensemble technique is based on achieving diversity in the decision space, and the results show good discrimination power on the private leaderboard; achieving an area under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve of 0.9 and an Approximate Median Significance score of 3.429. 希格斯玻色子是一种基本粒子，希格斯信号的分类是高能物理中的一个众所周知的问题。希格斯信号的识别是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它的信号与背景信号相似。本研究提出了一种希格斯信号分类，使用随机森林、自动编码器和深度自动编码器的新颖组合来构建鲁棒且通用的希格斯玻色子预测系统，以区分希格斯信号与背景噪声。所提出的集成技术基于实现决策空间的多样性，结果在私人排行榜上显示出良好的区分能力；接收者操作特征曲线下面积为 0.9，近似中值显着性得分为 3.429。 本文提出结合随机森林、自编码器和深度自编码器的集成方法，用于从背景噪声中有效分类希格斯玻色子信号。 Muhammad Abbas,Asifullah Khan,Aqsa Saeed Qureshi,Muhammad Waleed Khan hep-ph,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wanyun Cui,Guangyu Zheng,Wei Wang
title: Unsupervised Natural Language Inference via Decoupled Multimodal Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过解耦多模态对比学习进行无监督自然语言推理
abstract: We propose to solve the natural language inference problem without any supervision from the inference labels via task-agnostic multimodal pretraining. Although recent studies of multimodal self-supervised learning also represent the linguistic and visual context, their encoders for different modalities are coupled. Thus they cannot incorporate visual information when encoding plain text alone. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Aligned Contrastive Decoupled learning (MACD) network. MACD forces the decoupled text encoder to represent the visual information via contrastive learning. Therefore, it embeds visual knowledge even for plain text inference. We conducted comprehensive experiments over plain text inference datasets (i.e. SNLI and STS-B). The unsupervised MACD even outperforms the fully-supervised BiLSTM and BiLSTM+ELMO on STS-B.
summary: We propose to solve the natural language inference problem without any supervision from the inference labels via task-agnostic multimodal pretraining. Although recent studies of multimodal self-supervised learning also represent the linguistic and visual context, their encoders for different modalities are coupled. Thus they cannot incorporate visual information when encoding plain text alone. In this paper, we propose Multimodal Aligned Contrastive Decoupled learning (MACD) network. MACD forces the decoupled text encoder to represent the visual information via contrastive learning. Therefore, it embeds visual knowledge even for plain text inference. We conducted comprehensive experiments over plain text inference datasets (i.e. SNLI and STS-B). The unsupervised MACD even outperforms the fully-supervised BiLSTM and BiLSTM+ELMO on STS-B.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过与任务无关的多模态预训练来解决自然语言推理问题，而无需推理标签的任何监督。尽管最近对多模态自监督学习的研究也代表了语言和视觉上下文，但它们针对不同模态的编码器是耦合的。因此，当单独编码纯文本时，它们无法合并视觉信息。在本文中，我们提出了多模态对齐对比解耦学习（MACD）网络。 MACD 强制解耦文本编码器通过对比学习来表示视觉信息。因此，即使对于纯文本推理，它也嵌入了视觉知识。我们对纯文本推理数据集（即 SNLI 和 STS-B）进行了全面的实验。无监督 MACD 在 STS-B 上甚至优于全监督 BiLSTM 和 BiLSTM+ELMO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督自然语言推理方法，通过解耦的多模态对比学习使文本编码器能够利用视觉信息。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态方法因编码器耦合导致纯文本任务无法有效利用视觉信息，需解耦结构提升模型表现。
AI.method: 设计MACD网络，通过对比学习强制解耦文本编码器学习视觉信息，实现无监督的多模态对齐。
AI.result: 在SNLI和STS-B数据集上，无监督MACD超越全监督BiLSTM及BiLSTM+ELMO模型，尤其在STS-B表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 解耦多模态对比学习能有效融合视觉知识，证明无监督自然语言推理中跨模态对齐的重要性。

authors_text: Chaitanya Manapragada,Geoffrey I Webb,Mahsa Salehi,Albert Bifet
title: Emergent and Unspecified Behaviors in Streaming Decision Trees
title_zh: 流决策树中的突发和未指定行为
abstract: Hoeffding trees are the state-of-the-art methods in decision tree learning for evolving data streams. These very fast decision trees are used in many real applications where data is created in real-time due to their efficiency. In this work, we extricate explanations for why these streaming decision tree algorithms for stationary and nonstationary streams (HoeffdingTree and HoeffdingAdaptiveTree) work as well as they do. In doing so, we identify thirteen unique unspecified design decisions in both the theoretical constructs and their implementations with substantial and consequential effects on predictive accuracy---design decisions that, without necessarily changing the essence of the algorithms, drive algorithm performance. We begin a larger conversation about explainability not just of the model but also of the processes responsible for an algorithm's success.
summary: Hoeffding trees are the state-of-the-art methods in decision tree learning for evolving data streams. These very fast decision trees are used in many real applications where data is created in real-time due to their efficiency. In this work, we extricate explanations for why these streaming decision tree algorithms for stationary and nonstationary streams (HoeffdingTree and HoeffdingAdaptiveTree) work as well as they do. In doing so, we identify thirteen unique unspecified design decisions in both the theoretical constructs and their implementations with substantial and consequential effects on predictive accuracy---design decisions that, without necessarily changing the essence of the algorithms, drive algorithm performance. We begin a larger conversation about explainability not just of the model but also of the processes responsible for an algorithm's success.
abstract_zh: Hoeffding 树是用于不断发展的数据流的决策树学习中最先进的方法。这些非常快的决策树因其效率而被用于许多实时创建数据的实际应用中。在这项工作中，我们详细解释了为什么这些用于固定和非固定流的流式决策树算法（HoeffdingTree 和 HoeffdingAdaptiveTree）效果良好。在此过程中，我们在理论构造及其实现中确定了十三个独特的未指定设计决策，这些决策对预测准确性产生了实质性和间接影响——这些设计决策不一定会改变算法的本质，但会驱动算法性能。我们开始更广泛的讨论，不仅涉及模型的可解释性，还涉及算法成功的过程的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Hoeffding树算法在处理静态和非静态数据流时的未指定设计决策，探讨其性能影响及算法成功的原因。
AI.motivation: 现有流式决策树算法（如HoeffdingTree）虽高效，但其设计决策的可解释性不足，影响性能优化与理论理解。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实现细节审查，识别出十三个关键设计决策，并评估其对预测准确性的实质性影响。
AI.result: 发现十三个未明确说明的设计决策显著影响算法性能，且这些决策不影响算法核心机制，引发对算法可解释性的深入讨论。
AI.conclusion: 算法性能不仅依赖理论构造，还受未指定设计决策影响，需加强模型与实现过程的可解释性研究。

authors_text: Elham Daneshmand,Majid Khadiv,Felix Grimminger,Ludovic Righetti
title: Variable Horizon MPC with Swing Foot Dynamics for Bipedal Walking Control
title_zh: 具有用于双足行走控制的摆脚动力学的可变水平 MPC
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel two-level variable Horizon Model Predictive Control (VH-MPC) framework for bipedal locomotion. In this framework, the higher level computes the landing location and timing (horizon length) of the swing foot to stabilize the unstable part of the center of mass (CoM) dynamics, using feedback from the CoM states. The lower level takes into account the swing foot dynamics and generates dynamically consistent trajectories for landing at the desired time as close as possible to the desired location. To do that, we use a simplified model of the robot dynamics projected in swing foot space that takes into account joint torque constraints as well as the friction cone constraints of the stance foot. We show the effectiveness of our proposed control framework by implementing robust walking patterns on our torque-controlled and open-source biped robot, Bolt. We report extensive simulations and real robot experiments in the presence of various disturbances and uncertainties.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel two-level variable Horizon Model Predictive Control (VH-MPC) framework for bipedal locomotion. In this framework, the higher level computes the landing location and timing (horizon length) of the swing foot to stabilize the unstable part of the center of mass (CoM) dynamics, using feedback from the CoM states. The lower level takes into account the swing foot dynamics and generates dynamically consistent trajectories for landing at the desired time as close as possible to the desired location. To do that, we use a simplified model of the robot dynamics projected in swing foot space that takes into account joint torque constraints as well as the friction cone constraints of the stance foot. We show the effectiveness of our proposed control framework by implementing robust walking patterns on our torque-controlled and open-source biped robot, Bolt. We report extensive simulations and real robot experiments in the presence of various disturbances and uncertainties.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于双足运动的新型两级变量地平线模型预测控制（VH-MPC）框架。在此框架中，更高层使用来自 CoM 状态的反馈来计算摆动脚的着陆位置和时间（水平长度），以稳定质心 (CoM) 动力学的不稳定部分。下层考虑了摆动脚的动力学，并生成动态一致的轨迹，以便在尽可能接近所需位置的所需时间着陆。为此，我们使用在摆动脚空间中投影的机器人动力学简化模型，该模型考虑了关节扭矩约束以及站立脚的摩擦锥约束。我们通过在我们的扭矩控制开源双足机器人 Bolt 上实现稳健的行走模式，展示了我们提出的控制框架的有效性。我们报告了存在各种干扰和不确定性的情况下的广泛模拟和真实机器人实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双层可变地平线模型预测控制（VH-MPC）框架，用于双足步行控制，通过反馈调整摆动足的着陆位置和时间以稳定质心动力学，并生成符合动力学约束的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统双足机器人控制方法在动态环境和不确定性下难以保持稳定，需设计更灵活的控制框架以适应复杂地形和外部扰动。
AI.method: 采用双层控制结构：高层基于质心状态反馈计算摆动足着陆参数，底层结合摆动足动力学和力矩/摩擦约束生成轨迹，通过简化模型投影到摆动足空间实现动态一致性。
AI.result: 在开源双足机器人Bolt上验证了方法有效性，仿真和实验证明该框架能在多种扰动和不确定性下实现稳健步行。

search_text: Variable Horizon MPC with Swing Foot Dynamics for Bipedal Walking Control 具有用于双足行走控制的摆脚动力学的可变水平 MPC In this paper, we present a novel two-level variable Horizon Model Predictive Control (VH-MPC) framework for bipedal locomotion. In this framework, the higher level computes the landing location and timing (horizon length) of the swing foot to stabilize the unstable part of the center of mass (CoM) dynamics, using feedback from the CoM states. The lower level takes into account the swing foot dynamics and generates dynamically consistent trajectories for landing at the desired time as close as possible to the desired location. To do that, we use a simplified model of the robot dynamics projected in swing foot space that takes into account joint torque constraints as well as the friction cone constraints of the stance foot. We show the effectiveness of our proposed control framework by implementing robust walking patterns on our torque-controlled and open-source biped robot, Bolt. We report extensive simulations and real robot experiments in the presence of various disturbances and uncertainties. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于双足运动的新型两级变量地平线模型预测控制（VH-MPC）框架。在此框架中，更高层使用来自 CoM 状态的反馈来计算摆动脚的着陆位置和时间（水平长度），以稳定质心 (CoM) 动力学的不稳定部分。下层考虑了摆动脚的动力学，并生成动态一致的轨迹，以便在尽可能接近所需位置的所需时间着陆。为此，我们使用在摆动脚空间中投影的机器人动力学简化模型，该模型考虑了关节扭矩约束以及站立脚的摩擦锥约束。我们通过在我们的扭矩控制开源双足机器人 Bolt 上实现稳健的行走模式，展示了我们提出的控制框架的有效性。我们报告了存在各种干扰和不确定性的情况下的广泛模拟和真实机器人实验。 本文提出了一种双层可变地平线模型预测控制（VH-MPC）框架，用于双足步行控制，通过反馈调整摆动足的着陆位置和时间以稳定质心动力学，并生成符合动力学约束的轨迹。 Elham Daneshmand,Majid Khadiv,Felix Grimminger,Ludovic Righetti cs.RO

authors_text: Wei Xu,Fu Zhang
title: FAST-LIO: A Fast, Robust LiDAR-inertial Odometry Package by Tightly-Coupled Iterated Kalman Filter
title_zh: FAST-LIO：采用紧耦合迭代卡尔曼滤波器的快速、鲁棒 LiDAR 惯性里程计包
abstract: This paper presents a computationally efficient and robust LiDAR-inertial odometry framework. We fuse LiDAR feature points with IMU data using a tightly-coupled iterated extended Kalman filter to allow robust navigation in fast-motion, noisy or cluttered environments where degeneration occurs. To lower the computation load in the presence of large number of measurements, we present a new formula to compute the Kalman gain. The new formula has computation load depending on the state dimension instead of the measurement dimension. The proposed method and its implementation are tested in various indoor and outdoor environments. In all tests, our method produces reliable navigation results in real-time: running on a quadrotor onboard computer, it fuses more than 1,200 effective feature points in a scan and completes all iterations of an iEKF step within 25 ms. Our codes are open-sourced on Github.
summary: This paper presents a computationally efficient and robust LiDAR-inertial odometry framework. We fuse LiDAR feature points with IMU data using a tightly-coupled iterated extended Kalman filter to allow robust navigation in fast-motion, noisy or cluttered environments where degeneration occurs. To lower the computation load in the presence of large number of measurements, we present a new formula to compute the Kalman gain. The new formula has computation load depending on the state dimension instead of the measurement dimension. The proposed method and its implementation are tested in various indoor and outdoor environments. In all tests, our method produces reliable navigation results in real-time: running on a quadrotor onboard computer, it fuses more than 1,200 effective feature points in a scan and completes all iterations of an iEKF step within 25 ms. Our codes are open-sourced on Github.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种计算高效且鲁棒的激光雷达惯性里程计框架。我们使用紧密耦合的迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器将 LiDAR 特征点与 IMU 数据融合，以便在发生退化的快速运动、噪声或杂乱环境中实现稳健的导航。为了降低存在大量测量时的计算负载，我们提出了一个新的公式来计算卡尔曼增益。新公式的计算量取决于状态维度而不是测量维度。所提出的方法及其实现在各种室内和室外环境中进行了测试。在所有测试中，我们的方法都能实时产生可靠的导航结果：在四旋翼机载计算机上运行，​​它在一次扫描中融合了 1,200 多个有效特征点，并在 25 毫秒内完成 iEKF 步骤的所有迭代。我们的代码在 Github 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且鲁棒的激光雷达惯性里程计框架FAST-LIO，通过紧密耦合的迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器实现快速运动、噪声或杂乱环境下的可靠导航。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高速运动、噪声或杂乱环境中易出现退化现象，导致导航失效，需提升计算效率以处理大量测量数据。
AI.method: 采用紧密耦合的迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器（iEKF），并提出新的卡尔曼增益计算公式，使计算复杂度依赖状态维度而非测量维度。
AI.result: 在多种室内外环境中实现实时导航，单次iEKF迭代耗时低于25ms，单帧处理超1200个有效特征点，开源代码验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: FAST-LIO通过优化计算负载和鲁棒性，在复杂环境下实现了高效实时的激光雷达惯性里程计，适用于无人机等移动平台。

authors_text: Yuang Shi,Chen Zu,Mei Hong,Luping Zhou,Lei Wang,Xi Wu,Jiliu Zhou,Daoqiang Zhang,Yan Wang
title: ASMFS: Adaptive-Similarity-based Multi-modality Feature Selection for Classification of Alzheimer's Disease
title_zh: ASMFS：基于自适应相似性的多模态特征选择用于阿尔茨海默病的分类
abstract: With the increasing amounts of high-dimensional heterogeneous data to be processed, multi-modality feature selection has become an important research direction in medical image analysis. Traditional methods usually depict the data structure using fixed and predefined similarity matrix for each modality separately, without considering the potential relationship structure across different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modality feature selection method, which performs feature selection and local similarity learning simultaniously. Specially, a similarity matrix is learned by jointly considering different imaging modalities. And at the same time, feature selection is conducted by imposing sparse l_{2, 1} norm constraint. The effectiveness of our proposed joint learning method can be well demonstrated by the experimental results on Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset, which outperforms existing the state-of-the-art multi-modality approaches.
summary: With the increasing amounts of high-dimensional heterogeneous data to be processed, multi-modality feature selection has become an important research direction in medical image analysis. Traditional methods usually depict the data structure using fixed and predefined similarity matrix for each modality separately, without considering the potential relationship structure across different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modality feature selection method, which performs feature selection and local similarity learning simultaniously. Specially, a similarity matrix is learned by jointly considering different imaging modalities. And at the same time, feature selection is conducted by imposing sparse l_{2, 1} norm constraint. The effectiveness of our proposed joint learning method can be well demonstrated by the experimental results on Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset, which outperforms existing the state-of-the-art multi-modality approaches.
abstract_zh: 随着待处理的高维异构数据量的不断增加，多模态特征选择已成为医学图像分析的重要研究方向。传统方法通常分别使用每种模态的固定和预定义的相似性矩阵来描述数据结构，而不考虑不同模态之间的潜在关系结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态特征选择方法，该方法同时执行特征选择和局部相似性学习。特别地，通过共同考虑不同的成像方式来学习相似性矩阵。同时，通过施加稀疏l_{2, 1}范数约束来进行特征选择。我们提出的联合学习方法的有效性可以通过阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议（ADNI）数据集的实验结果得到很好的证明，该数据集优于现有最先进的多模态方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应相似度的多模态特征选择方法ASMFS，用于阿尔茨海默病分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态特征选择方法使用固定相似度矩阵，未考虑不同模态间的潜在关联性，限制了分类性能。
AI.method: 联合学习多模态局部相似性与特征选择，通过自适应相似度矩阵整合多模态信息，并采用稀疏l₂₁范数约束实现特征选择。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的多模态特征选择方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化相似性学习与特征选择能有效提升多模态医学数据分类性能，为阿尔茨海默病分析提供新思路。

search_text: ASMFS: Adaptive-Similarity-based Multi-modality Feature Selection for Classification of Alzheimer's Disease ASMFS：基于自适应相似性的多模态特征选择用于阿尔茨海默病的分类 With the increasing amounts of high-dimensional heterogeneous data to be processed, multi-modality feature selection has become an important research direction in medical image analysis. Traditional methods usually depict the data structure using fixed and predefined similarity matrix for each modality separately, without considering the potential relationship structure across different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modality feature selection method, which performs feature selection and local similarity learning simultaniously. Specially, a similarity matrix is learned by jointly considering different imaging modalities. And at the same time, feature selection is conducted by imposing sparse l_{2, 1} norm constraint. The effectiveness of our proposed joint learning method can be well demonstrated by the experimental results on Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset, which outperforms existing the state-of-the-art multi-modality approaches. 随着待处理的高维异构数据量的不断增加，多模态特征选择已成为医学图像分析的重要研究方向。传统方法通常分别使用每种模态的固定和预定义的相似性矩阵来描述数据结构，而不考虑不同模态之间的潜在关系结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态特征选择方法，该方法同时执行特征选择和局部相似性学习。特别地，通过共同考虑不同的成像方式来学习相似性矩阵。同时，通过施加稀疏l_{2, 1}范数约束来进行特征选择。我们提出的联合学习方法的有效性可以通过阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议（ADNI）数据集的实验结果得到很好的证明，该数据集优于现有最先进的多模态方法。 本文提出一种基于自适应相似度的多模态特征选择方法ASMFS，用于阿尔茨海默病分类任务。 Yuang Shi,Chen Zu,Mei Hong,Luping Zhou,Lei Wang,Xi Wu,Jiliu Zhou,Daoqiang Zhang,Yan Wang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wei Chen,Weiping Wang,Li Liu,Michael S. Lew
title: New Ideas and Trends in Deep Multimodal Content Understanding: A Review
title_zh: 深度多模态内容理解的新想法和趋势：回顾
abstract: The focus of this survey is on the analysis of two modalities of multimodal deep learning: image and text. Unlike classic reviews of deep learning where monomodal image classifiers such as VGG, ResNet and Inception module are central topics, this paper will examine recent multimodal deep models and structures, including auto-encoders, generative adversarial nets and their variants. These models go beyond the simple image classifiers in which they can do uni-directional (e.g. image captioning, image generation) and bi-directional (e.g. cross-modal retrieval, visual question answering) multimodal tasks. Besides, we analyze two aspects of the challenge in terms of better content understanding in deep multimodal applications. We then introduce current ideas and trends in deep multimodal feature learning, such as feature embedding approaches and objective function design, which are crucial in overcoming the aforementioned challenges. Finally, we include several promising directions for future research.
summary: The focus of this survey is on the analysis of two modalities of multimodal deep learning: image and text. Unlike classic reviews of deep learning where monomodal image classifiers such as VGG, ResNet and Inception module are central topics, this paper will examine recent multimodal deep models and structures, including auto-encoders, generative adversarial nets and their variants. These models go beyond the simple image classifiers in which they can do uni-directional (e.g. image captioning, image generation) and bi-directional (e.g. cross-modal retrieval, visual question answering) multimodal tasks. Besides, we analyze two aspects of the challenge in terms of better content understanding in deep multimodal applications. We then introduce current ideas and trends in deep multimodal feature learning, such as feature embedding approaches and objective function design, which are crucial in overcoming the aforementioned challenges. Finally, we include several promising directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 本次调查的重点是分析多模态深度学习的两种模式：图像和文本。与以 VGG、ResNet 和 Inception 模块等单模态图像分类器为中心主题的深度学习经典评论不同，本文将研究最新的多模态深度模型和结构，包括自动编码器、生成对抗网络及其变体。这些模型超越了简单的图像分类器，它们可以执行单向（例如图像字幕、图像生成）和双向（例如跨模态检索、视觉问答）多模态任务。此外，我们还分析了深度多模式应用中更好的内容理解方面挑战的两个方面。然后，我们介绍深度多模态特征学习的当前思想和趋势，例如特征嵌入方法和目标函数设计，这对于克服上述挑战至关重要。最后，我们列出了未来研究的几个有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 综述论文分析了深度多模态内容理解的最新模型、方法及挑战，探讨其未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统综述聚焦单模态图像分类器，而本文旨在分析多模态深度学习的最新进展，探讨其在内容理解中的挑战与解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析多模态深度模型（如自编码器、GAN）及特征嵌入方法，结合目标函数设计，探讨多模态任务中的挑战与解决方案。
AI.result: 总结了多模态特征学习的当前趋势，分析了内容理解中的挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 多模态模型在跨模态任务中展现潜力，未来需加强特征对齐与模型泛化研究。

authors_text: Sunghyun Park,Kangyeol Kim,Junsoo Lee,Jaegul Choo,Joonseok Lee,Sookyung Kim,Edward Choi
title: Vid-ODE: Continuous-Time Video Generation with Neural Ordinary Differential Equation
title_zh: Vid-ODE：使用神经常微分方程生成连续时间视频
abstract: Video generation models often operate under the assumption of fixed frame rates, which leads to suboptimal performance when it comes to handling flexible frame rates (e.g., increasing the frame rate of the more dynamic portion of the video as well as handling missing video frames). To resolve the restricted nature of existing video generation models' ability to handle arbitrary timesteps, we propose continuous-time video generation by combining neural ODE (Vid-ODE) with pixel-level video processing techniques. Using ODE-ConvGRU as an encoder, a convolutional version of the recently proposed neural ODE, which enables us to learn continuous-time dynamics, Vid-ODE can learn the spatio-temporal dynamics of input videos of flexible frame rates. The decoder integrates the learned dynamics function to synthesize video frames at any given timesteps, where the pixel-level composition technique is used to maintain the sharpness of individual frames. With extensive experiments on four real-world video datasets, we verify that the proposed Vid-ODE outperforms state-of-the-art approaches under various video generation settings, both within the trained time range (interpolation) and beyond the range (extrapolation). To the best of our knowledge, Vid-ODE is the first work successfully performing continuous-time video generation using real-world videos.
summary: Video generation models often operate under the assumption of fixed frame rates, which leads to suboptimal performance when it comes to handling flexible frame rates (e.g., increasing the frame rate of the more dynamic portion of the video as well as handling missing video frames). To resolve the restricted nature of existing video generation models' ability to handle arbitrary timesteps, we propose continuous-time video generation by combining neural ODE (Vid-ODE) with pixel-level video processing techniques. Using ODE-ConvGRU as an encoder, a convolutional version of the recently proposed neural ODE, which enables us to learn continuous-time dynamics, Vid-ODE can learn the spatio-temporal dynamics of input videos of flexible frame rates. The decoder integrates the learned dynamics function to synthesize video frames at any given timesteps, where the pixel-level composition technique is used to maintain the sharpness of individual frames. With extensive experiments on four real-world video datasets, we verify that the proposed Vid-ODE outperforms state-of-the-art approaches under various video generation settings, both within the trained time range (interpolation) and beyond the range (extrapolation). To the best of our knowledge, Vid-ODE is the first work successfully performing continuous-time video generation using real-world videos.
abstract_zh: 视频生成模型通常在固定帧速率的假设下运行，这导致在处理灵活帧速率（例如，增加视频更动态部分的帧速率以及处理丢失的视频帧）时性能不理想。为了解决现有视频生成模型处理任意时间步的能力的限制，我们提出通过将神经常微分方程（Vid-ODE）与像素级视频处理技术相结合来生成连续时间视频。使用 ODE-ConvGRU 作为编码器，这是最近提出的神经 ODE 的卷积版本，它使我们能够学习连续时间动态，Vid-ODE 可以学习灵活帧速率的输入视频的时空动态。解码器集成了学习到的动态函数，可以在任何给定的时间步长合成视频帧，其中像素级合成技术用于保持各个帧的清晰度。通过对四个真实视频数据集的大量实验，我们验证了所提出的 Vid-ODE 在各种视频生成设置下（无论是在训练时间范围内（插值）还是超出范围（外推））都优于最先进的方法。据我们所知，Vid-ODE 是第一个使用真实世界视频成功执行连续视频生成的作品。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vid-ODE模型，通过神经常微分方程实现连续时间视频生成，解决传统视频生成模型固定帧率的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型假设固定帧率，难以处理动态部分帧率提升或缺失帧等灵活帧率场景，限制了模型的适用性。
AI.method: 结合神经ODE与像素级视频处理技术，采用ODE-ConvGRU编码器学习时空动态，并通过解码器在任意时间步合成视频帧以保持画面锐度。
AI.result: 在四个真实视频数据集上验证，Vid-ODE在插值与外推任务中均优于现有方法，且是首个成功实现真实视频连续时间生成的模型。
AI.conclusion: Vid-ODE通过连续时间建模有效解决了灵活帧率视频生成问题，为视频生成领域提供了新方法和新方向。

authors_text: Guangneng Hu,Qiang Yang
title: PrivNet: Safeguarding Private Attributes in Transfer Learning for Recommendation
title_zh: PrivNet：保护迁移学习中的私有属性以进行推荐
abstract: Transfer learning is an effective technique to improve a target recommender system with the knowledge from a source domain. Existing research focuses on the recommendation performance of the target domain while ignores the privacy leakage of the source domain. The transferred knowledge, however, may unintendedly leak private information of the source domain. For example, an attacker can accurately infer user demographics from their historical purchase provided by a source domain data owner. This paper addresses the above privacy-preserving issue by learning a privacy-aware neural representation by improving target performance while protecting source privacy. The key idea is to simulate the attacks during the training for protecting unseen users' privacy in the future, modeled by an adversarial game, so that the transfer learning model becomes robust to attacks. Experiments show that the proposed PrivNet model can successfully disentangle the knowledge benefitting the transfer from leaking the privacy.
summary: Transfer learning is an effective technique to improve a target recommender system with the knowledge from a source domain. Existing research focuses on the recommendation performance of the target domain while ignores the privacy leakage of the source domain. The transferred knowledge, however, may unintendedly leak private information of the source domain. For example, an attacker can accurately infer user demographics from their historical purchase provided by a source domain data owner. This paper addresses the above privacy-preserving issue by learning a privacy-aware neural representation by improving target performance while protecting source privacy. The key idea is to simulate the attacks during the training for protecting unseen users' privacy in the future, modeled by an adversarial game, so that the transfer learning model becomes robust to attacks. Experiments show that the proposed PrivNet model can successfully disentangle the knowledge benefitting the transfer from leaking the privacy.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习是一种利用源领域的知识改进目标推荐系统的有效技术。现有研究主要关注目标域的推荐性能，而忽略了源域的隐私泄露。然而，转移的知识可能会无意中泄露源域的私人信息。例如，攻击者可以根据源域数据所有者提供的历史购买记录准确推断用户人口统计数据。本文通过学习隐私感知神经表示来解决上述隐私保护问题，在保护源隐私的同时提高目标性能。关键思想是在训练过程中模拟攻击，以保护未来不可见用户的隐私，通过对抗游戏建模，从而使迁移学习模型对攻击变得鲁棒。实验表明，所提出的 PrivNet 模型可以成功地解开有利于传输的知识与泄露隐私的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrivNet模型，在推荐系统的迁移学习中保护源域隐私，同时保持目标域性能。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习方法仅关注目标域推荐效果，忽视源域隐私泄露风险，可能导致用户敏感信息被推断。
AI.method: 通过对抗博弈模拟攻击，在训练中学习隐私感知的神经表示，分离有益迁移知识与隐私信息。
AI.result: 实验表明PrivNet能有效防止隐私泄露，同时保持迁移学习的推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: PrivNet成功平衡了迁移学习效果与源域隐私保护，为推荐系统隐私安全提供新思路。

search_text: PrivNet: Safeguarding Private Attributes in Transfer Learning for Recommendation PrivNet：保护迁移学习中的私有属性以进行推荐 Transfer learning is an effective technique to improve a target recommender system with the knowledge from a source domain. Existing research focuses on the recommendation performance of the target domain while ignores the privacy leakage of the source domain. The transferred knowledge, however, may unintendedly leak private information of the source domain. For example, an attacker can accurately infer user demographics from their historical purchase provided by a source domain data owner. This paper addresses the above privacy-preserving issue by learning a privacy-aware neural representation by improving target performance while protecting source privacy. The key idea is to simulate the attacks during the training for protecting unseen users' privacy in the future, modeled by an adversarial game, so that the transfer learning model becomes robust to attacks. Experiments show that the proposed PrivNet model can successfully disentangle the knowledge benefitting the transfer from leaking the privacy. 迁移学习是一种利用源领域的知识改进目标推荐系统的有效技术。现有研究主要关注目标域的推荐性能，而忽略了源域的隐私泄露。然而，转移的知识可能会无意中泄露源域的私人信息。例如，攻击者可以根据源域数据所有者提供的历史购买记录准确推断用户人口统计数据。本文通过学习隐私感知神经表示来解决上述隐私保护问题，在保护源隐私的同时提高目标性能。关键思想是在训练过程中模拟攻击，以保护未来不可见用户的隐私，通过对抗游戏建模，从而使迁移学习模型对攻击变得鲁棒。实验表明，所提出的 PrivNet 模型可以成功地解开有利于传输的知识与泄露隐私的关系。 本文提出PrivNet模型，在推荐系统的迁移学习中保护源域隐私，同时保持目标域性能。 Guangneng Hu,Qiang Yang cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Saleh Shahinfar,Paul Meek,Greg Falzon
title: How many images do I need? Understanding how sample size per class affects deep learning model performance metrics for balanced designs in autonomous wildlife monitoring
title_zh: 我需要多少张图片？了解每个类别的样本大小如何影响自主野生动物监测中平衡设计的深度学习模型性能指标
abstract: Deep learning (DL) algorithms are the state of the art in automated classification of wildlife camera trap images. The challenge is that the ecologist cannot know in advance how many images per species they need to collect for model training in order to achieve their desired classification accuracy. In fact there is limited empirical evidence in the context of camera trapping to demonstrate that increasing sample size will lead to improved accuracy. In this study we explore in depth the issues of deep learning model performance for progressively increasing per class (species) sample sizes. We also provide ecologists with an approximation formula to estimate how many images per animal species they need for certain accuracy level a priori. This will help ecologists for optimal allocation of resources, work and efficient study design. In order to investigate the effect of number of training images; seven training sets with 10, 20, 50, 150, 500, 1000 images per class were designed. Six deep learning architectures namely ResNet-18, ResNet-50, ResNet-152, DnsNet-121, DnsNet-161, and DnsNet-201 were trained and tested on a common exclusive testing set of 250 images per class. The whole experiment was repeated on three similar datasets from Australia, Africa and North America and the results were compared. Simple regression equations for use by practitioners to approximate model performance metrics are provided. Generalized additive models (GAM) are shown to be effective in modelling DL performance metrics based on the number of training images per class, tuning scheme and dataset. Key-words: Camera Traps, Deep Learning, Ecological Informatics, Generalised Additive Models, Learning Curves, Predictive Modelling, Wildlife.
summary: Deep learning (DL) algorithms are the state of the art in automated classification of wildlife camera trap images. The challenge is that the ecologist cannot know in advance how many images per species they need to collect for model training in order to achieve their desired classification accuracy. In fact there is limited empirical evidence in the context of camera trapping to demonstrate that increasing sample size will lead to improved accuracy. In this study we explore in depth the issues of deep learning model performance for progressively increasing per class (species) sample sizes. We also provide ecologists with an approximation formula to estimate how many images per animal species they need for certain accuracy level a priori. This will help ecologists for optimal allocation of resources, work and efficient study design. In order to investigate the effect of number of training images; seven training sets with 10, 20, 50, 150, 500, 1000 images per class were designed. Six deep learning architectures namely ResNet-18, ResNet-50, ResNet-152, DnsNet-121, DnsNet-161, and DnsNet-201 were trained and tested on a common exclusive testing set of 250 images per class. The whole experiment was repeated on three similar datasets from Australia, Africa and North America and the results were compared. Simple regression equations for use by practitioners to approximate model performance metrics are provided. Generalized additive models (GAM) are shown to be effective in modelling DL performance metrics based on the number of training images per class, tuning scheme and dataset. Key-words: Camera Traps, Deep Learning, Ecological Informatics, Generalised Additive Models, Learning Curves, Predictive Modelling, Wildlife.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 算法是野生动物相机陷阱图像自动分类的最先进算法。挑战在于生态学家无法提前知道他们需要为模型训练收集每个物种多少图像才能达到所需的分类准确性。事实上，在相机捕捉的背景下，有限的经验证据表明增加样本量将提高准确性。在这项研究中，我们深入探讨了逐步增加每类（物种）样本量的深度学习模型性能问题。我们还为生态学家提供了一个近似公式来估计每个动物物种需要多少图像才能达到一定的先验精度水平。这将有助于生态学家优化资源分配、工作和高效的研究设计。为了考察训练图像数量的影响；设计了七个训练集，每类有 10、20、50、150、500、1000 张图像。六种深度学习架构（即 ResNet-18、ResNet-50、ResNet-152、DnsNet-121、DnsNet-161 和 DnsNet-201）在每类 250 张图像的通用专用测试集上进行了训练和测试。在来自澳大利亚、非洲和北美的三个类似数据集上重复了整个实验，并对结果进行了比较。提供了简单的回归方程，供从业者使用来近似模型性能指标。广义加性模型 (GAM) 在基于每类训练图像数量、调优方案和数据集的深度学习性能指标建模中被证明是有效的。关键词：相机陷阱、深度学习、生态信息学、广义加性模型、学习曲线、预测模型、野生动物。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在平衡设计的自主野生动物监测中，每类样本数量对深度学习模型性能指标的影响，并为生态学家提供了一种估算所需图像数量的公式。
AI.motivation: 生态学家在训练深度学习模型时无法预先确定需要收集多少图像以达到目标分类准确率，且缺乏关于样本量增加与准确率提升关系的实证研究。
AI.method: 设计了七种每类样本数量（10至1000张）的训练集，使用六种深度学习架构（如ResNet、DnsNet）在三个不同地区的数据集上进行训练和测试，并通过广义可加模型（GAM）分析性能指标。
AI.result: 发现增加每类样本数量能提升准确率但存在边际效益递减，提供了回归方程供实践者估算模型性能，并证明GAM能有效建模深度学习性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为生态学家提供了优化资源分配和实验设计的工具，通过近似公式和GAM模型，帮助其在野生动物监测中更高效地应用深度学习技术。

authors_text: Tanfang Chen,Weiwei Wang,Wenyang Wei,Xing Shi,Xiangang Li,Jieping Ye,Kevin Knight
title: DiDi's Machine Translation System for WMT2020
title_zh: 滴滴WMT2020机器翻译系统
abstract: This paper describes DiDi AI Labs' submission to the WMT2020 news translation shared task. We participate in the translation direction of Chinese->English. In this direction, we use the Transformer as our baseline model, and integrate several techniques for model enhancement, including data filtering, data selection, back-translation, fine-tuning, model ensembling, and re-ranking. As a result, our submission achieves a BLEU score of $36.6$ in Chinese->English.
summary: This paper describes DiDi AI Labs' submission to the WMT2020 news translation shared task. We participate in the translation direction of Chinese->English. In this direction, we use the Transformer as our baseline model, and integrate several techniques for model enhancement, including data filtering, data selection, back-translation, fine-tuning, model ensembling, and re-ranking. As a result, our submission achieves a BLEU score of $36.6$ in Chinese->English.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了滴滴AI实验室提交的WMT2020新闻翻译共享任务。我们参与中文->英文的翻译方向。在这个方向上，我们使用 Transformer 作为基线模型，并集成了多种模型增强技术，包括数据过滤、数据选择、反向翻译、微调、模型集成和重新排序。结果，我们提交的中文->英文 BLEU 得分为 36.6$。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了DiDi AI Labs在WMT2020新闻翻译共享任务中提交的中文到英文翻译系统。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过优化模型和数据处理技术提升新闻文本的翻译质量，满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 以Transformer为基线模型，结合数据过滤、数据选择、反向翻译、微调、模型集成和重排序等技术优化翻译效果。
AI.result: 在中文到英文方向上，系统取得了36.6的BLEU分数。
AI.conclusion: 综合技术手段有效提升了翻译质量，验证了多技术融合在新闻翻译任务中的可行性。

As a result, our submission achieves a BLEU score of $36.6$ in Chinese->English. 本文介绍了滴滴AI实验室提交的WMT2020新闻翻译共享任务。我们参与中文->英文的翻译方向。在这个方向上，我们使用 Transformer 作为基线模型，并集成了多种模型增强技术，包括数据过滤、数据选择、反向翻译、微调、模型集成和重新排序。结果，我们提交的中文->英文 BLEU 得分为 36.6$。 本文描述了DiDi AI Labs在WMT2020新闻翻译共享任务中提交的中文到英文翻译系统。 Tanfang Chen,Weiwei Wang,Wenyang Wei,Xing Shi,Xiangang Li,Jieping Ye,Kevin Knight cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Mehul Damani,Zhiyao Luo,Emerson Wenzel,Guillaume Sartoretti
title: PRIMAL2: Pathfinding via Reinforcement and Imitation Multi-Agent Learning -- Lifelong
title_zh: PRIMAL2：通过强化和模仿多智能体学习寻路——终身
comment: \c{opyright} 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: Multi-agent path finding (MAPF) is an indispensable component of large-scale robot deployments in numerous domains ranging from airport management to warehouse automation. In particular, this work addresses lifelong MAPF (LMAPF) - an online variant of the problem where agents are immediately assigned a new goal upon reaching their current one - in dense and highly structured environments, typical of real-world warehouse operations. Effectively solving LMAPF in such environments requires expensive coordination between agents as well as frequent replanning abilities, a daunting task for existing coupled and decoupled approaches alike. With the purpose of achieving considerable agent coordination without any compromise on reactivity and scalability, we introduce PRIMAL2, a distributed reinforcement learning framework for LMAPF where agents learn fully decentralized policies to reactively plan paths online in a partially observable world. We extend our previous work, which was effective in low-density sparsely occupied worlds, to highly structured and constrained worlds by identifying behaviors and conventions which improve implicit agent coordination, and enable their learning through the construction of a novel local agent observation and various training aids. We present extensive results of PRIMAL2 in both MAPF and LMAPF environments and compare its performance to state-of-the-art planners in terms of makespan and throughput. We show that PRIMAL2 significantly surpasses our previous work and performs comparably to these baselines, while allowing real-time re-planning and scaling up to 2048 agents.
summary: Multi-agent path finding (MAPF) is an indispensable component of large-scale robot deployments in numerous domains ranging from airport management to warehouse automation. In particular, this work addresses lifelong MAPF (LMAPF) - an online variant of the problem where agents are immediately assigned a new goal upon reaching their current one - in dense and highly structured environments, typical of real-world warehouse operations. Effectively solving LMAPF in such environments requires expensive coordination between agents as well as frequent replanning abilities, a daunting task for existing coupled and decoupled approaches alike. With the purpose of achieving considerable agent coordination without any compromise on reactivity and scalability, we introduce PRIMAL2, a distributed reinforcement learning framework for LMAPF where agents learn fully decentralized policies to reactively plan paths online in a partially observable world. We extend our previous work, which was effective in low-density sparsely occupied worlds, to highly structured and constrained worlds by identifying behaviors and conventions which improve implicit agent coordination, and enable their learning through the construction of a novel local agent observation and various training aids. We present extensive results of PRIMAL2 in both MAPF and LMAPF environments and compare its performance to state-of-the-art planners in terms of makespan and throughput. We show that PRIMAL2 significantly surpasses our previous work and performs comparably to these baselines, while allowing real-time re-planning and scaling up to 2048 agents.
abstract_zh: 多代理路径查找（MAPF）是从机场管理到仓库自动化等众多领域大规模机器人部署不可或缺的组成部分。特别是，这项工作解决了终身 MAPF (LMAPF)——该问题的一种在线变体，代理在达到当前目标后立即被分配一个新目标——在密集且高度结构化的环境中，典型的现实世界仓库操作。在这种环境中有效解决 LMAPF 需要智能体之间昂贵的协调以及频繁的重新规划能力，这对于现有的耦合和解耦方法来说都是一项艰巨的任务。为了在不影响反应性和可扩展性的情况下实现相当大的代理协调，我们引入了 PRIMAL2，这是一个 LMAPF 的分布式强化学习框架，其中代理学习完全去中心化的策略，以在部分可观察的世界中在线反应性地规划路径。我们通过识别改善隐式智能体协调的行为和惯例，将之前在低密度稀疏占据的世界中有效的工作扩展到高度结构化和受限的世界，并通过构建新颖的本地智能体观察和各种训练辅助工具来实现它们的学习。我们展示了 PRIMAL2 在 MAPF 和 LMAPF 环境中的广泛结果，并在完工时间和吞吐量方面将其性能与最先进的规划器进行了比较。我们表明 PRIMAL2 显着超越了我们之前的工作，并且性能与这些基线相当，同时允许实时重新规划并扩展到最多 2048 个代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRIMAL2框架，解决密集结构化环境中终身多智能体路径规划（LMAPF）问题，通过分布式强化学习实现去中心化实时路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有MAPF方法在动态目标分配、高密度环境协调及实时重规划能力上存在不足，需开发兼顾反应性、可扩展性与高效协调的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建分布式强化学习框架PRIMAL2，基于局部观测设计去中心化策略，结合行为惯例与训练辅助工具提升隐式协调能力，支持实时重规划。
AI.result: PRIMAL2在makespan和throughput指标上超越前作，性能与基线相当，成功扩展至2048智能体规模，验证实时重规划有效性。
AI.conclusion: PRIMAL2通过强化学习与模仿学习有效解决LMAPF挑战，为高密度动态环境下的多智能体协调提供了可扩展的实时路径规划方案。

authors_text: Rui Wang,Zhihua Wei,Yibin Zhan,Zhuoxi Chen
title: Tongji University Team for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020
title_zh: 同济大学代表队参加 2020 年 VoxCeleb 演讲者识别挑战赛
abstract: In this report, we describe the submission of Tongji University team to the CLOSE track of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) 2020 at Interspeech 2020. We investigate different speaker recognition systems based on the popular ResNet-34 architecture, and train multiple variants via various loss functions. Both Offline and online data augmentation are introduced to improve the diversity of the training set, and score normalization with the exhaustive grid search is applied in the post-processing. Our best fusion of five selected systems for the CLOSE track achieves 0.2800 DCF and 4.7770% EER on the challenge.
summary: In this report, we describe the submission of Tongji University team to the CLOSE track of the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge (VoxSRC) 2020 at Interspeech 2020. We investigate different speaker recognition systems based on the popular ResNet-34 architecture, and train multiple variants via various loss functions. Both Offline and online data augmentation are introduced to improve the diversity of the training set, and score normalization with the exhaustive grid search is applied in the post-processing. Our best fusion of five selected systems for the CLOSE track achieves 0.2800 DCF and 4.7770% EER on the challenge.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了同济大学团队在 Interspeech 2020 上向 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC) 2020 CL​​OSE 赛道提交的作品。我们基于流行的 ResNet-34 架构研究了不同的说话人识别系统，并通过各种损失函数训练多个变体。引入离线和在线数据增强来提高训练集的多样性，并在后处理中应用穷举网格搜索的分数归一化。我们为 CLOSE 赛道选择的五个系统的最佳融合在挑战中实现了 0.2800 DCF 和 4.7770% EER。

AI.tldr: 同济大学团队参加了VoxSRC 2020挑战赛的CLOSE赛道，提交了基于ResNet-34架构的说话人识别系统。
AI.motivation: 为提升远场语音场景下的说话人识别性能，探索不同损失函数与数据增强策略的优化组合。
AI.method: 基于ResNet-34架构设计多变体模型，结合离线/在线数据增强技术，并通过网格搜索进行得分归一化后处理。
AI.result: 融合五种系统的最佳方案在CLOSE赛道上取得0.2800 DCF和4.7770% EER的竞赛成绩。
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合与数据增强策略有效提升了系统性能，验证了深度学习框架在说话人识别任务中的竞争力。

authors_text: Xuanfu Wu,Yang Feng,Chenze Shao
title: Generating Diverse Translation from Model Distribution with Dropout
title_zh: 通过 Dropout 模型分布生成多样化翻译
abstract: Despite the improvement of translation quality, neural machine translation (NMT) often suffers from the lack of diversity in its generation. In this paper, we propose to generate diverse translations by deriving a large number of possible models with Bayesian modelling and sampling models from them for inference. The possible models are obtained by applying concrete dropout to the NMT model and each of them has specific confidence for its prediction, which corresponds to a posterior model distribution under specific training data in the principle of Bayesian modeling. With variational inference, the posterior model distribution can be approximated with a variational distribution, from which the final models for inference are sampled. We conducted experiments on Chinese-English and English-German translation tasks and the results shows that our method makes a better trade-off between diversity and accuracy.
summary: Despite the improvement of translation quality, neural machine translation (NMT) often suffers from the lack of diversity in its generation. In this paper, we propose to generate diverse translations by deriving a large number of possible models with Bayesian modelling and sampling models from them for inference. The possible models are obtained by applying concrete dropout to the NMT model and each of them has specific confidence for its prediction, which corresponds to a posterior model distribution under specific training data in the principle of Bayesian modeling. With variational inference, the posterior model distribution can be approximated with a variational distribution, from which the final models for inference are sampled. We conducted experiments on Chinese-English and English-German translation tasks and the results shows that our method makes a better trade-off between diversity and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 尽管翻译质量有所提高，但神经机器翻译（NMT）在其生成过程中常常缺乏多样性。在本文中，我们建议通过贝叶斯建模派生大量可能的模型并从中采样模型进行推理来生成多样化的翻译。可能的模型是通过将具体的dropout应用于NMT模型而获得的，并且每个模型对其预测都有特定的置信度，这对应于贝叶斯建模原理中特定训练数据下的后验模型分布。通过变分推理，后验模型分布可以用变分分布来近似，从中采样最终的推理模型。我们对汉英和英德翻译任务进行了实验，结果表明我们的方法在多样性和准确性之间做出了更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过贝叶斯建模与Dropout技术生成多样化翻译，解决神经机器翻译中多样性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经机器翻译模型虽提升翻译质量，但生成结果缺乏多样性，难以满足需要多变表达的应用场景。
AI.method: 在NMT模型中应用具体Dropout生成多个模型，通过贝叶斯建模形成后验分布，并利用变分推断采样模型进行翻译推理。
AI.result: 在中英与英德翻译任务中，该方法在保持准确性的同时显著提升翻译多样性，实现多样性与准确性的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模型分布采样有效增强翻译多样性，为神经机器翻译提供了新的优化方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过贝叶斯建模与Dropout技术生成多样化翻译，解决神经机器翻译中多样性不足的问题。

search_text: Generating Diverse Translation from Model Distribution with Dropout 通过 Dropout 模型分布生成多样化翻译 Despite the improvement of translation quality, neural machine translation (NMT) often suffers from the lack of diversity in its generation. In this paper, we propose to generate diverse translations by deriving a large number of possible models with Bayesian modelling and sampling models from them for inference. The possible models are obtained by applying concrete dropout to the NMT model and each of them has specific confidence for its prediction, which corresponds to a posterior model distribution under specific training data in the principle of Bayesian modeling. With variational inference, the posterior model distribution can be approximated with a variational distribution, from which the final models for inference are sampled. We conducted experiments on Chinese-English and English-German translation tasks and the results shows that our method makes a better trade-off between diversity and accuracy. 尽管翻译质量有所提高，但神经机器翻译（NMT）在其生成过程中常常缺乏多样性。在本文中，我们建议通过贝叶斯建模派生大量可能的模型并从中采样模型进行推理来生成多样化的翻译。可能的模型是通过将具体的dropout应用于NMT模型而获得的，并且每个模型对其预测都有特定的置信度，这对应于贝叶斯建模原理中特定训练数据下的后验模型分布。通过变分推理，后验模型分布可以用变分分布来近似，从中采样最终的推理模型。我们对汉英和英德翻译任务进行了实验，结果表明我们的方法在多样性和准确性之间做出了更好的权衡。 本文提出通过贝叶斯建模与Dropout技术生成多样化翻译，解决神经机器翻译中多样性不足的问题。 Xuanfu Wu,Yang Feng,Chenze Shao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xuanhong Chen,Xirui Yan,Naiyuan Liu,Ting Qiu,Bingbing Ni
title: Anisotropic Stroke Control for Multiple Artists Style Transfer
title_zh: 用于多位艺术家风格转移的各向异性笔画控制
abstract: Though significant progress has been made in artistic style transfer, semantic information is usually difficult to be preserved in a fine-grained locally consistent manner by most existing methods, especially when multiple artists styles are required to transfer within one single model. To circumvent this issue, we propose a Stroke Control Multi-Artist Style Transfer framework. On the one hand, we develop a multi-condition single-generator structure which first performs multi-artist style transfer. On the one hand, we design an Anisotropic Stroke Module (ASM) which realizes the dynamic adjustment of style-stroke between the non-trivial and the trivial regions. ASM endows the network with the ability of adaptive semantic-consistency among various styles. On the other hand, we present an novel Multi-Scale Projection Discriminator} to realize the texture-level conditional generation. In contrast to the single-scale conditional discriminator, our discriminator is able to capture multi-scale texture clue to effectively distinguish a wide range of artistic styles. Extensive experimental results well demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of our approach. Our framework can transform a photograph into different artistic style oil painting via only ONE single model. Furthermore, the results are with distinctive artistic style and retain the anisotropic semantic information. The code is already available on github: https://github.com/neuralchen/ASMAGAN.
summary: Though significant progress has been made in artistic style transfer, semantic information is usually difficult to be preserved in a fine-grained locally consistent manner by most existing methods, especially when multiple artists styles are required to transfer within one single model. To circumvent this issue, we propose a Stroke Control Multi-Artist Style Transfer framework. On the one hand, we develop a multi-condition single-generator structure which first performs multi-artist style transfer. On the one hand, we design an Anisotropic Stroke Module (ASM) which realizes the dynamic adjustment of style-stroke between the non-trivial and the trivial regions. ASM endows the network with the ability of adaptive semantic-consistency among various styles. On the other hand, we present an novel Multi-Scale Projection Discriminator} to realize the texture-level conditional generation. In contrast to the single-scale conditional discriminator, our discriminator is able to capture multi-scale texture clue to effectively distinguish a wide range of artistic styles. Extensive experimental results well demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of our approach. Our framework can transform a photograph into different artistic style oil painting via only ONE single model. Furthermore, the results are with distinctive artistic style and retain the anisotropic semantic information. The code is already available on github: https://github.com/neuralchen/ASMAGAN.
abstract_zh: 尽管在艺术风格迁移方面取得了重大进展，但大多数现有方法通常难以以细粒度局部一致的方式保存语义信息，特别是当需要在一个模型中迁移多个艺术家风格时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个笔画控制多艺术家风格转移框架。一方面，我们开发了一种多条件单生成器结构，该结构首先执行多艺术家风格迁移。一方面，我们设计了一个各向异性笔画模块（ASM），它实现了非平凡区域和平凡区域之间笔画风格的动态调整。 ASM赋予网络各种风格之间自适应语义一致性的能力。另一方面，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度投影鉴别器}来实现纹理级条件生成。与单尺度条件判别器相比，我们的判别器能够捕获多尺度纹理线索，以有效地区分各种艺术风格。大量的实验结果很好地证明了我们方法的可行性和有效性。我们的框架可以通过一个单一的模型将一张照片转换成不同艺术风格的油画。此外，结果具有鲜明的艺术风格并保留了各向异性的语义信息。该代码已在 github 上提供：https://github.com/neuralchen/ASMAGAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多艺术家风格迁移框架，通过各向异性笔触控制解决单一模型中多风格转换时的语义信息保留问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在细粒度局部一致性上难以保留语义信息，尤其当需要在一个模型中迁移多个艺术家风格时效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计多条件单生成器结构、各向异性笔触模块(ASM)实现动态笔触调整，以及多尺度投影鉴别器捕捉纹理特征。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能通过单一模型生成具有明显艺术风格且保留各向异性语义信息的油画作品，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ASMAGAN框架有效解决了多艺术家风格迁移中的语义一致性难题，实现了高质量的跨风格艺术化转换。

On the one hand, we design an Anisotropic Stroke Module (ASM) which realizes the dynamic adjustment of style-stroke between the non-trivial and the trivial regions. authors_text: Haruki Nishimura,Negar Mehr,Adrien Gaidon,Mac Schwager
title: RAT iLQR: A Risk Auto-Tuning Controller to Optimally Account for Stochastic Model Mismatch
title_zh: RAT iLQR：一种风险自动调整控制器，可最佳地解决随机模型不匹配的问题
comment: To appear in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: To appear in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Successful robotic operation in stochastic environments relies on accurate characterization of the underlying probability distributions, yet this is often imperfect due to limited knowledge. This work presents a control algorithm that is capable of handling such distributional mismatches. Specifically, we propose a novel nonlinear MPC for distributionally robust control, which plans locally optimal feedback policies against a worst-case distribution within a given KL divergence bound from a Gaussian distribution. Leveraging mathematical equivalence between distributionally robust control and risk-sensitive optimal control, our framework also provides an algorithm to dynamically adjust the risk-sensitivity level online for risk-sensitive control. The benefits of the distributional robustness as well as the automatic risk-sensitivity adjustment are demonstrated in a dynamic collision avoidance scenario where the predictive distribution of human motion is erroneous.
summary: Successful robotic operation in stochastic environments relies on accurate characterization of the underlying probability distributions, yet this is often imperfect due to limited knowledge. This work presents a control algorithm that is capable of handling such distributional mismatches. Specifically, we propose a novel nonlinear MPC for distributionally robust control, which plans locally optimal feedback policies against a worst-case distribution within a given KL divergence bound from a Gaussian distribution. Leveraging mathematical equivalence between distributionally robust control and risk-sensitive optimal control, our framework also provides an algorithm to dynamically adjust the risk-sensitivity level online for risk-sensitive control. The benefits of the distributional robustness as well as the automatic risk-sensitivity adjustment are demonstrated in a dynamic collision avoidance scenario where the predictive distribution of human motion is erroneous.
abstract_zh: 随机环境中成功的机器人操作依赖于对潜在概率分布的准确表征，但由于知识有限，这通常是不完善的。这项工作提出了一种能够处理这种分布不匹配的控制算法。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于分布鲁棒控制的新型非线性 MPC，它针对高斯分布给定 KL 散度范围内的最坏情况分布规划局部最优反馈策略。利用分布鲁棒控制和风险敏感最优控制之间的数学等价性，我们的框架还提供了一种算法来在线动态调整风险敏感度水平以实现风险敏感控制。在人体运动的预测分布错误的动态防撞场景中，证明了分布鲁棒性以及自动风险敏感性调整的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RAT iLQR的控制算法，通过分布鲁棒控制和自动风险调整机制，解决机器人在随机模型不匹配环境中的最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 实际环境中概率分布难以精确建模，导致模型预测与真实情况存在偏差，传统控制方法在面对此类不确定性时容易失效，需设计更具鲁棒性的控制策略。
AI.method: 基于分布鲁棒控制理论，提出非线性MPC框架，在KL散度约束下规划对抗最坏情况分布的反馈策略；利用风险敏感控制的数学等价性，实现风险参数的在线动态调整。
AI.result: 在动态避障实验中验证了算法有效性，即使人类运动预测分布存在错误，仍能通过自动风险调整实现安全路径规划，证明了分布鲁棒性和自适应风险调节的优势。
AI.conclusion: RAT iLQR通过结合分布鲁棒控制与风险自适应机制，为应对模型不确定性提供了新思路，在动态不确定环境中展现出良好的控制性能和安全性保障。

conclusion: RAT iLQR通过结合分布鲁棒控制与风险自适应机制，为应对模型不确定性提供了新思路，在动态不确定环境中展现出良好的控制性能和安全性保障。
search_text: RAT iLQR: A Risk Auto-Tuning Controller to Optimally Account for Stochastic Model Mismatch RAT iLQR：一种风险自动调整控制器，可最佳地解决随机模型不匹配的问题 Successful robotic operation in stochastic environments relies on accurate characterization of the underlying probability distributions, yet this is often imperfect due to limited knowledge. This work presents a control algorithm that is capable of handling such distributional mismatches. Specifically, we propose a novel nonlinear MPC for distributionally robust control, which plans locally optimal feedback policies against a worst-case distribution within a given KL divergence bound from a Gaussian distribution. Leveraging mathematical equivalence between distributionally robust control and risk-sensitive optimal control, our framework also provides an algorithm to dynamically adjust the risk-sensitivity level online for risk-sensitive control. The benefits of the distributional robustness as well as the automatic risk-sensitivity adjustment are demonstrated in a dynamic collision avoidance scenario where the predictive distribution of human motion is erroneous. 随机环境中成功的机器人操作依赖于对潜在概率分布的准确表征，但由于知识有限，这通常是不完善的。这项工作提出了一种能够处理这种分布不匹配的控制算法。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于分布鲁棒控制的新型非线性 MPC，它针对高斯分布给定 KL 散度范围内的最坏情况分布规划局部最优反馈策略。利用分布鲁棒控制和风险敏感最优控制之间的数学等价性，我们的框架还提供了一种算法来在线动态调整风险敏感度水平以实现风险敏感控制。在人体运动的预测分布错误的动态防撞场景中，证明了分布鲁棒性以及自动风险敏感性调整的优势。 本文提出一种名为RAT iLQR的控制算法，通过分布鲁棒控制和自动风险调整机制，解决机器人在随机模型不匹配环境中的最优控制问题。 Haruki Nishimura,Negar Mehr,Adrien Gaidon,Mac Schwager cs.RO

authors_text: Cheng-Yu Kuo,Andreas Schaarschmidt,Yunduan Cui,Tamim Asfour,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Uncertainty-aware Contact-safe Model-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于不确定性的接触安全模型强化学习
comment: 8 pages, Accepted by Robotics and Automation Letters with ICRA 2021 option
comments: 8 pages, Accepted by Robotics and Automation Letters with ICRA 2021 option
abstract: This letter presents contact-safe Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) for robot applications that achieves contact-safe behaviors in the learning process. In typical MBRL, we cannot expect the data-driven model to generate accurate and reliable policies to the intended robotic tasks during the learning process due to sample scarcity. Operating these unreliable policies in a contact-rich environment could cause damage to the robot and its surroundings. To alleviate the risk of causing damage through unexpected intensive physical contacts, we present the contact-safe MBRL that associates the probabilistic Model Predictive Control's (pMPC) control limits with the model uncertainty so that the allowed acceleration of controlled behavior is adjusted according to learning progress. Control planning with such uncertainty-aware control limits is formulated as a deterministic MPC problem using a computation-efficient approximated GP dynamics and an approximated inference technique. Our approach's effectiveness is evaluated through bowl mixing tasks with simulated and real robots, scooping tasks with a real robot as examples of contact-rich manipulation skills. (video: https://youtu.be/sdhHP3NhYi0)
summary: This letter presents contact-safe Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) for robot applications that achieves contact-safe behaviors in the learning process. In typical MBRL, we cannot expect the data-driven model to generate accurate and reliable policies to the intended robotic tasks during the learning process due to sample scarcity. Operating these unreliable policies in a contact-rich environment could cause damage to the robot and its surroundings. To alleviate the risk of causing damage through unexpected intensive physical contacts, we present the contact-safe MBRL that associates the probabilistic Model Predictive Control's (pMPC) control limits with the model uncertainty so that the allowed acceleration of controlled behavior is adjusted according to learning progress. Control planning with such uncertainty-aware control limits is formulated as a deterministic MPC problem using a computation-efficient approximated GP dynamics and an approximated inference technique. Our approach's effectiveness is evaluated through bowl mixing tasks with simulated and real robots, scooping tasks with a real robot as examples of contact-rich manipulation skills. (video: https://youtu.be/sdhHP3NhYi0)
abstract_zh: 这封信介绍了用于机器人应用的基于接触安全模型的强化学习 (MBRL)，可在学习过程中实现接触安全行为。在典型的 MBRL 中，由于样本稀缺，我们不能指望数据驱动模型在学习过程中为预期的机器人任务生成准确可靠的策略。在接触丰富的环境中执行这些不可靠的策略可能会对机器人及其周围环境造成损坏。为了减轻意外密集物理接触造成损害的风险，我们提出了接触安全 MBRL，它将概率模型预测控制 (pMPC) 的控制限制与模型不确定性相关联，以便根据学习进度调整受控行为的允许加速度。使用计算高效的近似 GP 动力学和近似推理技术，将具有这种不确定性感知控制极限的控制规划表述为确定性 MPC 问题。我们的方法的有效性是通过模拟和真实机器人的碗混合任务、真实机器人的舀取任务作为接触丰富的操纵技能的例子来评估的。 （视频：https://youtu.be/sdhHP3NhYi0）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性感知的接触安全模型强化学习方法，通过调整控制策略降低机器人在学习过程中的物理接触风险。
AI.motivation: 传统模型强化学习在样本稀缺时生成的策略不可靠，可能导致机器人在接触丰富的环境中受损，需通过安全机制避免意外接触损伤。
AI.method: 将概率模型预测控制（pMPC）的控制限制与模型不确定性关联，利用近似高斯过程动态和推理技术，转化为计算高效的确定性MPC问题。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实机器人碗混合、舀取任务中验证了方法有效性，成功实现接触丰富的操作技能学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过不确定性感知的控制限制，提升了机器人在学习过程中的接触安全性，适用于复杂物理交互任务。
