authors_text: Esther Rolf,Jonathan Proctor,Tamma Carleton,Ian Bolliger,Vaishaal Shankar,Miyabi Ishihara,Benjamin Recht,Solomon Hsiang
title: A Generalizable and Accessible Approach to Machine Learning with Global Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 利用全球卫星图像进行机器学习的通用且易于理解的方法
abstract: Combining satellite imagery with machine learning (SIML) has the potential to address global challenges by remotely estimating socioeconomic and environmental conditions in data-poor regions, yet the resource requirements of SIML limit its accessibility and use. We show that a single encoding of satellite imagery can generalize across diverse prediction tasks (e.g. forest cover, house price, road length). Our method achieves accuracy competitive with deep neural networks at orders of magnitude lower computational cost, scales globally, delivers label super-resolution predictions, and facilitates characterizations of uncertainty. Since image encodings are shared across tasks, they can be centrally computed and distributed to unlimited researchers, who need only fit a linear regression to their own ground truth data in order to achieve state-of-the-art SIML performance.
summary: Combining satellite imagery with machine learning (SIML) has the potential to address global challenges by remotely estimating socioeconomic and environmental conditions in data-poor regions, yet the resource requirements of SIML limit its accessibility and use. We show that a single encoding of satellite imagery can generalize across diverse prediction tasks (e.g. forest cover, house price, road length). Our method achieves accuracy competitive with deep neural networks at orders of magnitude lower computational cost, scales globally, delivers label super-resolution predictions, and facilitates characterizations of uncertainty. Since image encodings are shared across tasks, they can be centrally computed and distributed to unlimited researchers, who need only fit a linear regression to their own ground truth data in order to achieve state-of-the-art SIML performance.
abstract_zh: 将卫星图像与机器学习 (SIML) 相结合，有可能通过远程估计数据贫乏地区的社会经济和环境条件来应对全球挑战，但 SIML 的资源需求限制了其可访问性和使用。我们表明，卫星图像的单一编码可以概括不同的预测任务（例如森林覆盖、房价、道路长度）。我们的方法以低几个数量级的计算成本实现了与深度神经网络竞争的准确性，可在全球范围内扩展，提供标签超分辨率预测，并促进不确定性的表征。由于图像编码是跨任务共享的，因此它们可以集中计算并分发给无限的研究人员，他们只需将线性回归拟合到自己的地面实况数据即可实现最先进的 SIML 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用且可访问的机器学习方法，通过卫星图像编码实现全球多任务预测。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星图像与机器学习（SIML）方法因计算成本高而限制了其在数据匮乏地区的应用，需更高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用单一卫星图像编码跨任务共享，结合线性回归模型拟合局部地面数据，降低计算复杂度并保持预测精度。
AI.result: 方法在森林覆盖、房价等任务中达到与深度网络相当的准确率，计算成本降低数个数量级，支持全球扩展与不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: 共享编码与线性回归框架显著提升了SIML的可访问性与泛化能力，为全球数据匮乏地区提供高效分析工具。

authors_text: Bachir El Khadir,Jean Bernard Lasserre,Vikas Sindhwani
title: Piecewise-Linear Motion Planning amidst Static, Moving, or Morphing Obstacles
title_zh: 静态、移动或变形障碍物中的分段线性运动规划
abstract: We propose a novel method for planning shortest length piecewise-linear motions through complex environments punctured with static, moving, or even morphing obstacles. Using a moment optimization approach, we formulate a hierarchy of semidefinite programs that yield increasingly refined lower bounds converging monotonically to the optimal path length. For computational tractability, our global moment optimization approach motivates an iterative motion planner that outperforms competing sampling-based and nonlinear optimization baselines. Our method natively handles continuous time constraints without any need for time discretization, and has the potential to scale better with dimensions compared to popular sampling-based methods.
summary: We propose a novel method for planning shortest length piecewise-linear motions through complex environments punctured with static, moving, or even morphing obstacles. Using a moment optimization approach, we formulate a hierarchy of semidefinite programs that yield increasingly refined lower bounds converging monotonically to the optimal path length. For computational tractability, our global moment optimization approach motivates an iterative motion planner that outperforms competing sampling-based and nonlinear optimization baselines. Our method natively handles continuous time constraints without any need for time discretization, and has the potential to scale better with dimensions compared to popular sampling-based methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于在充满静态、移动甚至变形障碍物的复杂环境中规划最短长度分段线性运动。使用矩优化方法，我们制定了半定程序的层次结构，产生越来越细化的下界，单调收敛到最佳路径长度。为了计算的易处理性，我们的全局矩优化方法激发了迭代运动规划器，其性能优于基于采样和非线性优化基线的竞争。我们的方法本身可以处理连续时间约束，无需时间离散化，并且与流行的基于采样的方法相比，有可能更好地扩展维度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在静态、移动或变形障碍物环境中规划最短分段线性路径的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维空间或动态障碍物时存在效率低、难以保证最优性等问题。
AI.method: 通过矩优化构建半定规划层次结构，结合迭代运动规划器，无需时间离散化处理连续时间约束。
AI.result: 该方法在路径长度下界收敛性、计算效率及高维扩展性上优于传统采样和非线性优化方法。

search_text: Piecewise-Linear Motion Planning amidst Static, Moving, or Morphing Obstacles 静态、移动或变形障碍物中的分段线性运动规划 We propose a novel method for planning shortest length piecewise-linear motions through complex environments punctured with static, moving, or even morphing obstacles. Using a moment optimization approach, we formulate a hierarchy of semidefinite programs that yield increasingly refined lower bounds converging monotonically to the optimal path length. For computational tractability, our global moment optimization approach motivates an iterative motion planner that outperforms competing sampling-based and nonlinear optimization baselines. Our method natively handles continuous time constraints without any need for time discretization, and has the potential to scale better with dimensions compared to popular sampling-based methods. 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于在充满静态、移动甚至变形障碍物的复杂环境中规划最短长度分段线性运动。使用矩优化方法，我们制定了半定程序的层次结构，产生越来越细化的下界，单调收敛到最佳路径长度。为了计算的易处理性，我们的全局矩优化方法激发了迭代运动规划器，其性能优于基于采样和非线性优化基线的竞争。我们的方法本身可以处理连续时间约束，无需时间离散化，并且与流行的基于采样的方法相比，有可能更好地扩展维度。 本文提出一种在静态、移动或变形障碍物环境中规划最短分段线性路径的新方法。 Bachir El Khadir,Jean Bernard Lasserre,Vikas Sindhwani cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Anshul Shah,Shlok Mishra,Ankan Bansal,Jun-Cheng Chen,Rama Chellappa,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Pose And Joint-Aware Action Recognition
title_zh: 姿势和联合感知动作识别
abstract: Recent progress on action recognition has mainly focused on RGB and optical flow features. In this paper, we approach the problem of joint-based action recognition. Unlike other modalities, constellation of joints and their motion generate models with succinct human motion information for activity recognition. We present a new model for joint-based action recognition, which first extracts motion features from each joint separately through a shared motion encoder before performing collective reasoning. Our joint selector module re-weights the joint information to select the most discriminative joints for the task. We also propose a novel joint-contrastive loss that pulls together groups of joint features which convey the same action. We strengthen the joint-based representations by using a geometry-aware data augmentation technique which jitters pose heatmaps while retaining the dynamics of the action. We show large improvements over the current state-of-the-art joint-based approaches on JHMDB, HMDB, Charades, AVA action recognition datasets. A late fusion with RGB and Flow-based approaches yields additional improvements. Our model also outperforms the existing baseline on Mimetics, a dataset with out-of-context actions.
summary: Recent progress on action recognition has mainly focused on RGB and optical flow features. In this paper, we approach the problem of joint-based action recognition. Unlike other modalities, constellation of joints and their motion generate models with succinct human motion information for activity recognition. We present a new model for joint-based action recognition, which first extracts motion features from each joint separately through a shared motion encoder before performing collective reasoning. Our joint selector module re-weights the joint information to select the most discriminative joints for the task. We also propose a novel joint-contrastive loss that pulls together groups of joint features which convey the same action. We strengthen the joint-based representations by using a geometry-aware data augmentation technique which jitters pose heatmaps while retaining the dynamics of the action. We show large improvements over the current state-of-the-art joint-based approaches on JHMDB, HMDB, Charades, AVA action recognition datasets. A late fusion with RGB and Flow-based approaches yields additional improvements. Our model also outperforms the existing baseline on Mimetics, a dataset with out-of-context actions.
abstract_zh: 动作识别的最新进展主要集中在 RGB 和光流特征上。在本文中，我们解决基于联合的动作识别问题。与其他模式不同，关节群及其运动生成具有简洁的人体运动信息的模型，用于活动识别。我们提出了一种基于关节的动作识别的新模型，该模型首先通过共享运动编码器分别从每个关节提取运动特征，然后再进行集体推理。我们的关节选择器模块重新加权关节信息，以选择任务中最具辨别力的关节。我们还提出了一种新颖的联合对比损失，它将传达相同动作的联合特征组聚集在一起。我们通过使用几何感知数据增强技术来增强基于关节的表示，该技术通过抖动形成热图，同时保留动作的动态。我们在 JHMDB、HMDB、Charades、AVA 动作识别数据集上展示了相对于当前最先进的基于联合的方法的巨大改进。后期与 RGB 和基于 Flow 的方法的融合产生了额外的改进。我们的模型还优于 Mimetics 的现有基线，Mimetics 是一个具有脱离上下文操作的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于姿态和关节信息的动作识别方法，通过建模人体关节运动特征提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统动作识别依赖RGB和光流特征，未能充分挖掘人体关节位置与运动模式的判别性信息，而关节特征能更简洁地表征人类运动模式。
AI.method: 设计共享运动编码器提取各关节运动特征，引入关节选择模块动态加权关键关节，提出关节对比损失强化同类动作特征一致性，并采用几何感知数据增强技术提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在JHMDB、HMDB、Charades、AVA等数据集上显著超越现有关节基方法，与RGB/光流方法融合后进一步提升性能，在Mimetics数据集上也优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模关节运动特征与几何关系，本文方法有效提升了动作识别性能，验证了关节感知表征在动作理解任务中的优势。

authors_text: Rakshitha Godahewa,Christoph Bergmeir,Geoffrey I. Webb,Pablo Montero-Manso
title: An Accurate and Fully-Automated Ensemble Model for Weekly Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 用于每周时间序列预测的准确且全自动的集成模型
abstract: Many businesses and industries require accurate forecasts for weekly time series nowadays. However, the forecasting literature does not currently provide easy-to-use, automatic, reproducible and accurate approaches dedicated to this task. We propose a forecasting method in this domain to fill this gap, leveraging state-of-the-art forecasting techniques, such as forecast combination, meta-learning, and global modelling. We consider different meta-learning architectures, algorithms, and base model pools. Based on all considered model variants, we propose to use a stacking approach with lasso regression which optimally combines the forecasts of four base models: a global Recurrent Neural Network model (RNN), Theta, Trigonometric Box-Cox ARMA Trend Seasonal (TBATS) and Dynamic Harmonic Regression ARIMA (DHR-ARIMA), as it shows the overall best performance across seven experimental weekly datasets on four evaluation metrics. Our proposed method also consistently outperforms a set of benchmarks and state-of-the-art weekly forecasting models by a considerable margin with statistical significance. Our method can produce the most accurate forecasts, in terms of mean sMAPE, for the M4 weekly dataset among all benchmarks and all original competition participants.
summary: Many businesses and industries require accurate forecasts for weekly time series nowadays. However, the forecasting literature does not currently provide easy-to-use, automatic, reproducible and accurate approaches dedicated to this task. We propose a forecasting method in this domain to fill this gap, leveraging state-of-the-art forecasting techniques, such as forecast combination, meta-learning, and global modelling. We consider different meta-learning architectures, algorithms, and base model pools. Based on all considered model variants, we propose to use a stacking approach with lasso regression which optimally combines the forecasts of four base models: a global Recurrent Neural Network model (RNN), Theta, Trigonometric Box-Cox ARMA Trend Seasonal (TBATS) and Dynamic Harmonic Regression ARIMA (DHR-ARIMA), as it shows the overall best performance across seven experimental weekly datasets on four evaluation metrics. Our proposed method also consistently outperforms a set of benchmarks and state-of-the-art weekly forecasting models by a considerable margin with statistical significance. Our method can produce the most accurate forecasts, in terms of mean sMAPE, for the M4 weekly dataset among all benchmarks and all original competition participants.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多企业和行业都需要对每周时间序列进行准确预测。然而，预测文献目前并未提供专门用于此任务的易于使用、自动、可重复且准确的方法。我们提出了该领域的预测方法来填补这一空白，利用最先进的预测技术，例如预测组合、元学习和全局建模。我们考虑不同的元学习架构、算法和基础模型池。基于所有考虑的模型变体，我们建议使用带有套索回归的堆叠方法，该方法最佳地结合了四个基本模型的预测：全局循环神经网络模型（RNN）、Theta、三角Box-Cox ARMA趋势季节性（TBATS）和动态谐波回归ARIMA（DHR-ARIMA），因为它显示了四个评估指标的七个实验每周数据集的总体最佳性能。我们提出的方法也始终优于一组基准和最先进的每周预测模型，并且具有统计显着性。我们的方法可以对所有基准和所有原始竞赛参与者中的 M4 每周数据集的平均 sMAPE 产生最准确的预测。

AI.tldr: 提出一种全自动集成模型，用于提升周时间序列预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测方法缺乏易用、自动、可重复且准确的周时间序列预测方案，难以满足实际业务需求。
AI.method: 采用堆叠方法结合Lasso回归，集成RNN、Theta、TBATS和DHR-ARIMA四个基础模型，并通过元学习优化组合策略。
AI.result: 在七个实验数据集上显著优于基准模型和现有方法，在M4数据集上达到最低sMAPE指标。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方法能有效提升周预测精度，为实际业务提供可靠预测工具。

Based on all considered model variants, we propose to use a stacking approach with lasso regression which optimally combines the forecasts of four base models: a global Recurrent Neural Network model (RNN), Theta, Trigonometric Box-Cox ARMA Trend Seasonal (TBATS) and Dynamic Harmonic Regression ARIMA (DHR-ARIMA), as it shows the overall best performance across seven experimental weekly datasets on four evaluation metrics. Our proposed method also consistently outperforms a set of benchmarks and state-of-the-art weekly forecasting models by a considerable margin with statistical significance. Our method can produce the most accurate forecasts, in terms of mean sMAPE, for the M4 weekly dataset among all benchmarks and all original competition participants. 如今，许多企业和行业都需要对每周时间序列进行准确预测。然而，预测文献目前并未提供专门用于此任务的易于使用、自动、可重复且准确的方法。我们提出了该领域的预测方法来填补这一空白，利用最先进的预测技术，例如预测组合、元学习和全局建模。我们考虑不同的元学习架构、算法和基础模型池。基于所有考虑的模型变体，我们建议使用带有套索回归的堆叠方法，该方法最佳地结合了四个基本模型的预测：全局循环神经网络模型（RNN）、Theta、三角Box-Cox ARMA趋势季节性（TBATS）和动态谐波回归ARIMA（DHR-ARIMA），因为它显示了四个评估指标的七个实验每周数据集的总体最佳性能。我们提出的方法也始终优于一组基准和最先进的每周预测模型，并且具有统计显着性。我们的方法可以对所有基准和所有原始竞赛参与者中的 M4 每周数据集的平均 sMAPE 产生最准确的预测。 提出一种全自动集成模型，用于提升周时间序列预测的准确性。 Rakshitha Godahewa,Christoph Bergmeir,Geoffrey I. Webb,Pablo Montero-Manso cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Shayan Monadjemi,Sunwoo Ha,Quan Nguyen,Henry Chai,Roman Garnett,Alvitta Ottley
title: Guided Data Discovery in Interactive Visualizations via Active Search
title_zh: 通过主动搜索在交互式可视化中引导数据发现
abstract: Recent advances in visual analytics have enabled us to learn from user interactions and uncover analytic goals. These innovations set the foundation for actively guiding users during data exploration. Providing such guidance will become more critical as datasets grow in size and complexity, precluding exhaustive investigation. Meanwhile, the machine learning community also struggles with datasets growing in size and complexity, precluding exhaustive labeling. Active learning is a broad family of algorithms developed for actively guiding models during training. We will consider the intersection of these analogous research thrusts. First, we discuss the nuances of matching the choice of an active learning algorithm to the task at hand. This is critical for performance, a fact we demonstrate in a simulation study. We then present results of a user study for the particular task of data discovery guided by an active learning algorithm specifically designed for this task.
summary: Recent advances in visual analytics have enabled us to learn from user interactions and uncover analytic goals. These innovations set the foundation for actively guiding users during data exploration. Providing such guidance will become more critical as datasets grow in size and complexity, precluding exhaustive investigation. Meanwhile, the machine learning community also struggles with datasets growing in size and complexity, precluding exhaustive labeling. Active learning is a broad family of algorithms developed for actively guiding models during training. We will consider the intersection of these analogous research thrusts. First, we discuss the nuances of matching the choice of an active learning algorithm to the task at hand. This is critical for performance, a fact we demonstrate in a simulation study. We then present results of a user study for the particular task of data discovery guided by an active learning algorithm specifically designed for this task.
abstract_zh: 可视化分析的最新进展使我们能够从用户交互中学习并发现分析目标。这些创新为在数据探索过程中积极指导用户奠定了基础。随着数据集规模和复杂性的增长，提供此类指导将变得更加重要，从而排除详尽的调查。与此同时，机器学习社区还面临着数据集规模和复杂性不断增长的问题，无法进行详尽的标记。主动学习是为在训练期间主动指导模型而开发的广泛算法系列。我们将考虑这些类似研究主旨的交叉点。首先，我们讨论将主动学习算法的选择与手头的任务相匹配的细微差别。这对于性能至关重要，我们在模拟研究中证明了这一点。然后，我们展示针对特定数据发现任务的用户研究结果，该任务由专门为此任务设计的主动学习算法引导。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过主动学习算法引导用户在交互式可视化中进行数据发现，以应对数据集规模和复杂性带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着数据集规模和复杂性增加，传统方法难以实现全面调查和标注，需通过主动学习算法主动引导用户和模型提升效率。
AI.method: 分析主动学习算法与任务的匹配策略，通过模拟研究验证性能，并设计用户研究评估特定任务中算法引导数据发现的效果。
AI.result: 模拟研究验证了算法匹配的重要性，用户研究显示主动学习算法能有效辅助用户完成数据发现任务。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习与交互式可视化的结合可提升大规模数据探索效率，算法选择需与具体任务紧密匹配。

authors_text: Wenbin Zhang
title: Online and Customizable Fairness-aware Learning
title_zh: 在线和可定制的公平意识学习
comment: Accepted for publication in Knowledge and Information Systems. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.07237
comments: Accepted for publication in Knowledge and Information Systems. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1907.07237
abstract: While artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision-making systems are increasingly popular, significant concerns on the potential discrimination during the AI decision-making process have been observed. For example, the distribution of predictions is usually biased and dependents on the sensitive attributes (e.g., gender and ethnicity). Numerous approaches have therefore been proposed to develop decision-making systems that are discrimination-conscious by-design, which are typically batch-based and require the simultaneous availability of all the training data for model learning. However, in the real-world, the data streams usually come on the fly which requires the model to process each input data once ``on arrival'' and without the need for storage and reprocessing. In addition, the data streams might also evolve over time, which further requires the model to be able to simultaneously adapt to non-stationary data distributions and time-evolving bias patterns, with an effective and robust trade-off between accuracy and fairness. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of online decision tree with fairness in the data stream with possible distribution drifting. Specifically, first, we propose two novel fairness splitting criteria that encode the data as well as possible, while simultaneously removing dependence on the sensitive attributes, and further adapts to non-stationary distribution with fine-grained control when needed. Second, we propose two fairness decision tree online growth algorithms that fulfills different online fair decision-making requirements. Our experiments show that our algorithms are able to deal with discrimination in massive and non-stationary streaming environments, with a better trade-off between fairness and predictive performance.
summary: While artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision-making systems are increasingly popular, significant concerns on the potential discrimination during the AI decision-making process have been observed. For example, the distribution of predictions is usually biased and dependents on the sensitive attributes (e.g., gender and ethnicity). Numerous approaches have therefore been proposed to develop decision-making systems that are discrimination-conscious by-design, which are typically batch-based and require the simultaneous availability of all the training data for model learning. However, in the real-world, the data streams usually come on the fly which requires the model to process each input data once ``on arrival'' and without the need for storage and reprocessing. In addition, the data streams might also evolve over time, which further requires the model to be able to simultaneously adapt to non-stationary data distributions and time-evolving bias patterns, with an effective and robust trade-off between accuracy and fairness. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of online decision tree with fairness in the data stream with possible distribution drifting. Specifically, first, we propose two novel fairness splitting criteria that encode the data as well as possible, while simultaneously removing dependence on the sensitive attributes, and further adapts to non-stationary distribution with fine-grained control when needed. Second, we propose two fairness decision tree online growth algorithms that fulfills different online fair decision-making requirements. Our experiments show that our algorithms are able to deal with discrimination in massive and non-stationary streaming environments, with a better trade-off between fairness and predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于人工智能 (AI) 的决策系统越来越受欢迎，但人们对人工智能决策过程中潜在的歧视存在严重担忧。例如，预测的分布通常存在偏差并且取决于敏感属性（例如性别和种族）。因此，人们提出了许多方法来开发设计时具有区分意识的决策系统，这些系统通常是基于批处理的，并且需要同时提供用于模型学习的所有训练数据。然而，在现实世界中，数据流通常是动态的，这要求模型在“到达”时处理每个输入数据，而不需要存储和重新处理。此外，数据流也可能随着时间的推移而演变，这进一步要求模型能够同时适应非平稳数据分布和随时间演变的偏差模式，并在准确性和公平性之间进行有效且稳健的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的在线决策树框架，该框架在数据流中具有公平性，并且可能存在分布漂移。具体来说，首先，我们提出了两种新颖的公平分割标准，尽可能对数据进行编码，同时消除对敏感属性的依赖，并在需要时通过细粒度控制进一步适应非平稳分布。其次，我们提出了两种公平决策树在线增长算法，以满足不同的在线公平决策要求。我们的实验表明，我们的算法能够处理大规模和非平稳流媒体环境中的歧视，并在公平性和预测性能之间取得更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线且可定制的公平性感知学习框架，用于处理数据流中的非平稳分布和时间演变偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性学习方法多为批量处理，难以应对现实场景中实时到达且分布动态变化的数据流，同时需在准确性与公平性间取得有效平衡。
AI.method: 设计两种新型公平性分裂准则以消除敏感属性依赖，并提出两种在线决策树增长算法以适应非平稳数据分布和动态偏差模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提算法能在大规模非平稳流数据环境中有效处理歧视问题，在公平性与预测性能间取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为在线公平性学习提供了有效解决方案，可应对动态环境下的实时决策需求。

authors_text: Suncheng Xiang,Yuzhuo Fu,Guanjie You,Ting Liu
title: Taking A Closer Look at Synthesis: Fine-grained Attribute Analysis for Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 仔细研究综合：用于人员重新识别的细粒度属性分析
comment: Accepted as conference paper in ICASSP 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.07139
comments: Accepted as conference paper in ICASSP 2021. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2006.07139
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) plays an important role in applications such as public security and video surveillance. Recently, learning from synthetic data, which benefits from the popularity of synthetic data engine, has achieved remarkable performance. However, in pursuit of high accuracy, researchers in the academic always focus on training with large-scale datasets at a high cost of time and label expenses, while neglect to explore the potential of performing efficient training from millions of synthetic data. To facilitate development in this field, we reviewed the previously developed synthetic dataset GPR and built an improved one (GPR+) with larger number of identities and distinguished attributes. Based on it, we quantitatively analyze the influence of dataset attribute on re-ID system. To our best knowledge, we are among the first attempts to explicitly dissect person re-ID from the aspect of attribute on synthetic dataset. This research helps us have a deeper understanding of the fundamental problems in person re-ID, which also provides useful insights for dataset building and future practical usage.
summary: Person re-identification (re-ID) plays an important role in applications such as public security and video surveillance. Recently, learning from synthetic data, which benefits from the popularity of synthetic data engine, has achieved remarkable performance. However, in pursuit of high accuracy, researchers in the academic always focus on training with large-scale datasets at a high cost of time and label expenses, while neglect to explore the potential of performing efficient training from millions of synthetic data. To facilitate development in this field, we reviewed the previously developed synthetic dataset GPR and built an improved one (GPR+) with larger number of identities and distinguished attributes. Based on it, we quantitatively analyze the influence of dataset attribute on re-ID system. To our best knowledge, we are among the first attempts to explicitly dissect person re-ID from the aspect of attribute on synthetic dataset. This research helps us have a deeper understanding of the fundamental problems in person re-ID, which also provides useful insights for dataset building and future practical usage.
abstract_zh: 行人重识别（re-ID）在公共安全、视频监控等应用中发挥着重要作用。最近，受益于合成数据引擎的普及，从合成数据中学习已经取得了显着的性能。然而，为了追求高精度，学术界的研究人员总是专注于大规模数据集的训练，付出了高昂的时间和标签费用，而忽视了探索从数百万个合成数据中进行高效训练的潜力。为了促进这一领域的发展，我们回顾了之前开发的合成数据集 GPR，并构建了一个具有更多身份和区分属性的改进数据集（GPR+）。在此基础上，我们定量分析了数据集属性对re-ID系统的影响。据我们所知，我们是最早从合成数据集的属性方面明确剖析人员重识别的尝试之一。这项研究有助于我们更深入地了解行人重识别的基本问题，也为数据集构建和未来的实际使用提供了有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过改进合成数据集并分析其细粒度属性，探索行人重识别（re-ID）任务中高效利用合成数据的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度依赖大规模真实数据集训练，忽视了合成数据在高效训练中的潜力，且缺乏对合成数据属性影响的系统分析。
AI.method: 改进现有合成数据集GPR为GPR+（增加身份数量和区分属性），并基于该数据集定量分析属性对re-ID性能的影响。
AI.result: 首次从属性维度解析合成数据对re-ID的贡献，揭示了属性分布与模型性能的关联性，为数据构建和实际应用提供新视角。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对re-ID基础问题的理解，证明了合成数据属性优化对提升模型效率与泛化能力的重要性。

search_text: Taking A Closer Look at Synthesis: Fine-grained Attribute Analysis for Person Re-Identification 仔细研究综合：用于人员重新识别的细粒度属性分析 Person re-identification (re-ID) plays an important role in applications such as public security and video surveillance. Recently, learning from synthetic data, which benefits from the popularity of synthetic data engine, has achieved remarkable performance. However, in pursuit of high accuracy, researchers in the academic always focus on training with large-scale datasets at a high cost of time and label expenses, while neglect to explore the potential of performing efficient training from millions of synthetic data. To facilitate development in this field, we reviewed the previously developed synthetic dataset GPR and built an improved one (GPR+) with larger number of identities and distinguished attributes. Based on it, we quantitatively analyze the influence of dataset attribute on re-ID system. To our best knowledge, we are among the first attempts to explicitly dissect person re-ID from the aspect of attribute on synthetic dataset. This research helps us have a deeper understanding of the fundamental problems in person re-ID, which also provides useful insights for dataset building and future practical usage. 行人重识别（re-ID）在公共安全、视频监控等应用中发挥着重要作用。最近，受益于合成数据引擎的普及，从合成数据中学习已经取得了显着的性能。然而，为了追求高精度，学术界的研究人员总是专注于大规模数据集的训练，付出了高昂的时间和标签费用，而忽视了探索从数百万个合成数据中进行高效训练的潜力。为了促进这一领域的发展，我们回顾了之前开发的合成数据集 GPR，并构建了一个具有更多身份和区分属性的改进数据集（GPR+）。在此基础上，我们定量分析了数据集属性对re-ID系统的影响。据我们所知，我们是最早从合成数据集的属性方面明确剖析人员重识别的尝试之一。这项研究有助于我们更深入地了解行人重识别的基本问题，也为数据集构建和未来的实际使用提供了有用的见解。 本文通过改进合成数据集并分析其细粒度属性，探索行人重识别（re-ID）任务中高效利用合成数据的方法。 Suncheng Xiang,Yuzhuo Fu,Guanjie You,Ting Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Marek Adamczyk,Brian Brubach,Fabrizio Grandoni,Karthik A. Sankararaman,Aravind Srinivasan,Pan Xu
title: Improved Approximation Algorithms for Stochastic-Matching Problems
title_zh: 随机匹配问题的改进近似算法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1505.01439
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1505.01439
abstract: We consider the Stochastic Matching problem, which is motivated by applications in kidney exchange and online dating. In this problem, we are given an undirected graph. Each edge is assigned a known, independent probability of existence and a positive weight (or profit). We must probe an edge to discover whether or not it exists. Each node is assigned a positive integer called a timeout (or a patience). On this random graph we are executing a process, which probes the edges one-by-one and gradually constructs a matching. The process is constrained in two ways. First, if a probed edge exists, it must be added irrevocably to the matching (the query-commit model). Second, the timeout of a node $v$ upper-bounds the number of edges incident to $v$ that can be probed. The goal is to maximize the expected weight of the constructed matching. For this problem, Bansal et al. (Algorithmica 2012) provided a $0.33$-approximation algorithm for bipartite graphs and a $0.25$-approximation for general graphs. We improve the approximation factors to $0.39$ and $0.269$, respectively. The main technical ingredient in our result is a novel way of probing edges according to a not-uniformly-random permutation. Patching this method with an algorithm that works best for large-probability edges (plus additional ideas) leads to our improved approximation factors.
summary: We consider the Stochastic Matching problem, which is motivated by applications in kidney exchange and online dating. In this problem, we are given an undirected graph. Each edge is assigned a known, independent probability of existence and a positive weight (or profit). We must probe an edge to discover whether or not it exists. Each node is assigned a positive integer called a timeout (or a patience). On this random graph we are executing a process, which probes the edges one-by-one and gradually constructs a matching. The process is constrained in two ways. First, if a probed edge exists, it must be added irrevocably to the matching (the query-commit model). Second, the timeout of a node $v$ upper-bounds the number of edges incident to $v$ that can be probed. The goal is to maximize the expected weight of the constructed matching. For this problem, Bansal et al. (Algorithmica 2012) provided a $0.33$-approximation algorithm for bipartite graphs and a $0.25$-approximation for general graphs. We improve the approximation factors to $0.39$ and $0.269$, respectively. The main technical ingredient in our result is a novel way of probing edges according to a not-uniformly-random permutation. Patching this method with an algorithm that works best for large-probability edges (plus additional ideas) leads to our improved approximation factors.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑随机匹配问题，该问题是由肾脏交换和在线约会中的应用激发的。在这个问题中，我们给出了一个无向图。每条边都被分配一个已知的、独立的存在概率和正权重（或利润）。我们必须探测一条边缘来发现它是否存在。每个节点都分配有一个正整数，称为超时（或耐心）。在这个随机图上，我们正在执行一个过程，它逐一探测边缘并逐渐构建匹配。该过程受到两个方面的限制。首先，如果存在探测到的边，则必须将其不可撤销地添加到匹配（查询-提交模型）中。其次，节点 $v$ 的超时限制了与 $v$ 相关的可探测边的数量。目标是最大化构建匹配的预期权重。对于这个问题，Bansal 等人。 (Algorithmica 2012) 为二分图提供了 0.33 美元的近似算法，为一般图提供了 0.25 美元的近似算法。我们将近似因子分别改进为 $0.39$ 和 $0.269$。我们的结果中的主要技术成分是一种根据非均匀随机排列探测边缘的新颖方法。使用最适合大概率边缘的算法（加上其他想法）修补此方法可以改进近似因子。

AI.tldr: 本文针对随机匹配问题提出改进的近似算法，旨在通过优化边探测策略提高匹配的期望权重。
AI.motivation: 随机匹配问题在肾脏交换和在线交友等实际场景中具有重要应用，需在节点超时约束下最大化匹配收益。
AI.method: 设计了一种非均匀随机排列的边探测方法，并结合高概率边优化算法，突破传统均匀排列的限制。
AI.result: 将二分图近似比从0.33提升至0.39，一般图从0.25提升至0.269，显著优于先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过非均匀排列策略有效提升近似性能，为随机匹配问题提供了更优的理论解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoying Pang,Sunil Thulasidasan,Larry Rybarcyk
title: Autonomous Control of a Particle Accelerator using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的粒子加速器自主控制
comment: NeurIPS 2020 Workshop on Machine Learning for Engineering, Modeling, Simulation and Design
comments: NeurIPS 2020 Workshop on Machine Learning for Engineering, Modeling, Simulation and Design
abstract: We describe an approach to learning optimal control policies for a large, linear particle accelerator using deep reinforcement learning coupled with a high-fidelity physics engine. The framework consists of an AI controller that uses deep neural nets for state and action-space representation and learns optimal policies using reward signals that are provided by the physics simulator. For this work, we only focus on controlling a small section of the entire accelerator. Nevertheless, initial results indicate that we can achieve better-than-human level performance in terms of particle beam current and distribution. The ultimate goal of this line of work is to substantially reduce the tuning time for such facilities by orders of magnitude, and achieve near-autonomous control.
summary: We describe an approach to learning optimal control policies for a large, linear particle accelerator using deep reinforcement learning coupled with a high-fidelity physics engine. The framework consists of an AI controller that uses deep neural nets for state and action-space representation and learns optimal policies using reward signals that are provided by the physics simulator. For this work, we only focus on controlling a small section of the entire accelerator. Nevertheless, initial results indicate that we can achieve better-than-human level performance in terms of particle beam current and distribution. The ultimate goal of this line of work is to substantially reduce the tuning time for such facilities by orders of magnitude, and achieve near-autonomous control.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种使用深度强化学习和高保真物理引擎来学习大型线性粒子加速器最优控制策略的方法。该框架由人工智能控制器组成，该控制器使用深度神经网络进行状态和动作空间表示，并使用物理模拟器提供的奖励信号学习最佳策略。对于这项工作，我们只专注于控制整个加速器的一小部分。尽管如此，初步结果表明，我们可以在粒子束电流和分布方面实现优于人类水平的性能。这一系列工作的最终目标是大幅减少此类设施的调整时间几个数量级，并实现近乎自主的控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度强化学习结合高保真物理引擎，学习控制粒子加速器的最优策略以提高性能。
AI.motivation: 传统粒子加速器调校耗时且依赖人工，需开发自主控制方法以大幅提升效率。
AI.method: 构建AI控制器，利用深度神经网络表征状态与动作空间，并通过物理模拟器提供的奖励信号学习控制策略。
AI.result: 在加速器局部控制任务中实现优于人类水平的粒子束流稳定性与分布控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可将加速器调校时间减少量级，为实现近自主控制奠定基础。

The ultimate goal of this line of work is to substantially reduce the tuning time for such facilities by orders of magnitude, and achieve near-autonomous control. 我们描述了一种使用深度强化学习和高保真物理引擎来学习大型线性粒子加速器最优控制策略的方法。该框架由人工智能控制器组成，该控制器使用深度神经网络进行状态和动作空间表示，并使用物理模拟器提供的奖励信号学习最佳策略。对于这项工作，我们只专注于控制整个加速器的一小部分。尽管如此，初步结果表明，我们可以在粒子束电流和分布方面实现优于人类水平的性能。这一系列工作的最终目标是大幅减少此类设施的调整时间几个数量级，并实现近乎自主的控制。 本文提出使用深度强化学习结合高保真物理引擎，学习控制粒子加速器的最优策略以提高性能。 Xiaoying Pang,Sunil Thulasidasan,Larry Rybarcyk cs.AI,cs.LG,physics.acc-ph
